name: David Trone
subject: need your opinion on gun safety
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland
body:
Peter,

Over the years, we’ve all watched in horror as one mass shooting after another has plagued our country.

Just this past weekend in a Texas mall, another mass shooting took away the lives of eight innocent people and injured seven more. It’s as heartbreaking as it is infuriating.

Shooting after shooting, we commit to doing something to stop the gun violence tearing apart our communities and taking innocent lives. But we consistently fail to get it done.
I’m ready for tangible action, but I want to know what you think:

Do you agree that we should expand background checks so that we can keep guns out of the hands of people with a history of violence or serious mental illness?

>> YES. I think that we should expand background checks for gun purchases. https://secure.ngpvan.com/wX3FeijmhEiK284wFFc75w2

>> NO. I don’t think more needs to be done in the fight for gun safety. https://secure.ngpvan.com/wX3FeijmhEiK284wFFc75w2

Thank you for sharing your thoughts,

David

Paid for by David Trone for Maryland.
David Trone for Maryland
P.O. Box 83998
Gaithersburg, MD 20883-3998
United States

name: Schrier HQ
subject: ICYMI: Kim is working to protect abortion providers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
"Murray and Schrier seek to protect abortion doctors in blue states" – AXIOS ICYMI, Peter: Kim just introduced legislation to protect doctors in blue states from legal action for performing abortions on people who cross state lines for the procedure.

With more and more women being forced to travel across state lines for the abortion care they need, this legislation will be critical to ensuring doctors can continue providing necessary reproductive care without fear of legal repercussions from anti-choice extremists. Now, we want to know if you have Kim's back.

**[Will you add your name right away to show your support of Kim's bill to protect abortion doctors?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63010366/405265544/448934142?ms=em23_230508_AB_adv_gq_act___SH_ettx&refcode=em23_230508_AB_adv_gq_act___SH_ettx&source=em23_230508_AB_adv_gq_act___SH_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230508_AB_adv_gq_act___SH_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=BzO5sGCK7eyZ8GGXAtfPsrQ8IFl90mW36z/0rIcphoHlCw/weYY6OjHNnSRMF6ZtMZYAo+RdfunuTqFU57VnMWT7vackmr1x/VvkgY8xdFzzrrDh9Z9r81IV2FHlP5hSdswwdA58zUn8ZKdOpsGIeZLbh1e7M7CZbCsbel6PKmQ=&refcode2=13fdb674-fced-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2ZkYjY3NC1mY2VkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wqOkNuGley2vqkxkYLMVePPIwntlZYkNvuKqP1fKrtc=&emci=ffefe60b-afed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=13fdb674-fced-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)**

\---------- Begin Forwarded Message ---------
From: Team Schrier
Subject: AXIOS: "Murray and Schrier seek to protect abortion doctors in blue states"
Date: Thursday, May 4, 2023
Peter,

Since the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , women in states with restrictive abortion bans have been forced to flee to other states to receive the reproductive care they need. Now, state legislatures across the country are using every tactic possible to restrict access to abortion – including targeting doctors.

**That's why Kim and Senator Patty Murray just re-introduced the Let Doctors Provide Reproductive Health Care Act.**
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63010367/405265550/448934142?ms=em23_230508_AB_adv_gq_act___SH_ettx&refcode=em23_230508_AB_adv_gq_act___SH_ettx&source=em23_230508_AB_adv_gq_act___SH_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230508_AB_adv_gq_act___SH_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=BzO5sGCK7eyZ8GGXAtfPsrQ8IFl90mW36z/0rIcphoHlCw/weYY6OjHNnSRMF6ZtMZYAo+RdfunuTqFU57VnMWT7vackmr1x/VvkgY8xdFzzrrDh9Z9r81IV2FHlP5hSdswwdA58zUn8ZKdOpsGIeZLbh1e7M7CZbCsbel6PKmQ=&refcode2=13fdb674-fced-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2ZkYjY3NC1mY2VkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wqOkNuGley2vqkxkYLMVePPIwntlZYkNvuKqP1fKrtc=&emci=ffefe60b-afed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=13fdb674-fced-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)
---

This legislation would protect doctors in blue states from legal action if they perform abortions on people who travel from a state where abortion is illegal – and help ensure these doctors can continue providing this important care without fear of jail time or lawsuits.

As a doctor and congresswoman, Kim knows doctors should not face criminal penalties, loss of licensure, or loss of insurance coverage for providing abortion care. Do you agree?

**[If you agree anti-abortion policies should not reach states like Washington, add your name now to show your support for Kim's bill →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63010368/405265552/448934142?ms=em23_230508_AB_adv_gq_act___SH_ettx&refcode=em23_230508_AB_adv_gq_act___SH_ettx&source=em23_230508_AB_adv_gq_act___SH_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230508_AB_adv_gq_act___SH_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=BzO5sGCK7eyZ8GGXAtfPsrQ8IFl90mW36z/0rIcphoHlCw/weYY6OjHNnSRMF6ZtMZYAo+RdfunuTqFU57VnMWT7vackmr1x/VvkgY8xdFzzrrDh9Z9r81IV2FHlP5hSdswwdA58zUn8ZKdOpsGIeZLbh1e7M7CZbCsbel6PKmQ=&refcode2=13fdb674-fced-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2ZkYjY3NC1mY2VkLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wqOkNuGley2vqkxkYLMVePPIwntlZYkNvuKqP1fKrtc=&emci=ffefe60b-afed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=13fdb674-fced-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)**

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: I’m running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| I wanted you to hear it from me personally, folks:

**I’m officially running for re-election to the U.S. Senate next year.**

We’ve delivered lasting results for New Mexico and our country. But our work is far from over. Together, we can create a future that is as boundless as our skies, as majestic as our mesas, and as welcoming as our communities.

**It starts with defending our Democratic Senate Majority and keeping my seat in New Mexico blue.**

[I’m committed to continuing this fight, and your early support is a key part of it. Will you become a Founding Donor to my re-election campaign by splitting a donation between my campaign and Voter Protection Project today?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44823?t=6&akid=7599%2E878179%2EtTbkXj) | [DONATE HERE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44823?t=7&akid=7599%2E878179%2EtTbkXj)
---
Growing up, my dad was a union lineman with the local utility company, and my mom was a seamstress and an automobile tire factory worker. My parents taught me the value of hard work and the importance of going **all in** for the fights that matter most.

**That’s the mindset I’ve taken into my education, my career as a mechanical engineer, and my time in public office.**

Last year, against the odds, I went **all in** to broker a historic gun safety bill — the first one to pass Congress in decades. That’s just the start of the work we must do to protect our children from gun violence, the leading cause of death for children under 18.

I went **all in** to honor our promises to our veterans, expanding healthcare benefits for the many people exposed to toxic burn pits during their service.

After the wildfires that devastated New Mexico, I went **all in** to secure $4 billion to help make our communities whole again and protect us against future fires.

I went **all in** to lower the cost of prescription drugs, electrify our households, repair New Mexico’s roads and bridges, and supply our homes with clean drinking water.

And now I’m **all in** to win re-election in New Mexico, defend our Democratic Senate Majority, and hold the White House — because **it’s time to take on the challenges that have been written off for too long.**

From accelerating our transition to clean energy and protecting our public lands and waters, to building on our historic investment in early childhood education in New Mexico and beyond — I’m ready to continue this fight.

But I can't do it alone. Democrats need to defend 23 seats next year, including mine in New Mexico. If we lose our Senate Majority, you can bet that Republicans will deliver on the threats they are making in the House — from passing a national abortion ban to cutting critical programs like Medicare and Social Security.

**You can take the next step in keeping New Mexico rooted in our shared values and defending the Senate today by becoming a Founding Donor to my re-election campaign.** [If you’re all in on this fight, split a grassroots donation of any amount between my campaign and Voter Protection Project »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44823?t=8&akid=7599%2E878179%2EtTbkXj)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Martin Heinrich and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44824?t=9&akid=7599%2E878179%2EtTbkXj)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44825?t=10&akid=7599%2E878179%2EtTbkXj)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44826?t=11&akid=7599%2E878179%2EtTbkXj)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44827?t=12&akid=7599%2E878179%2EtTbkXj)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44823?t=13&akid=7599%2E878179%2EtTbkXj)
Thank you for your commitment to a more prosperous future for New Mexico and our country. I’m grateful to have your voice in this fight.

— Martin
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7599%2E878179%2EtTbkXj). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7599%2E878179%2EtTbkXj).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=7599%2E878179%2EtTbkXj) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=7599%2E878179%2EtTbkXj). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=7599%2E878179%2EtTbkXj)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=7599%2E878179%2EtTbkXj)

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: We have a long road ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024

I am committed to reviving the American Dream and taking the America First movement further than President Trump.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=a681e7e3da404dd1a432d5a9925f0207&_t=u5nVOZU1qXZP1oRZNY3OIjN2xujkvGitKJteC2ZtZ_qHJNk98ozrTGE3ajZNDxatSoijR6RVT1LCdlqvRImrk1lBwf92FtQr3tJWXG52lu0%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=a681e7e3da404dd1a432d5a9925f0207&_t=u5nVOZU1qXZP1oRZNY3OIjN2xujkvGitKJteC2ZtZ_qHJNk98ozrTGE3ajZNDxatSoijR6RVT1LCdlqvRImrk1lBwf92FtQr3tJWXG52lu0%3D)

We’re making history in 2024, Fellow American!

I am committed to reviving the American Dream and taking the America First movement further than President Trump.

_**We have a long road ahead.**_

Our first goal is to secure a prominent spot on the debate stage in August where I can offer my vision for our country and its revival. But, there are certain numbers I have to hit, which include strong polling numbers and *importantly* invested unique grassroots donors.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Chris Nanos, Pima County Sheriff
subject: Working for the people

body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Hi — It’s Sheriff Nanos.
I am confident that Kirsten Engel is the candidate we need fighting for AZ-06 in Congress, and I’m proud to endorse her.
Fentanyl is the single deadliest drug threat in our nation. It’s killing our youth and it’s being transported across our borders.
Kirsten Engel’s opponent voted to CUT funding for border security and instead engage in partisan politics. I trust Kirsten to take a pragmatic and compassionate stance in dealing with border issues.
You can join me by donating now to support her in this ultra-competitive race >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_050823_Nanos]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=X_050823_Nanos_25]
Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=X_050823_Nanos_100]

Donate other [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?express_lane_other=true&refcode=X_050823_Nanos_other]
I support a candidate who will restore our national integrity, security, and world standing and reform our longtime broken and failed immigration system.
Kirsten Engel gets it and I am proud to support her.
Will you support Kirsten's campaign by chipping in? Every little bit makes a difference. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_050823_Nanos]
Thank you,
— Chris Nanos
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_050823_Nanos [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_050823_Nanos] Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer.
She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.
In 2022, Kirsten lost her race by one of the smallest margins in the country. Will you make sure she can build a winning campaign early by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_050823_Nanos]

clean_body: [] NEW FROM CNN: Republican-controlled states target college students’ voting power ahead of high-stakes 2024 elections [] Our Democratic Secretaries of State are working around the clock to DEFEND voting rights, while Republicans actively try to dismantle them! Can we count on you to chip in anything you can so we can continue the fight to elect Democratic Secretaries of State who will defend and expand access to the ballot box? >> [ NOW >> [] Team - Voter registration among 18-24 year-olds increased in several states last November over 2018 levels. AND, there was a significant shift towards Democrats among young voters last November, blunting a so-called “red-wave” for Republicans. But that has the GOP worried. As we speak, GOP-controlled legislatures are pushing for limitations on youth voting rights: In Idaho, a new law enacted this year will prohibit the use of student IDs to register to vote or cast ballots. In Texas, a new proposal would eliminate all campus polling places in the state. * And in Ohio, a new law in effect for the first time in this week’s primary requires voters to present government-authorized photo ID at the polls. Instead of working on a strategy to win over young voters, Republicans are trying to make it HARDER for them to vote. Luckily, our Democratic Secretaries of State are trying to protect and expand access to the ballot box. But they need your support! Please, friend: Can we count on you to make a donation of any amount so we can continue our fight to defend voting rights and elect Democratic Secretaries of State? CHIP IN NOW >> [] Chip in $5 >> [] Chip in $25 >> [] Chip in $50 >> [] Chip in $100 >> [] Chip in $250 >> [] Chip in another amount >> [] Team DASS Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State. We're the ONLY national organization dedicated to electing these state-level voting rights champions. Please donate anything you can today to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda: [] CHIP IN $5 >> []

subject: “How state legislatures went off the rails” (Washington Post Opinion)

---
Banning _all_ abortions with no exceptions for rape or incest.
_Eliminating_ common-sense gun restrictions.
_Attacking_ LGBTQ parents, teachers, and students.
_Restricting_ voting rights.
Even _banning_ books.
**How did GOP legislatures get so extreme? If you guessed “gerrymandering,” then you guessed right.**

Gerrymandering allows Republicans to ignore what voters want and pass their far-right agenda instead. By manipulating maps, GOP politicians can virtually guarantee that they’ll win a majority of power, even if they only earn a minority of votes.
[Help end gerrymandering: Donate to the NDRC](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63011676/405295495/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230508_FR_5H_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM2ZGZlOGVlLTA2ZWUtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jbAN5xOjp-JYn5FsGanx6xqiNsED_GZnYASZ_kAPzMY=)
---
**How do we combat GOP tactics that undermine our democracy and breed extremism?_We’re glad you asked._**

Attorney General Eric Holder has often said, **“Wherever Democrats can fairly compete, they can win.”** That’s why the NDRC has been fighting for fair maps since 2017 – and our fight is still going.

According to _POLITICO_ , Republicans’ plan to expand their House majority in 2024 includes “ambitious gerrymandering.” The GOP is _desperate_ to hold elections on manipulated maps so they can implement even more of their extreme agenda. That means we must stay engaged.
**Team, we’re working around the clock to defend our democracy by fighting for fair maps, voting rights, and more.**

[**_Will you pitch in today to help us keep going?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63011677/405295503/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230508_FR_5H_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM2ZGZlOGVlLTA2ZWUtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jbAN5xOjp-JYn5FsGanx6xqiNsED_GZnYASZ_kAPzMY=)

Friedrich August von Hayek was born on this day in 1899. Those of you who have followed me for some time are likely aware that no person has influenced my outlook on governance more than Hayek. When I first encountered Hayek's writings in 2005, I never could have imagined the extent to which his ideas would affect my life.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..yVN8mf2N9gOpbrXruM6tXmBljT2s9WF5g7bM5RjlD6k?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=120151263)
Today, in honor of his birthday, I want to celebrate the single most important aspect of Hayek's work: his message of humility, which sits at the core of Hayek's philosophy--from economics to politics--and binds everything together.
Hayek's key insight was that, in all of humanity's pursuits, it was essential to recognize the limits of human knowledge. In his 1945 essay "[The Use of Knowledge in Society](https://substack.com/redirect/a1b4426f-00df-4e4b-a237-5d6b713511f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)," Hayek noted that economists had been mischaracterizing society's economic problem. The issue isn't simply how to allocate scarce resources but rather "how to secure the best use of resources known to any of the members of society, for ends whose relative importance only these individuals know. Or, to put it briefly, it is a problem of the utilization of knowledge which is not given to anyone in its totality."
Hayek pointed out that this dispersed knowledge, which he called "the knowledge of the particular circumstances of time and place," could be rapidly and effectively shared only through a system of decentralization, with planning divided among countless individuals instead of being done by a central authority.
With respect to the development of society, Hayek warned against "constructivist rationalism," the belief that anything not consciously designed or fully intelligible should be discarded. Here again, he emphasized the importance of humility. Humans are irrational, fallible, and incapable of understanding all the social processes that have brought about modern civilization. Our most cherished customs and institutions are the product of hundreds or thousands of years of evolution, reflecting what Hayek described as a spontaneous or emergent order. This fact was not an argument against change but an admonition for respect and caution.
Finally, nothing better represented Hayek's call to humility, or had a more profound impact on my work as a representative, than his views on governance. Central to Hayek's approach was his belief in the Rule of Law. This means, first, that laws should be limited to the provision of general rules of just conduct. Proper laws are not specific commands; instead, they establish a framework of expectations within which people are free to pursue their own ends. Such a system allows diversity to flourish, while centralized power smothers it.
A second fundamental component of the Rule of Law is the concept of equality before the law. Targeted corporate welfare and other forms of favoritism are wrong not only because they're unjust but also because they ascribe to the state a knowledge about best uses and ultimate outcomes that the state cannot possess. Equality before the law is therefore not only a protection against injustice but also an expression of humility.
There's a lot more I could write about Hayek, but I'll have to leave it there for now. I hope you'll check out his writing, especially his essays (such as the one linked above) found in _[Individualism and Economic Order](https://substack.com/redirect/4f708cde-d1f3-4507-9b88-f4524ecee7ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ and _[The Market and Other Orders](https://substack.com/redirect/7c82c6c9-4e13-4baf-9d44-8029c34f3580?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_. Let me know what you think!
Happy birthday, F.A. Hayek!

clean_body: A celebration of Hayek's most important contribution | | ---|---|--- | | | or ? A celebration of Hayek's most important contribution | | | May 9 | | | | | | | | | | Friedrich August von Hayek was born on this day in 1899. Those of you who have followed me for some time are likely aware that no person has influenced my outlook on governance more than Hayek. When I first encountered Hayek's writings in 2005, I never could have imagined the extent to which his ideas would affect my life. Today, in honor of his birthday, I want to celebrate the single most important aspect of Hayek's work: his message of humility, which sits at the core of Hayek's philosophy--from economics to politics--and binds everything together. Hayek's key insight was that, in all of humanity's pursuits, it was essential to recognize the limits of human knowledge. In his 1945 essay "," Hayek noted that economists had been mischaracterizing society's economic problem. The issue isn't simply how to allocate scarce resources but rather "how to secure the best use of resources known to any of the members of society, for ends whose relative importance only these individuals know. Or, to put it briefly, it is a problem of the utilization of knowledge which is not given to anyone in its totality." Hayek pointed out that this dispersed knowledge, which he called "the knowledge of the particular circumstances of time and place," could be rapidly and effectively shared only through a system of decentralization, with planning divided among countless individuals instead of being done by a central authority. With respect to the development of society, Hayek warned against "constructivist rationalism," the belief that anything not consciously designed or fully intelligible should be discarded. Here again, he emphasized the importance of humility. Humans are irrational, fallible, and incapable of understanding all the social processes that have brought about modern civilization. Our most cherished customs and institutions are the product of hundreds or thousands of years of evolution, reflecting what Hayek described as a spontaneous or emergent order. This fact was not an argument against change but an admonition for respect and caution. Finally, nothing better represented Hayek's call to humility, or had a more profound impact on my work as a representative, than his views on governance. Central to Hayek's approach was his belief in the Rule of Law. This means, first, that laws should be limited to the provision of general rules of just conduct. Proper laws are not specific commands; instead, they establish a framework of expectations within which people are free to pursue their own ends. Such a system allows diversity to flourish, while centralized power smothers it. A second fundamental component of the Rule of Law is the concept of equality before the law. Targeted corporate welfare and other forms of favoritism are wrong not only because they're unjust but also because they ascribe to the state a knowledge about best uses and ultimate outcomes that the state cannot possess. Equality before the law is therefore not only a protection against injustice but also an expression of humility. There's a lot more I could write about Hayek, but I'll have to leave it there for now. I hope you'll check out his writing, especially his essays (such as the one linked above) found in and . Let me know what you think! Happy birthday, F.A. Hayek! name: Your America
subject: Study Ancient Christianity
body:
What strange times we live in.

This sponsored message from Your American News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c11505%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=drPHeeJsC%2bGVjzU%2f6aHADA&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Friend,

What strange times we live in. Strange...and disturbing.

Would you have ever imagined seeing headlines about churches and ministries being vandalized and, in some instances, set on fire--all while authorities seem to turn a blind eye to the violence?

Or stories about how the FBI opened investigations into Catholic parishes in the United States?

How about the significant decrease in church attendance, which dropped by up to 15 million people per week, due to COVID lockdowns that forced many houses of worship to close?

These news stories demonstrate the mounting pressure Christians encounter in our increasingly secular society. In many ways, it seems like **faith in America is under siege.**

That’s one reason we’re releasing our latest free online course, **“Ancient Christianity,”** this month. I hope you’ll enroll today using this secure link:
**
** [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c11506%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=d%2bYvxAy9si0ZtyWXqnqXDA&sysid=1)
**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c11507%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=R1Fqr%2fnPeKS27KlgvKm%2bQQ&sysid=1)**

The course delves into the hardships and courage of early Christians who endured terrible persecution for their faith. At the same time, they shaped the Christian church and established the foundations of the Western world, including the United States.

**Their examples of “faith that overcomes” can inspire us today.**

For instance, the course covers the Roman Emperor Nero’s persecution of Christians and introduces Tertullian, the first Latin Christian theologian. Many historians believe Tertullian was a lawyer who defended Christians from legal persecution, and he wrote against Rome’s treatment of women, abortion, and immorality.

That’s why, after enrolling, I hope you’ll join us in promoting**“Ancient Christianity”** to millions of your fellow citizens.

To achieve this objective, we’ve set a goal to raise $500,000 by midnight on **May 22** to share this important free online course with as many people as possible.

The faithful backing of supporters like you makes our free online courses possible. You also allow us to **reach** and **teach** millions through other educational outreach efforts, like _Imprimis_ and our K-12 education programs.

And every supporter like you really matters to us because we refuse EVERY PENNY of taxpayer funding--even indirectly in the form of federal or state student loans and grants.

We must educate ourselves. Looking back at the Christians of the past, we can see how they faced the overpowering might of an empire and set an example for us to follow.

So, will you help us reach and teach people just like you--urging them to enroll in **“Ancient Christianity”**?

Using this secure link, you can enroll and chip in to offset our development and promotional costs with a tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, or any amount.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c11507%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=R1Fqr%2fnPeKS27KlgvKm%2bQQ&sysid=1)
**
Together, we can secure the blessings of civil and religious liberty for the next generation of Americans--so they don’t have to live through even stranger times than the ones we live in today.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, ‘01
Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: We only have two options
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots.

| |
---
| | |
Biden just renewed his push for mass amnesty of millions of illegal immigrants - including the more than 5 MILLION he's ushered in under his administration.

As Speaker of the House, I need to know. Where do you stand on Biden's Mass-Amnesty plan?
**Option 1: We surrender to Biden 's Open-Borders agenda, and allow him to legalize millions of illegal immigrants.**

name: Elizabeth BeShears, AFC
subject: [POLL] Parents vs. Teachers Unions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children
body:
In 2021, Randi Weingarten, President of the American Federation for Teachers, said this...

| | | ****
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvdgq45vnaub03cl0r361787huoo6sgva4j5a1p8_)
---
| | Friend, **_In 2021,_** Randi Weingarten, President of the American Federation for Teachers, said this... **“**** _Parents claim they have the right to shape their kids’ school curriculum. They don’t.”_** Since then, Weingarten has continued to signal that teachers unions should have the ultimate say on education decisions, **not parents.**
That’s why we’re reaching out to get your opinion on this issue. **Who should have the final say over children’s education: parents or teachers unions?**
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvpmv0u7ikrpg065s2g8egmn94kkdb74d7e7sbeg_)
---
| | Since 2020, Randi Weingarten has been actively involved and responsible in keeping public schools closed, but even worse, she’s worked to sabotage the school choice movement wherever she can. **She’s left children behind, and parents without options.** Friend, do you think she really has the best interests of parents, students, or even teachers in mind? **Take our poll and let us know your thoughts:** **<[RESPOND NOW](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7rbn8afuubeu2ckil9532cujonehhf5ek8f89t8_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdh66ob6c1h2bs)>** Thank you,Elizabeth BeShearsAmerican Federation for Children

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z01i4hb4t06714sklrr7j5n40mvi6agheg5a2ul0_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdh66ob6c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2za8lkggb4qmsvhakmcl30st4is7vpgn44b8sncog_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdh66ob6c1h2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zface4o5jg98cetegu8hqsth27bnqkhb33u3mp90_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdh66ob6c1h2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Deroy Murdock
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Deroy Murdock 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
What strange times we live in.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zflf2f14a0mjc3ll53usajqstid7pl23bcf7b4i0_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdh66ob2c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

What strange times we live in. Strange...and disturbing.

Would you have ever imagined seeing headlines about churches and ministries being vandalized and, in some instances, set on fire--all while authorities seem to turn a blind eye to the violence?

Or stories about how the FBI opened investigations into Catholic parishes in the United States?

How about the significant decrease in church attendance, which dropped by up to 15 million people per week, due to COVID lockdowns that forced many houses of worship to close?

These news stories demonstrate the mounting pressure Christians encounter in our increasingly secular society. In many ways, it seems like **faith in America is under siege.**

That's one reason we're releasing our latest free online course, **" Ancient Christianity,"** this month. I hope you'll enroll today using this secure link:
**
**[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6s13eme3ppf7olo853akf603dmof9q9trieoa10_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdh66ob2c5h2bs)
**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfp2u2356mnpnqutntjf9ctrf3kpaeilk4jlt4ao_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdh66ob2c5h2bs)**

The course delves into the hardships and courage of early Christians who endured terrible persecution for their faith. At the same time, they shaped the Christian church and established the foundations of the Western world, including the United States.

**Their examples of "faith that overcomes" can inspire us today.**

For instance, the course covers the Roman Emperor Nero's persecution of Christians and introduces Tertullian, the first Latin Christian theologian. Many historians believe Tertullian was a lawyer who defended Christians from legal persecution, and he wrote against Rome's treatment of women, abortion, and immorality.

That's why, after enrolling, I hope you'll join us in promoting** "Ancient Christianity"** to millions of your fellow citizens.

To achieve this objective, we've set a goal to raise $500,000 by midnight on **May 22** to share this important free online course with as many people as possible.

The faithful backing of supporters like you makes our free online courses possible. You also allow us to **reach** and **teach** millions through other educational outreach efforts, like _Imprimis_ and our K-12 education programs.

And every supporter like you really matters to us because we refuse EVERY PENNY of taxpayer funding--even indirectly in the form of federal or state student loans and grants.

We must educate ourselves. Looking back at the Christians of the past, we can see how they faced the overpowering might of an empire and set an example for us to follow.

So, will you help us reach and teach people just like you--urging them to enroll in **" Ancient Christianity"**?

Using this secure link, you can enroll and chip in to offset our development and promotional costs with a tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, or any amount.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoneofco14nrs31pjpraokgoqaauhmbct5ctd8t8_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdh66ob2c5h2bs)
**
Together, we can secure the blessings of civil and religious liberty for the next generation of Americans--so they don't have to live through even stranger times than the ones we live in today.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z169493g1qesqa1kmc6so279s36b7one5qir7ds8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8p30c1j66pb246h22sh2s8i66o76cdh66ob2c5h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2i2gq5nj2nlkujsoe3284qljleil6i861bjof6o_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdh66ob2c5h2bs)_

name: Elizabeth BeShears, AFC
subject: Should teachers unions be in charge of education?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children
body:
In 2021, Randi Weingarten, President of the American Federation for Teachers, said this...

| | | ****
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666050%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mrLouaGORHeyEddMDVoE9Q&sysid=1)
---
| | Friend, **_In 2021,_** Randi Weingarten, President of the American Federation for Teachers, said this... **“**** _Parents claim they have the right to shape their kids’ school curriculum. They don’t.”_** Since then, Weingarten has continued to signal that teachers unions should have the ultimate say on education decisions, **not parents.**
That’s why we’re reaching out to get your opinion on this issue. **Who should have the final say over children’s education: parents or teachers unions?**
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666051%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lCl6VagZoFeX5MB%2b0DQXUg&sysid=1)
---
| | Since 2020, Randi Weingarten has been actively involved and responsible in keeping public schools closed, but even worse, she’s worked to sabotage the school choice movement wherever she can. **She’s left children behind, and parents without options.** Friend, do you think she really has the best interests of parents, students, or even teachers in mind? **Take our poll and let us know your thoughts:** **<[RESPOND NOW](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666052%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wlC1Bxu3dxfPrkRrxiP1tg&sysid=1)>** Thank you, Elizabeth BeShears American Federation for Children

name: ICYMI News
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
I’ve always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

| This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbqmmgcb30n0f1trli4dv1rfcqr6gp88leb1s1f0_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdh61oj2c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:**

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcqmhu9qqshic4jhv52dsi8ehoahs8eg23kkoa5o_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdh61oj2c3h2bs)**
I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWt9tz7DNq

Hillsdale College

Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey
on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWt9tz7DNq

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Friend,

Your participation in Hillsdale
College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is
requested.

Your response will only take a few
minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and
the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the
proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court
differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the
bench.

Do you agree that the role of the
Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and
NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?

YES

NO

Even worse, progressives dismayed by
recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with
additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put
it in a Boston Globe op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to
a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by
four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you
today...

What is your opinion about the Supreme
Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me
using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme
Court right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form
effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the
importance of the Constitution to liberty-including the proper
role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution
instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your National
Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61783385:Wt9tz7DNq:m:3:2532013465:1D452561C66AD6124D2C76CCBB834D5E:r

Thank you for your time and
attention-and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty
since 1844

Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI
49242 USA

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Leftist coming for Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
We need to protect Texas if we are going to Secure the Senate. |
Fellow American - did you see this?

A far-left, progressive Democrat just announced that he is running for the U.S. Senate to turn Texas blue, and flip the seat currently held by Senator Ted Cruz.

**Securing the Senate** is more than just adding new Republicans to the Senate, it's also about protecting Republican Senators like Ted Cruz when they are under fire. [**If we want to achieve our dream of a Republican House, Senate, and White House in 2024, we need to support Sen. Cruz now!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61783626:sMsBn7DNw:m:1:877327319:530C719485711AEE6CB0F8135992CF78:r)

Democrat Colin Allred - the man who wants to defeat Ted Cruz - isn't just wrong for Texas, he's dangerous for America. But let's not forget, _Cruz's last far-left opponent shattered fundraising records and lost by less than 3 points!_

Fellow American, I'm concerned that if we don't do whatever we can for Sen. Cruz, Democrat mega-donors will flood Texas, Allred will take this seat, and we'll lose our chance to **Secure the Senate** in 2024.

[**Will you help Sen. Cruz and our fight to Secure the Senate by making a split contribution of $10, $20, or more right now?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61783626:sMsBn7DNw:m:1:877327319:530C719485711AEE6CB0F8135992CF78:r)

| [**SECURE THE SENATE -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61783626:sMsBn7DNw:m:1:877327319:530C719485711AEE6CB0F8135992CF78:r)
---

_Allred wants to change the fabric of our nation for the worse; here are just a sampling of his awful beliefs:_

* _He believes that men should be allowed to play in women's sports._

* _He supports reducing penalties for violent criminals_

* _He's against the Second Amendment and wants to ban law-abiding Americans from owning rifles._

* _He wants a wide-open southern border that would hurt Americans not just in Texas, but across the nation._

His values aren't Texan values or American values, they are far-left progressive Democrat values.

[**Fellow American - help Republicans keep a radical leftist like Allred out of the Senate by making a split contribution today.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61783626:sMsBn7DNw:m:1:877327319:530C719485711AEE6CB0F8135992CF78:r)

With your help today and our support of Sen. Cruz, we can **Secure the Senate**!

Thanks,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61783626:sMsBn7DNw:m:1:877327319:530C719485711AEE6CB0F8135992CF78:r)
Lindsey Graham

[**SECURE THE SENATE -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61783626:sMsBn7DNw:m:1:877327319:530C719485711AEE6CB0F8135992CF78:r)
---

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61783627:sMsBn7DNw:m:1:877327319:530C719485711AEE6CB0F8135992CF78:r)
For text updates from Team Graham, **[click this link to subscribe!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61783627:sMsBn7DNw:m:1:877327319:530C719485711AEE6CB0F8135992CF78:r)**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61783628:sMsBn7DNw:m:1:877327319:530C719485711AEE6CB0F8135992CF78:r)
In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

| [** Support Senator Graham! **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61783628:sMsBn7DNw:m:1:877327319:530C719485711AEE6CB0F8135992CF78:r)

body:

---
| 2 Germans are crushing the market with these powerful hearing aids
---
[](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius have been creating successful businesses since college. Now they lead hear.com, the fastest growing hearing aid company in the world. This is their story.

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they are still big and ugly. However, Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius wanted to change this with **a revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers** formerly from Siemens.

**The result:** A hearing device that packs cutting-edge technology in a design so small, it completely disappears inside the ear. It's called the Horizon Mini by hear.com.
[Check if you qualify](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
[](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
This Horizon Mini comes with smartphone connectivity, allowing you to control the device with your iPhone or Android. In addition, this new device uses a unique algorithm that is clinically proven to deliver better than normal hearing.

Limited no-risk trials now available
[Check if you qualify](http://trk.secureandprosper.)

Now they lead hear.com, the fastest growing hearing aid company in the world. This is their story. Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they are still big and ugly. However, Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius wanted to change this with a revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers formerly from Siemens. The result: A hearing device that packs cutting-edge technology in a design so small, it completely disappears inside the ear. It's called the Horizon Mini by hear.com. This Horizon Mini comes with smartphone connectivity, allowing you to control the device with your iPhone or Android. In addition, this new device uses a unique algorithm that is clinically proven to deliver better than normal hearing. name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Is Trump Jesus?
body:
Jesus & Trump | Christianity & MAGA Ed Kilgore of the New York Intelligencer penned an article accusing myself and Pastors For Trump of presenting Tr
| | |
---
## Jesus & Trump | Christianity & MAGA
---
**Ed Kilgore** of the **New York Intelligencer** penned an article accusing myself and [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21668900.12245.1.0a099dda7ed5c04f8fa96a5e33e909fe) of presenting Trump as Jesus. Here is a portion of the very **_unintelligent_** reporting from **Ed Kilgore** of the **"Intelligencer"** : _"The Oklahoma-based evangelical pastor and businessman Jackson Lahmeyer leads the fledgling Pastors for Trump organization. Lahmeyer told the Guardian it boasts over 7,000 pastors as members and that he will unveil details about its plans on 11 May at the Trump National Doral in Miami, an event Trump will be invited to attend. Lahmeyer ran for the Senate in 2022 with vocal backing from Flynn and Stone.**Pastors for Trump, however, may just be the tip of a Christian nationalist iceberg that conflates the 45th president with Jesus and Christianity with the MAGA cause**."_ To **conflate** means _to merge two or more things together_. **This has to be one the most dishonest and asinine articles to be written in recent mainstream media history, which is saying a lot.** Not one time have I or any other Pastor/Ministry Leader with [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21668900.12246.1.055ede5a101648efd5f2917389714443) ever alluded that **Trump** is anywhere near the level of **Jesus** who is GOD all by Himself. There is only one Savior. His name is **Jesus Christ of Nazareth**. The **slanderous accusations** of the mainstream media everyday, shows you the battle we are in. The most persecuted group in America right now is the Christian community, not the LBTQxyz+3 community. Here is the positive: **The Church always thrives when persecuted!** On Thursday, May 11 at Trump Doral in Miami, [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21668900.12247.1.a25c807cd4f99297712a1f9ce52cee96) will be hosting a LIVE event to pray for **President Trump** and the **United States of America**.
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21668900.12248.1.809b926b26272a83f1e11b22c6034a4c)
---
We have incredible leaders from all over America joining us including **General Michael Flynn,** **Roger Stone** and others...
I want to invite you to join me in Miami for what will be _an incredible evening_.
The event is totally **FREE**. You can RSVP by visiting: [www.pastors4trump.com/doral](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21668900.12249.1.1c8401dda9d45e6e3fd39a1397c1bd1c)
I want thank our Partners for their continued support in the efforts of [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21668900.12250.1.32d13abc2722e5667740131881fdca1d) which is making such a splash the the Luciferian Left is on full attack mode every single day.
I want to ask you to partner with [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21668900.12251.1.f013fa3439925bde742b92a2519de612) as we prepare for the upcoming 2024 Election.
Here is how you can partner with us:
-**Share the recorded Prayer Call** of [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21668900.12252.1.9ebbb1754de9c53b4b5a0cfa299f228a) w/President Trump to friends: [https://youtu.be/zmiV_YxFPOE ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21668900.12253.1.909d4db92f65b33c1c1c3dd2831e4a30)
-**Make a donation to**[Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21668900.12254.1.dfc3cc76ac22cf5692e77fab637f0a85) of $5, $10 or more so that we can reach more Pastors across the country: [https://www.pastors4trump.com/ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=21668900.12255.1.ab77647a160a49ab85b4ce7177cca518)
God Bless America
Thank you,

**"It Is Urgent That All Americans Take Action To Protect Their Retirement Savings Using This Hidden Strategy"**
| | |
Hi, this is Dr. Ron Paul.

Let me be blunt with you.

If you are nearing your retirement age...

**All of the hard-earned money you have put away for your future could now be in danger.**

Why? Because of the worst financial disaster in history is unfolding before our eyes.

Call it the "everything bubble"... call it the "death of the dollar"... call it whatever you want...

But the truth is we are seeing...
* Gas prices at record highs
* Inflation at levels not seen for 40 years

And most Americans are struggling to make ends meet.

Meanwhile, government spending and home prices have **never been higher.** Because both of them are at all-time highs.

Clearly this bubble cannot continue!

And to top this off...

We have a far-left Democrat in the White House who has **targeted retirees multiple times with INCREASED TAXES!**

The question is... do you really believe Biden won't be able to _indirectly_ get your retirement savings?

By _continuing _to print dollars and eventually driving America into hyperinflation?

If this happens, it would be **disastrous for everyone with a stock and dollar-based retirement account!**

But the good news is... _You are not powerless!_

There is one strategy that can protect your retirement savings from...
* Stock crashes
* Inflation
* Biden

name: Al Franken via Blue Amp Action
subject: My friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley is running for Congress in New York’s 19th District — a key district to taking back the House in 2024.
body:
Let’s take this seat, and the House
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T326c17b0-b76d-4f59-95ba-495e419914fe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [__](https://default.salsalabs.org/T73b8813f-8d85-41e1-91a9-c8a043627c80/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hey, it’s Al Franken. My friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley just made a BIG announcement. [**Josh is running for Congress in New York’s 19th District — a key district to taking back the House in 2024.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbb2b78fc-4010-440c-86ff-36c6c66141ca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) He ran for the seat last cycle in his first political race, nearly defeating a 30-year career politician and Republican Marcus Molinaro – losing 50.8% to 49.2% in a district where some Democrats on the ticket lost by more than 6 points. Josh will win this time!
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2f81ec50-b9c4-46c2-b842-aaa2766154e0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Let’s help Josh’s 2024 campaign get off to a great start. **[Will you join me right now by splitting a contribution of $10 or more between Blue Amp Action and Josh’s campaign right now? He’s not taking corporate PAC money and he’s counting on individual supporters like you and me.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T788fe211-15f5-4633-8659-e64b5d146e52/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** This is important to me. And to our nation. Thanks, Al [P.S. I always add a P.S to these letters to make another ask. It’s a cheap tactic but for some reason it works! DONATE HERE.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td50c3009-a6d2-4dba-82fb-ae66d0cd5807/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | or

name: Connor Boyack
subject: Debunking 40 popular political and economic myths
body:
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6e2058a8eb874d8f887c0c99bf297822&_e=2LnqA5q2jf6QGkdWTSeze76m4JIBFFofTN1HlZwUddyPdGvO0OUUVqc0dxq_JkiwXNBhsld41wXhayjTwIA90XPoP63Ml28mnf2KlNBQ_q03K0I_SHb6W90mSZvmGaURpyAosm5oTvm1I0nCwAZR4EG_2WI1VRZu5t-blGLva9V2GOjH7_d4SaKvqFtReO28cbvsON3BFe8Nh89nyJ3q5zdoAIR4hVr---CeV9U2skTPaTVSxQI93rzde0sVlQKW1b4EeEpFHhfG7_iRiT4abB6x7eporjvGwwTZmqq1nso%3D "Tuttle Twins")

Friend,

I've seen some wild stories on the news, but this one still surprises me. CNN called the Tuttle Twins books a _"right-wing children's entertainment complex" and "conservative indoctrination."_

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6e2058a8eb874d8f887c0c99bf297822&_e=2LnqA5q2jf6QGkdWTSeze76m4JIBFFofTN1HlZwUddyPdGvO0OUUVqc0dxq_JkiwXNBhsld41wXhayjTwIA90XPoP63Ml28mnf2KlNBQ_q03K0I_SHb6W90mSZvmGaURe9oyTs-xasfq2HxAUnRD20V7zKYfNJBTnmB4LEwm64M9QMf8XQHpDj3cYLt4zGCuQLbiBTC_s-8YKcpFzjx4ye9M6zq6yMZvxpSX2vD3MUK-AHahB6OYdZd0DlcIIoCV_v-plp82sPBXxr2JC1kHS1winKV6pWyuHGS_gREky_g%3D)

I don't know why the ideas of liberty, free enterprise, and American history are considered _"conservative? "_ These ideas should be important to ALL Americans, regardless of politics.

And these are the lessons our children need to learn if they are going to grow up to be responsible citizens.

My name is Connor Boyack, and I'm the author of the pro-liberty educational series for kids called The Tuttle Twins.
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6e2058a8eb874d8f887c0c99bf297822&_e=2LnqA5q2jf6QGkdWTSeze76m4JIBFFofTN1HlZwUddyPdGvO0OUUVqc0dxq_JkiwXNBhsld41wXhayjTwIA90XPoP63Ml28mnf2KlNBQ_q03K0I_SHb6W90mSZvmGaURxsnMaL2c9RNfJAKj2ZMNQnWczc298UO41iK0Nxq7_ZZ98bl72H9q_rPPb7oHwE4Zk5PjOxMsnwMIkIQenuS80ZPnwowTAMRVYw-J3Hz41obsh_pqk_nkeSnKQZtbZUGMzbJ0uda4q2yT2j3rq4U5iYJyMfmRucMUi1u9YOR_018%3D)
I'll tell you why I felt the need to write The Tuttle Twins in a moment. But first, I want to ask you to help me get these books out to more children. **_My goal is to distribute 10,000 copies of The Tuttle Twins books this month_.**

**Right now, ALL donations are being MATCHED by a generous supporter. Donate today, and you will DOUBLE your impact.**

[Help us introduce more children to these ideas by supporting the Tuttle Twins. Click here to send a copy to a child today >>>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6e2058a8eb874d8f887c0c99bf297822&_e=2LnqA5q2jf6QGkdWTSeze76m4JIBFFofTN1HlZwUddyPdGvO0OUUVqc0dxq_JkiwXNBhsld41wXhayjTwIA90XPoP63Ml28mnf2KlNBQ_q03K0I_SHb6W90mSZvmGaUR4PqCOm1To_-2fFY-RX3lsyiPfxLWclVMQUnAwBFRK-WAS9z3ZRW5xWgH69rkYe3yFrFwKY2J-SblKcmeU1__C78rhKVoxMgPCbpRfT2xkrdntLc6rB6auEU3Y-mi5XyXnWKFNpbSp3PjCMJyPk2J4ExDDEa06xVDIRzQ3iIWs5k%3D)

As a parent, I struggled to find educational material for children about our nation's history and values. _**What I found either A) didn't do a good job of explaining these ideas or B) was just plain boring!**_

I decided that if I couldn't find what I was looking for, then I should try to solve the problem. I teamed up with illustrator, Elijan Stanfield, to create a series of books written to entertain while also educating kids about important values and life lessons.

Once we finished, I had to see if they could pass the final test. I gave them to any parent's harshest critic, my children. And they loved them!

**You would be amazed at how well kids understand and love these ideas when you explain them simply, with fully illustrated, fun stories!**

And other children love them too! So far, we've translated the Tuttle Twins books into 9 languages and distributed over 4 MILLION copies. 1 MILLION copies were distributed last year alone.

**With ALL donations being matched, that means your $10 turns into $20 and helps us give away 2 copies. Your impact can be massive by donating now.**

Can I count on your support to help us distribute another 10,000 copies of The Tuttle Twins? **Click any link below to donate.**

[$10 X 2 = 2 books >>>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6e2058a8eb874d8f887c0c99bf297822&_e=2LnqA5q2jf6QGkdWTSeze76m4JIBFFofTN1HlZwUddyPdGvO0OUUVqc0dxq_JkiwXNBhsld41wXhayjTwIA90XPoP63Ml28mnf2KlNBQ_q03K0I_SHb6W90mSZvmGaURSmZuW1enGRQeId5BdpOyUz1xS2tL2o_hTzUiSKRsUgspCJuG-Ge1aoP4zN_t4o5jQpGcAqUwuTpu1Uv2_hcyE0EUM57f9PAhTTF3myTdoN5-WZ_jIPsvMpCpx8peMM70TpNf-SicrYWLERt5wpFnz8pPRCMnIRewzjoH8zZbXUA%3D)

[Donate Any Amount >>>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6e2058a8eb874d8f887c0c99bf297822&_e=2LnqA5q2jf6QGkdWTSeze76m4JIBFFofTN1HlZwUddyPdGvO0OUUVqc0dxq_JkiwXNBhsld41wXhayjTwIA90XPoP63Ml28mnf2KlNBQ_q03K0I_SHb6W90mSZvmGaURHaOBq1SB8yJKf-TSG_g3N09vIN73ffVTBDM7gxvank-sV6aS8sFzsgxgnwXssa8ovI83vN2aoL0hF0QzVKR6zL2HJp4T2b0ItAkbZzoJGt6UXJTge2sNZA110BLS2sLillka4ajW6QcpDq0ovdLDORKpw-2nUkbwWhsrzXM5d-c%3D)
_The Tuttle Twins teaches children lessons, such as_ :
* Why a **free market** economy is the greatest way to lift people out of poverty and allow people to trade with one another.
* How **property rights** allow us to decide what's best for us and make decisions for our family.
* Why the world is a better place because of **entrepreneurs** who create businesses to help serve us and improve our lives.
* What **socialism** is and why it is so destructive to our freedoms and well-being.
* How **the Golden Rule** is so important to people getting along with one another, no matter where we live, what we look like, or what we believe.
* Why **education is so important** , and why children should be allowed to learn things they are interested in.
* What **true laws** are, and why the government should protect our rights.
* ...and so much more!

**And the best part is that kids LOVE reading the Tuttle Twins books!**

Your generous support helps us put these educational books in the hands of more children.

[Please consider giving $100, $50, or even just $20 today to help us teach children lessons that will last a lifetime. Donate now, and your support will be doubled >>>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6e2058a8eb874d8f887c0c99bf297822&_e=2LnqA5q2jf6QGkdWTSeze76m4JIBFFofTN1HlZwUddyPdGvO0OUUVqc0dxq_JkiwXNBhsld41wXhayjTwIA90XPoP63Ml28mnf2KlNBQ_q03K0I_SHb6W90mSZvmGaURN4-RgYahZGmp_ynRaI73TeNIFpZUYNpUfTiJg99zAuKqiATakoOKjXKohJ5WVhXB4jl0q3Ourli0C1q2TO4z6kYrd7pv3hHOoJR7Ii8Krtjp2Ay8g5LKikLhZdqjDm_DwIMeDnUaXkbax6UwTwZnLn1lx933RDda3yphhMg5jMY%3D)

Thank you,

Connor Boyack
Author, Tuttle Twins
President, Libertas Institute

body:
This is one of my biggest fights yet.

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=991561ac0a2e4c15a07196799f4ab542&_e=gBINVlZGUeuqAOso8G09ZbFSuY-XTIw5nRzS8AP7E426NydTHjWpPcuWUxjraCDPlRw6lAMTs7xclGF85ww-fBwgXAayINv7oJjJMjNk80WE9CKnvH9s8OQkyGJNGS4WAamIWglyGswqB7oleh_cXBofNA2I9dWY6ZCVQK3h7OqGPb7saQrLCeqdfFP-ll5Hwor1hAkUT1VAoTv9PXflcM4LOdAeXSR9yXg0v105nrGZ3QZN8PdGpC4qVR885Ugsjm512rjcLoM9B124oKReyRWpsp8nhlnexqza2pY-CoM%3D)

Fellow Patriot, This is one of my biggest fights yet. Turning Point USA is LEADING THE CHARGE against the World Economic Forum and its radical Great Reset agenda -- and I want to make sure America-loving patriots like YOU know how you can help STOP this dangerous scheme.

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=991561ac0a2e4c15a07196799f4ab542&_e=gBINVlZGUeuqAOso8G09ZbFSuY-XTIw5nRzS8AP7E426NydTHjWpPcuWUxjraCDPlRw6lAMTs7xclGF85ww-fBwgXAayINv7oJjJMjNk80WE9CKnvH9s8OQkyGJNGS4WAamIWglyGswqB7oleh_cXL_vog4XZBWQHeM-aRfWiDKAbacsEc3GegLipKJNRIpl3wh1aJPudKu-diZcm3xd_cH6dyEX67FWtJHXHPqQ8FVf8wtj7cERCOLtQ6IMub3bJ4BSlN1kXz6yHUxH5OGYcLIKEQJo9I1hwyUVf1xAoqU%3D)

I wrote a new book, _The American Response to the Great Reset_ , for YOU, and I want to send it to you RIGHT NOW. [**Please claim YOUR COPY of _The American Response to the Great Reset_. All I'm asking for in an exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT (even just five dollars!) to help Turning Point USA cover the shipping.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=991561ac0a2e4c15a07196799f4ab542&_e=gBINVlZGUeuqAOso8G09ZbFSuY-XTIw5nRzS8AP7E426NydTHjWpPcuWUxjraCDPlRw6lAMTs7xclGF85ww-fBwgXAayINv7oJjJMjNk80WE9CKnvH9s8OQkyGJNGS4WAamIWglyGswqB7oleh_cXCbB4JYdp5TI-lvRSQcvUkCCJNqkZQBWDG8hvEJiEj3HK_y0L8jQfgFEj2R6AFMhwj4rb6HIc6eyFhOYJctnAxvqbEo8JN_rYvrxuiAv0ups3p1nCYUFX4HcSnpG0LeriR13oposTq31WDjdBZ_LSUU%3D)

[Get your book now](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=991561ac0a2e4c15a07196799f4ab542&_e=gBINVlZGUeuqAOso8G09ZbFSuY-XTIw5nRzS8AP7E426NydTHjWpPcuWUxjraCDPlRw6lAMTs7xclGF85ww-fBwgXAayINv7oJjJMjNk80WE9CKnvH9s8OQkyGJNGS4WAamIWglyGswqB7oleh_cXEiDgrXeFxhQWjVbpzznVKl_Y83OlxMdsccUbUcMQBCBKchsk3ORF-bvry-UX75xSX3BpZkxpbQuBsxI1Be47q2gWphFcmOKVPzy09MActXBauU02y8eizJ-LSgubJMqVmbBMMwXfdBUnt6CwUiTWLU%3D)
