## Migrant Crisis Sparks Political Turmoil
Tens of thousands of migrants [are massing at the border](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2O6yAQRp_G7ohghh9TUNwmXW67pQVmnMwKmwizifL2q6Te8vtOc3S-LvMlcuH9-j9uFPpa57h0ftAsjZBeAM4w5rASAeFIQdkJLQI6M96CNCZ6MM5qs6hJZ1TWGb8mtawRpIkjB5CA0kivpFRoT7jYTElP6K1WKZlBS8rcazt9V977jdbyqg9qp6VuYwm33u_HgP8GOA9wjvednscbvUfrvBQa4Ny5FxIaBG8bX1vsXHcRj1f52USqLVMTn3_vh0icaRcrRnDJY5zkBMbaNBlPhJo8gJPkxhby_cml8GHdoOV1i1w-Sv3vQr8BAAD__1-WZak) as the US prepares for the end of Covid-era Title 42, which allowed border officials to reject migrants without processing asylum claims. The surge is creating political turmoil across the nation. In Texas, [Gov. Greg Abbott](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L2O6yAQxfGnsbuxMGCIC4rbuMttt7T4GBJW2FgwGydvv0rqbc9pfvp_XderTTntt_92Q0OxrNZTeuDKJmAzcLHyPpiIyFH0aEZ1EUpwoaf-blBJPc8eJ61ZEChR66hYlJFxr7QTfTKcccEmNo-MjUINwquATl7ErOTo3NRJhiFRqcN3STvdMeZXeWAdfNn6bO5ER-vEv44vHV_O8xxiee54tvff8eUoOVHyreOLda4QwQdvCRsQPm0Deg_eZnClBqwQS_UIk5xgt5TKbjPcfmwNbcMdAh65vDCAw1gqAiXKCJIDPo9UsfXVhONMOaemdCfZbbMpf6j0d7nfAAAA__-ixHMa) has ordered 500 Texas National Guard troops to guard the border and turn back illegal immigrants. In New York, suburban county leaders [threaten to use local police](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L2SpCAUxfGnwexaCIgaEGxi1ptuaPFxVbYRLKDb8e2neuLJTtUvOfX_91ge2gcft7_6QFXXtGhb_RsX2gOdgPGFNU6tiAx5g6qTI5ec8aFvdiVHZ-QkjGMGB4OTYMZZ0a1aikGvw9h4xSjjtKdTR2nHZcutdGjEyCcpOmN6Iig6X1Nu_ycf645ruNMbc2vT0QS113oWwv8QNhM2X9fVrukr4lU-Ttj8KoTNES-4U37CmQI4PEO6y2d7i2BCsk84_JZ1rGBeBQvUPaOuGAtsWRuIt4VD3ymDuT-WdG2ycuflQ_BFDkTQ7dA-_Fyqvxf6DgAA___LpGtN) to block NYC Mayor Eric Adams' plan to bus hundreds of migrants to their towns. And in Washington, even [Democrats are criticizing](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLuOpDAQAL_GZEZ2GwwEDi4hm0svRH400Cc_RsYadv5-pZ108yqpVP8e28NSpHz8tQlN28tmfaMXbmLkYuGgNuiC2REBVYdG6llpBWoau9MATnIawyCXfZB6Aa9mL9FL6XAevICODAhQYhSLFEIq3SuvA7phVosepHMjGwQGaqX2_wvlduIe3-WFtfclddGcrT0vpv4wWBms9333t71OykcrGb9sovxBGazPEsm_GayUEh3VNiqZweooYOZXtClh4O7NA6biq20Xd7iXityVGrDyj88D2hApY1dNeN4UI116YoM4kqX4U9V-n_QdAAD__0nya64) the White House, blaming President Biden for not being better prepared for the end of Title 42.
## DOT Pushes Compensation for Cancelled Flights
The Department of Transportation is preparing new rules [requiring airlines to compensate passengers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L2SrCAUBOCnwQwLQXEICG5iNjfd0OLnOLKFwMKZceftt9x486-7uvrjvt5NiCE9_psDNG55NQ7DC1Y2UaYoFyvvvN4AOIgO9CBvQgou5qnbtbqNlpnNSO9mC8OsZjE5Pxq_KcbUYLugOeOCTUwNjA1C9sJJD3a8CSXHwdqJjAx8wFz7zxwS7rDFd35B7V0-uqh3xNKI-Ef4Qvhynme_5W_7bCFBa5chfAGXUz7ehC8eiql4QEKK1aRWckWDISdaai65Aa3w9QwVLtKoCTVeRdTlo0BqBoG2K-jB02Jag_SA2rqqfTlDjKHJmYzscZgQf_fh33f9BAAA__8dkHIG) for canceled flights or long delays. The payments would come [in addition to regular ticket refunds](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGvmzAUhX-N2YhsX9vAwFApQl1SdahUdULX9oXcyuAITKL8-yee3vi2c74zne_vbbwhJ17nX7hQX6Y8Yij8pFHaWna1hlFXsZ-INEFFvXItONDQ2Oreu0itt9JHJAySlAxoSE80NcraiaDiXksN0spOSanAXSC4SN600DmjvLfCSIpc8nb5n3ktd5rSOz9pu4S8VKm_l_LYBfwQehB6wMdKr_2czrIVDonOxFvilfY64BooJSyc172OlPC9154jrbU_SuGZaa6j1MY76BrtgZQGCGiboJWNptWqMwKGoyzjno8tkIDrkLd_-RDanXShyMci4PozL_QbZ_riHAVc_6DPOWG19fHx4pR4d40wcl6Q0-ef8r3ejwAAAP__jQZ8sw) if the delay is for reasons within the airline's control. The new proposal comes on top of rules [proposed last fall](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFvszAQgOFfA5uRscHA4CHfV7ElrdRIHdGBj-Rag9FxDeq_r9q5-zu8et7Owxko0nq7wIJe5jTAJPTAQddKd8rYweTBz4gGbY6-dK111timzu9-tE0DrQ6zqXVwrcESajPpLjTgLLRzTt5oY3Wtu1Lr0rrCTi7gWLW2c1U5jnVWaQwkiYv3RKvccY5f6YFcTGnJo7-LbHtmT5npM9Mfx1EIwwPjAvyBwrgllp80Mz2w0BRxz0x_wUM9PV_VC6ct7RDV__QZg-oTT6hOxJFW3JUk9SrAov4hrTd1TozqyrDuGzCukrMP20Ex0u6arNK3BSj-bsnfSt8BAAD__7qOa3Q) to force airlines to be more transparent about ancillary fees charged for services such as checking baggage. It's likely to take years to implement the new regulations, if approved.
## White House War on Appliances Hits Dishwashers
The Biden administration [proposed new rules](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvhCAYQH8Nbhj8ENSBoQvbde1oED6VBsEAPXL_vrnO3V_yXt7XY30YH3w8Ps2Fqu5pNbb6J65MULZQ4Ct0Tu2IgLxDNciZSw58Et2prHDWsREYDjhNViw4j3betw1GQDG7zitgwJlgy8DYwGXPrXS4jTNf5DhsmyAjQ-dryv138rGeuIdXemLubbq6oM5a70L4BwFNQLfW-mbK6eNRU6z-wvLmCOiIrRDQbxkBfZkXAS0J6M07jBQj5uNFHd6VZgxoChZ653Sngo7mn4C0BFNO2kwloLus3N18CL7IiYzsuIwPf0H1_z-_AQAA___MaWfI) that would cut water and energy use limits for Americans' dishwashers well below current levels. The new rules are part of the government's [continuing war against traditional appliance](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7lu6zAQQNGvoToZ5HCTChavUefXphS4DK0JuAgy4cB_HyR16ltcnI_7fvdUqD3--4pu5L77OOiFO9czX2eQO0zJZURAOaETZpFGgrR6OlxIynqNNoNA1CaImJbVB7Ui6GCtncgBB8k1XwXnQpqbjCZhUItcjRIhaKY4Jhr9un12auPAXN79hdct9joVd4xxPpn8x2BjsA2q-BMYbAa0WqxlsGHD6_GeE57-GhXbmDFnioQtvuejV5z9eRbyLeKTwTZdLp1fVAo9jWWKP6qn8nsbf-O_AwAA__8XMVsk)s it considers too inefficient, such as gas ranges and air conditioners. The Dept. of Energy has also targeted [crackdowns on washers, dryers, and refrigerators](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1yqzAQQOGngU7M6te4UHEbd75tSkagxWxGSIxWNsnbZ5w6_VecOR_36R4oUX78Dzv6tpYpLI1eOIEVcBVKT6qPfkVUqHv00o3aaaUvtt_8aEY0q0IX0azaGgPWgpEoI0iDMvbkFSgNFq4SQGo36MVFnM2or87IebadAYzUSh0-C-W24Zq-ywvrsJS9T35r7eBO_-vUrVO38zyHtXzNT6aMzG_TqdtREjVa-A1CFeE4EoW8IIul5Eb5iSxmiphFiDtlUTFhYGSR8RT1mZBFJN7OwBtW7quPx0kpEbtLZ-CxB0q_Ne3vOT8BAAD___0waRM) in the coming months.
➤ **GOP leaders** will meet with President Biden today to try to resolve the debt crisis. The House has already passed a bill to raise the limit but only with spending cuts, and Democrats have refused to negotiate on any cuts. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD3ToyAURn8NdtfBi2IsLLaxy7ZbOnxcIhuQDGCc_Pt3TP02T_M055x_9_WufPD746-KNFeXVmWqf9PKB-AToFixsbMjQhINzZ28CSlQjEOzzai1VnKUY2-kk91A42DJ0OQMYtdp2fgZOQo-8KnjvBOyFUZa0v1NTLLvtB5Yz8n6mnL7P_m9buTCJ70ptybFJsxbra_CxB-GC8PlPM8201Epl-tnuESVn1QLw-W4RntLO0RjVK7bB5SPoDOpJxwFLOkKhr6qUKrabXIOLDl1hAom--ILhJRigYsZLv0bw6XJs32dPgRf5Mh6_ojKhy9e_b3WTwAAAP___MhshQ)) ➤ **Robert Kennedy Jr.** says he blames the CIA for the assassination of his uncle, President John F. Kennedy, in Dallas in 1963. "The evidence is overwhelming that the CIA was involved in the murder and in the cover-up," Kennedy said in a bombshell statement during a radio interview in New York. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2O6yAUhJ8Gd0THhx_HBcVt3OW2W1pgDjFZDBGgrPL2K2-x1TbTzGj06fu4rTcbU8z3__Yg00NZ7dbji1ZQHGaOYsXBm0CEJAYyo74KLVBMatiNU0EiqQ1p8rPWWgYHwUtQMFm4TtsQDQIKUDCPAKPQF7FpT05exazl6JxiEsjHXurlUWLuO4X0Li-ql60cQzJ778_GxD-GC8Mlv5-l9bNiuJzHDBdQZ0wMl1oc1c4_KWfyb_6o3CV7UONbtDyUyh9lzzz8DmxrtrWYbY8lM1yGavzzK6YUm56YhPthY_rh6H9r-Q4AAP__HPljFw)) ➤ **Democratic operatives** in Florida are recruiting NBA talent to take down Rick Scott. Dismayed with the chances of a typical candidate winning in DeSantis country, Democrats are looking to the built-in name recognition of former all-stars Dwayne Wade or Grant Hill. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L2O3CAUQOGnwR0W5s92QZHG3aRNaWG4Ht8EwwiuBs3bR7v11qc5-v489ofHhPn529_g6Cy7D4Rv2IXhYuVS7XKI7gSQoAZwk12UVVLNZrjcsujltEGsZvLBwCHWeV4BDPhwaDWfAzoppBJGrJMQk7KjCjbCoRe1Wj0dh2FaQEQqdfxbMNMFZ_qUN9QxlHtI7iJ6NaZ-MbkxufXex3yEDL19dSa3V0lIGBqTmxRSc0gQCEtmcntWn4lfmBKP3X8y8O4j8Ah3CdVT4w2yJ-BnKhWj5xXDP95CIeI1ZL8oLaahuvjqmBI2OzMtnrfH9L1GP0v9DwAA__8gO2vZ)) ➤ **Oklahoma Gov.** Kevin Stitt vetoed a bill to fund the state’s public broadcasting system. If not overridden, the veto means PBS programming will go dark in Oklahoma this year. Stitt said the state’s public TV network was outdated and its shows were indoctrinating children. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz71u7CAUBOCnwR0rOAfwUlDcxt3eNqXFz8EmwWZjo43y9pFTp57RN5q3x_zwpZZ9-e83cj232cdeXjQLzYXlgDMMyWUiIBzISXNHg4CjHlaXlfJmvCfAQMZGlXM0NspxxJiRpBqKAwEotLBSCInmhtEkCuqO1igZgmZKUCq9Hbf3Vva-Uq7f7UXHLbZtqG7t_Xky_MdgYjAl8qmWna6QwXTRDCahGUzPcPL2Uf3aNs-XS9jbwesS-ieXgBq1lXAVh8Ol51eptZxmZEosmy_1d63_ff4nAAD__0rJWFY))

Tens of thousands of migrants are massing at the border as the US prepares for the end of Covid-era Title 42, which allowed border officials to reject migrants without processing asylum claims. | | | | | | Tuesday, May 09, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! Today we’re covering the turmoil at the Mexican border, Robert Kennedy’s assertion that the CIA killed JFK, and the world’s largest private collection of jewelry. Want to stay informed throughout the day? and stay in touch. | Migrant Crisis Sparks Political Turmoil Tens of thousands of migrants as the US prepares for the end of Covid-era Title 42, which allowed border officials to reject migrants without processing asylum claims. The surge is creating political turmoil across the nation. In Texas, has ordered 500 Texas National Guard troops to guard the border and turn back illegal immigrants. In New York, suburban county leaders to block NYC Mayor Eric Adams' plan to bus hundreds of migrants to their towns. And in Washington, even the White House, blaming President Biden for not being better prepared for the end of Title 42. DOT Pushes Compensation for Cancelled Flights The Department of Transportation is preparing new rules for canceled flights or long delays. The payments would come if the delay is for reasons within the airline's control. The new proposal comes on top of rules to force airlines to be more transparent about ancillary fees charged for services such as checking baggage. It's likely to take years to implement the new regulations, if approved. White House War on Appliances Hits Dishwashers The Biden administration that would cut water and energy use limits for Americans' dishwashers well below current levels. The new rules are part of the government's it considers too inefficient, such as gas ranges and air conditioners. The Dept. of Energy has also targeted in the coming months. ➤ GOP leaders will meet with President Biden today to try to resolve the debt crisis. The House has already passed a bill to raise the limit but only with spending cuts, and Democrats have refused to negotiate on any cuts. name: Shift WA
subject: [FWD] QUICK POLL: Who is your pick for governor?
body:
Friends,

We had a big response to our poll asking people to give us their pick for Governor in 2024. So we decided to extend the poll and give people another opportunity to respond before releasing the results!

Last week, Jay Inslee announced that he would not seek re-election. That news comes as a major relief given his extreme (and extremely expensive) green agenda, his record-setting tax-and-spend schemes, his years-long abuse of power during the pandemic, and many more unfortunate policies.

We want to hear from our readers on who they would like to see as our state's next governor. Here are some of the names (in alphabetical order) that have been featured in the media since Inslee's long-awaited retirement announcement:

1. Semi Bird (R), Richland School Board
2. Bob Ferguson (D), Attorney General of WA
3. Hilary Franz (D), Public Lands Commissioner of WA
4. Raul Garcia (R), Doctor/Former Gubernatorial Candidate
5. Mark Mullet (D), State Senator (Issaquah)
6. Jim Walsh (R), State Representative (Aberdeen)
7. J.T. Wilcox (R), State Representative (Yelm)
8. Other (give us your pick!)

Simply click on the link below and let us know your choice.

[**TAKE THE POLL**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61784540:s_vo97DN7:m:1:2610672541:3F1CD38B14F1D482177ED06CCB1645CE:r)

Thank you,

The Shift WA Team
Begin forwarded message:
We want to hear from our readers on who they would like to see as our state's next governor! Take a quick moment to let us know your pick. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61784541:s_vo97DN7:m:1:2610672541:3F1CD38B14F1D482177ED06CCB1645CE:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends,

We wanted to send a big thank you to everyone who helped us meet our end-of-month fundraising goal! It is thanks to the generous contributions of people like you that we here at Shift WA can continue our work reporting and commenting on what is happening in our state - and holding the Democrats (and media) accountable.

Since our launch a decade ago, we here at Shift WA have worked hard to inform our readers on what Governor Jay Inslee was doing to our state. From his extreme (and extremely expensive) green agenda, to his record-setting tax-and-spend schemes, to his years-long abuse of power during the pandemic, Gov. Inslee has damaged our state to an unprecedented extent. That's why his Monday announcement that he would not seek re-election comes as a major relief.

So, in the spirit of placing a check on one-man rule in our state, we want to hear from our readers on who they would like to see as our state's next governor! Here are some of the names (in alphabetical order) that have been featured in the media since Inslee's long-awaited retirement announcement:

1. Semi Bird (R), Richland School Board
2. Bob Ferguson (D), Attorney General of WA
3. Hillary Franz (D), Public Lands Commissioner of WA
4. Raul Garcia (R), Doctor/Former Gubernatorial Candidate
5. Mark Mullet (D), State Senator (Issaquah)
6. Jim Walsh (R), State Representative (Aberdeen)
7. J.T. Wilcox (R), State Representative (Yelm)
8. Other (give us your pick!)

Simply click on the link below and take a quick moment to let us know your choice.

**[TAKE THE POLL](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61784542:s_vo97DN7:m:1:2610672541:3F1CD38B14F1D482177ED06CCB1645CE:r)**
Thank you,

The Shift WA Team

P.S. To hear more about the newly open 2024 gubernatorial race, Shift WA co-founder Randy Pepple recently joined John Carlson to discuss Gov. Inslee's announcement and possible gubernatorial candidates in 2024\. You can take a listen [here](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61784543:s_vo97DN7:m:1:2610672541:3F1CD38B14F1D482177ED06CCB1645CE:r).

| [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61784544:s_vo97DN7:m:1:2610672541:3F1CD38B14F1D482177ED06CCB1645CE:r)

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). # **WATCH: Dr. Ron Paul Reveals How To Protect Your Retirement Savings (Or ANY Savings) From Washington & Wall Street**
---
### **WATCH: Dr. Ron Paul Reveals How To Protect Your Retirement Savings (Or ANY Savings) From Washington & Wall Street**

| | | Americans are facing a scary situation!
The debt ceiling fiasco playing out in Washington is only the beginning.
Because what started in the 1970s (when Nixon took America off the gold standard) is now coming to a head.

The average American lifestyle is _**more expensive than ever before**_. And **it's going to KEEP getting worse as our dollar loses its purchasing power.**
This should horrify everyone. However, people who will rely on retirement savings within the next twenty years, __should especially be worried!__
_Is there something you can do?_
YES! Dr. Ron Paul shares his recommendations in **[this FREE video](http://trk.libertyledger.)**. Including:
* Why the declining purchasing power of your money is not going to stop. (Not even if Republicans regain power.) But there is _one_ thing you can do to help yourself.
* **The best legal method of "civil disobedience"** to protect your financial freedom from the government's "legalized" theft!
* What he recommends to protect your retirement savings from record inflation and stock market instability

| | Finally, we have a Democratic candidate committed to a two-cycle strategy to unseat Rep. Jack Bergman. We commend all past Democratic candidates for putting up admirable fights and recognize the courage and grit to campaign. It's why so many people are rallying behind Bob again and are encouraged that he has the grit to get up, brush off defeat, and rally the troops for round two. We're unhappy with last year's election results, but it helps drive him. Unfortunately, it's also the story of every one-time candidate in MI01 for over a decade. We cannot risk defeat again with another first-time candidate. We could give a list of all the things that are different this election that makes Bob's approach the most viable - ballot name recognition, solid campaign infrastructure, an early start, building a field team, etc. - but voters need to know if Bob has what it takes to change the tide as a blue dot in a red sea. Unequivocally, we say yes. Bob Lorinser has never been more energized to take on Jack Bergman in the general election. No candidate is more in tune with the district's needs. With two years on the campaign trail and counting, he's met thousands of people across the political spectrum who've shared their stories, struggles, and aspirations. Bob understands this district. [Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula deserve a fighter.](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/50OV-pGT_/c?w=uPilTz7mgOw8AmXY33MdQF99vocg5f6qfeeLnhweSjw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6IjM2YzgzYmFmLTk4MWMtNGVjYS05YzBhLWY5NzRhNTA4NmFhYSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9) Dr. Bob Lorinser will be the kind of Congressman to break through the partisan divide to stand up to lobbyists and corporate shills to ensure that hard-working families get a fair shake. clean_body: That’s the reality on the ground in North Carolina. | = Devastation. Fury. Resolve. That’s the reality on the ground, as communities in North Carolina are currently reeling from the aftermath of yet another disastrous attack on our democracy and voting rights. Radical lawmakers are using every means possible to manipulate maps and undermine our democratic processes, and it's clear that things are only going to get worse unless we take action. = = “Make no mistake, this moment is the result of a concerted effort by too many in the Republican Party to bend -- even break -- the rules of our democracy in order to unfairly gain and then hold onto power.” Eric H. Holder, Jr. It's crucial that we continue to stay engaged and fight for electoral fairness and the protection of our democratic systems in North Carolina and beyond. Our systems of checks and balances are the cornerstones of our democracy and are critical to ensuring that every voice is heard and every vote counts. We’ve been here before. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Gaining momentum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Here’s what the latest polling says among likely Republican Voters...

|
New CBS News Poll
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zm7bsu4mh35o32m8p224tmtjntpdcm856bvfsb2o_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdgm1o36clh2bs)
The latest polling shows that we're TIED with Vice President Mike Pence.

Even the mainstream media is noticing our movement. They are feeling the _**Ramaswamy TSUNAMI.**_

Fellow American, we've got to continue to build this momentum ahead of the August presidential debate.

To secure a prominent spot on the debate stage, we must show strong polling numbers (_which are steadily climbing_) and unique, grassroots donors.

I am on the campaign trail EVERY DAY to meet voters, I am taking the debate to CNN (_bye Don Lemon_) and Chuck Todd. **I could really use your help in securing new donors before May 9th.**

**We've set an aggressive goal of unique donors and only have ONE WEEK to get there.**

I am looking to you to help today. **[Any amount you give will help us achieve this goal- even just $1 or $5.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zede6i4937rl3ut3v1m5d5r6npcc26gddg19hnlo_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdgm1o36clh2bs)**

We cannot afford to let the recent polling momentum we've built teeter out. **[Help however you can, Fellow American.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhnd31b5qp0f27qtuuoer5gfh1amq2s2ki6jcqf8_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdgm1o36clh2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zsnjbt8hsa82r6o3q5q8mhsplvelbammfob5uc80_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdgm1o36clh2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** JOIN THE MOVEMENT -> **](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zr3i1flrfgcn0aejv7g2d8cdm5vpvsqv2qb4ro9g_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdgm1o36clh2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zv8ehi0cvniqufgpkfunmj39jcgojr8vj1kjkkug_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdgm1o36clh2bs)

---

subject: one of the hardest emails I’ve ever had towrite…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
we’ve been through so much together

| |
---
| | | Friend,

As one of my most loyal supporters, I wanted to send you this personal message.

Thanks to you and thousands of other committed patriots, I survived a bruising campaign battle with the Left.

But winning took everything I had and more. My campaign took on some debt, and it is time to pay it off.

I hate to ask this, [**but will you help me finally see this campaign through to the end so I can double down on our Conservative efforts in the Senate?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdn9kdh2qpk38aj16tsflnkiq35th1q4cuescgs0_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdgm1p74cdh2bs "but will you help me finally see this campaign through to the end so I can double down on our Conservative efforts in the Senate?")

**[You have already given so much to our grassroots campaign, but I hope you will help again.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhpjrkcft7sh4oclh3d5nuf9q48e6dpcnsn7pd30_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdgm1p74cdh2bs "You have already given so much to our grassroots campaign, but I hope you will help again.")**

Any amount you can donate would be greatly appreciated - $2 or $200.

Ron Johnson

PS. I've asked my team to send me a list of patriots who contributed to this email. I would be honored to see your name on the list. **[Give HERE.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd3s8kafvn1lmpet89nj8nbvsfkcrs4vtf5tip40_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdgm1p74cdh2bs "Give HERE.")**

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Gen Z can vote out gun-crazy Republicans and stop these massacres, like voters in every other democracy have done.
body:
It happened again, in Allen, TX
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T699df46e-156d-433b-a40d-2fd7a3537a7f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **The massacre in Allen, TX this weekend was horrifying & heartbreaking. Those who lost their lives include a five-year old child, just beginning life.** _I'm not gonna go into statistics. I don't have the heart to. So, just three things:_ **1)** [**_We can stop this any time we elect enough Democrats. Democrats support the measures that have ended these tragedies in every other democracy._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5ebdc6b5-0575-48e9-ae23-bdaf3b1453ef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **2) _Because of the GOP, we aren't safe anywhere._** **_Houses of worship. Malls. Schools. Dance clubs. It's only getting worse._** **3) _Gen Z is, sadly, the school-shooting-drill generation._** **_They've had enough of this, and the past two elections it's been a top issue turning them out in record numbers, breaking electoral records._** **_Voters of Tomorrow has been key to turning out Gen Z in such massive numbers they've upended our electoral landscape. Continuing to swell their presence at the polls is our only way to stop this utter madness._** [**_Will you join a heartbroken Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Voters of Tomorrow?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta8c54fbf-33b6-4eef-b2b5-cf513772463b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **This. Must. End.** Cliff
---

---
| | |
---
|
---

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7cd2b9aa-231b-4e57-8e2e-5e1228e73d07/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
And if we lose Senators like Casey, our Senate majority will crumble...
| There are three things you need to know ASAP about our fight to save our Senate majority:

1️⃣ **We’re defending 23 Senate seats** – and if we lose a single one, our Senate majority will collapse!

2️⃣ **Senator Bob Casey is one of the most vulnerable Democrats up for re-election.** _If he starts slipping in the polls, it’s GAME OVER!_ [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44767?t=6&akid=7588%2E878179%2E87vpcX) 3️⃣ **We’re launching our SWING STATE SENATE FUND** to defend Democrats like Bob Casey and keep the Senate out of MAGA Mitch McConnell’s hands!

[States like Pennsylvania are critical to saving our Senate majority – and if we fall behind now, the MAGA machine will run right over us. Please, don’t let tonight’s deadline pass by: Rush $7 to keep Democrats like Bob Casey soaring ahead! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44767?t=7&akid=7588%2E878179%2E87vpcX) **SWING STATE SENATE FUND: $7,000 || DEADLINE: 11:59 PM** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/44768?t=8&akid=7588%2E878179%2E87vpcX)

subject: Gaining momentum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Here’s what the latest polling says among likely Republican Voters...

|
New CBS News Poll
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbgdmd99ci10g3besoc639bf790oncrumbsa8vv0_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdim8or4cth2bs)
The latest polling shows that we're TIED with Vice President Mike Pence.

Even the mainstream media is noticing our movement. They are feeling the _**RABswamy TSUNAMI.**_

Fellow American, we've got to continue to build this momentum ahead of the August presidential debate.

To secure a prominent spot on the debate stage, we must show strong polling numbers (_which are steadily climbing_) and unique, grassroots donors.

I am on the campaign trail EVERY DAY to meet voters, I am taking the debate to CNN (_bye Don Lemon_) and Chuck Todd. **I could really use your help in securing new donors before May 9th.**

**We've set an aggressive goal of unique donors and only have ONE WEEK to get there.**

I am looking to you to help today. **[Any amount you give will help us achieve this goal- even just $1 or $5.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmpbi6090978s2f7j0j48samf8qks1132f9tclf8_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdim8or4cth2bs)**

| [Chip in $1 ➔](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqjlv9hr7r3v9rstmg8ufsvm73nnje10lnnsn9g8_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdim8or4cth2bs) | | [Chip in $5 ➔](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zl4rc2m3tibjltdkmh13epu7115n391gcibukjhg_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdim8or4cth2bs)

We cannot afford to let the recent polling momentum we've built teeter out. **[Help however you can, Fellow American.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zi49hfadpu2nbvl2u5ukpvbqrkh5agcmfre07ga0_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdim8or4cth2bs)**

Thanks,

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zb5gqrencfpo498spvogfvk7bc3df49r7g6mbe60_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdim8or4cth2bs)
Vivek RABswamy

[** JOIN THE MOVEMENT -> **](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2beqdtfvl6j3g117612vbubmbhml2e490b5hulo_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdim8or4cth2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqudgeqbtii78bs9l6j3ph7cqg3peql71aia0it8_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdim8or4cth2bs)

---|---|---

clean_body: Here’s what the latest polling says among likely Republican Voters... | New CBS News Poll The latest polling shows that we're TIED with Vice President Mike Pence. Even the mainstream media is noticing our movement. They are feeling the RABswamy TSUNAMI. Fellow American, we've got to continue to build this momentum ahead of the August presidential debate. To secure a prominent spot on the debate stage, we must show strong polling numbers (which are steadily climbing) and unique, grassroots donors. I am on the campaign trail EVERY DAY to meet voters, I am taking the debate to CNN (bye Don Lemon) and Chuck Todd. I could really use your help in securing new donors before May 9th. We've set an aggressive goal of unique donors and only have ONE WEEK to get there. I am looking to you to help today. | | | ---|---|--- | | We cannot afford to let the recent polling momentum we've built teeter out. Thanks, Vivek RABswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: Fellow patriot, I need you to read this
body:
| | | Fellow patriot, I was there, in the thick of battle, when some of my best friends paid the ultimate price in service to our great nation.

**This is why Joe Biden’s complete and shameful abdication of his duty to protect and defend the United States makes my blood boil.**

Every time Biden kowtows to Communist China’s latest move to supplant America as the world’s #1 superpower or bows to far-left radicals determined to drive the U.S. economy into the ground, I’m more motivated than _ever_ to stop him.

As Chairman of the House Armed Services Subcommittee on Readiness, I’m using every tool at my disposal to strengthen America’s fighting forces.

I’m determined to ensure our men and women in uniform have what it takes to win on the battlefield.

But while I’m working hard to restore U.S. military readiness and expose the inept Biden regime, I must also redouble fundraising efforts for my reelection campaign.

The Federal Election Commission has raised the maximum contribution limit by _**14%.**_

That means liberal mega-donors like George Soros can pour even more money into defeating America First Republican Congressmen like me.

So, to win reelection here in Florida, I’m going to have to lean on grassroots patriots like you more than ever.

**The richest socialists in America have their eyes laser-focused on Florida.**

They know this is my home and where leaders are born. So please, don’t lay this message aside without first responding to my plea for help. I truly need you on my team.

Whether you can send $5 or $500, please know how thankful I am to have you fighting shoulder-to-shoulder with me for America. **[Mikewaltz.com/securelink](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=c3d41932839d4135bf32337870ddbff4&_e=tW3yZ9wELCetNRRBQssm4H_Fqm6kscgATBfyC4hxcvdDZMdK2cXlMQg_hFLmc9XfcDAN_w1G8CbMygCnOarRjmTykffmPb-nVdNjQbe6c0AEU501WoE_nwOAwygnTjVxnGq7DBd1JUZFjAvfuHV25qXhebOsxqL0fErKm17DAStKNVC-r3GDxvIlZIjGr6BBKwC_NQkD-RgUXMt6HNVFJCNrelkgAF6dY7RReHsqh6BmTCMhuvC8djYoxgIVto1v0_x_WrOYhwkBovWbaVeL9xetquVV2yTJsq58sSDcPC2nUd7a7u7A_BkI7XFV9mVqjJu_QFeyWl6UuKBhAnOYffOZaC_Q_WPpdMQljLk2jspMYjQ87UmswrY0xPncE_08)**

| | Thank you and God bless you! De Oppresso Liber,

name: Colin Allred
subject: I’m running to defeat Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to
defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of
Texas.

Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our
razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of
the most vulnerable Senators in the country!

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18950?t=1001&akid=3221%2E346206%2Ez8qvXB ]That’s why I need you with me: Please, will you split $25 or whatever
you can spare between my campaign and Charles Booker to help reach my
ambitious Launch Week goal of $3,000,000? Every dollar you can spare will
help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas
blue and defend our Senate majority. Please donate now →

CHIP IN →

I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My
mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends
meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers,
coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football
scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I
wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what
I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly
served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas,
where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the
opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the
fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an
11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in
2018.

Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t
be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted
Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz
– when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you.
But I can’t get there alone:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18950?t=1002&akid=3221%2E346206%2Ez8qvXB ]That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding
donor of my campaign on day one. We’re going to need an unprecedented
grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a
part of it. Please, split $25 or whatever you can spare between my
campaign and Charles Booker to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and
defend our Democratic Senate majority →

Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way
to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

Colin Allred

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230509-3221-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3221_346206_z8qvXB&akid=3221%2E346206%2Ez8qvXB

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3221%2E346206%2Ez8qvXB

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

[ ]That’s why I need you with me: Please, will you split $25 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Charles Booker to help reach my ambitious Launch Week goal of $3,000,000? Every dollar you can spare will help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Senate majority. Please donate now → CHIP IN → I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL. But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family. I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018. Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone: [ ]That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign on day one. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $25 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Charles Booker to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority → Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing. Let’s do this, Colin Allred Contribute to Charles Booker:

|
Dear Friends,

We need volunteers to walk with my team and I in the Bon Air Day Parade, this Saturday, May 13. Meet us a little before 9:30am at Bon Air Baptist Church, 2531 Buford Rd. North Chesterfield, VA 23235. Please let us know you are coming with a quick [email response to chris@chaseforva.com.](mailto:chris@chaseforva.com)

Or stop by our office on Saturday to help us go door-to-door.

Please sign-up today. We look forward to seeing you this week.

For God & Country,
Amanda Chase

name: Staff Sgt. Aquilino Gonell
subject: I almost died defending the Capitol on January 6th
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Last month, Mark Lamb declared his candidacy for the U.S. Senate in Arizona against my friend Ruben Gallego.
#

[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.79Akcp&refcode=em230509&t=1&akid=622%2E734936%2ESSKsWs)
---
Peter -
My name is Aquilino Gonell, former U.S. Capitol Police Sergeant, and on January 6, 2021 I almost died defending the Capitol from insurrectionists inspired by far-right leaders like Sheriff Mark Lamb.
Last month, Mark Lamb declared his candidacy for the U.S. Senate in Arizona against my friend Ruben Gallego.
I am writing because inciting, cheering, and making excuses for an attack on our democracy should not be a prerequisite or credential to be in Congress or any position of trusted authority.
But that is part of Mark Lamb’s claim to fame. It’s why he can credibly run for U.S. Senate against Ruben.
So I am personally writing to ask for your help. To help elect Ruben. To help send a message that we cannot allow insurrectionist-cheerleaders to get into the United States Senate.
So please:
[**Can you make today the day you make your first contribution to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for Senate in Arizona?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.79Akcp&refcode=em230509&t=2&akid=622%2E734936%2ESSKsWs)
[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.79Akcp&refcode=em230509&t=3&akid=622%2E734936%2ESSKsWs)
Mark Lamb says the insurrections were “very loving, Christian people.”
I can assure you they were not spreading the word of God as they cursed at law enforcement officers and assaulted us with multiple weapons. I wonder how Christian and loving the invading rioters were as they threatened to shoot me, and said that I, an Army veteran and police officer, should be executed.
I wonder how Christian and loving they were as the attackers pulled me in every direction by my leg and my shield.
But Mark Lamb doesn’t even have the courage to stand up for law enforcement officers injured or killed on duty that day. When asked about us, he said he wasn’t there and couldn’t say what was true or not.
I am going to do everything I can to help elect my friend Ruben Gallego — who also showed extraordinary courage that day. So I am humbly asking:
[**Can you contribute to Ruben Gallego’s campaign for Senate today? Use this link to give whatever you can afford to make sure he defeats Mark Lamb and anyone who runs against him in this race.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.79Akcp&refcode=em230509&t=4&akid=622%2E734936%2ESSKsWs)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1045?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.PGJo9e&refcode=em230509&t=23&akid=622%2E734936%2ESSKsWs)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1046?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.WTNOdd&refcode=em230509&t=24&akid=622%2E734936%2ESSKsWs)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.V9nigw&refcode=em230509&t=25&akid=622%2E734936%2ESSKsWs)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.tGte5p&refcode=em230509&t=26&akid=622%2E734936%2ESSKsWs)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1041?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.Zk4WIo&refcode=em230509&t=27&akid=622%2E734936%2ESSKsWs)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.pt2_oL&refcode=em230509&t=28&akid=622%2E734936%2ESSKsWs)**
---
****
Thank you very much,
Aquilino Gonell

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=622%2E734936%2ESSKsWs). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=30&refcode2=622_734936_SSKsWs&akid=622%2E734936%2ESSKsWs)

name: Tom Fitton
subject: We will be in court today!
body:
You and our other members have helped Judicial Watch take an historic leadership role in forcing states to follow federal election laws that are our last line of defense against voter fraud and corrupt elections.

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

**This afternoon, we will be appearing in the U.S. District Court of the District of Massachusetts for a hearing in the civil rights lawsuit that Judicial Watch filed on behalf of Kari MacRae.**
[And we need your help!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63303&L=21610&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzU/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=5aa811551408ad120183e6df4fd2bad29739563006f1e542f0d1f150cfb0a0fb)
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63303&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Kari MacRae is a high school teacher who was fired in retaliation for posts on social media that predated her employment at Hanover High School.

She was fired over several TikTok posts that were made prior to her hiring at the school. Ms. MacRae, who was also an elected member of the Bourne School Committee, made the posts in her personal capacity as a citizen and candidate for public office.

**The fact is that Kari was fired in retaliation for exercising her First Amendment right to speak on issues of public concern, like Critical Race Theory (CRT) and transgenderism in schools**.

Like all Americans, Kari deserves her day in court and the chance to make her case before a federal grand jury...[and Judicial Watch is in court fighting for her!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63303&L=21610&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzU/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=5aa811551408ad120183e6df4fd2bad29739563006f1e542f0d1f150cfb0a0fb)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63303&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Last year, we won a great settlement victory of another client of ours, in Massachusetts. He was fired from his coaching job in the school district _solely_ because he publicly objected to Critical Race Theory propaganda in his daughter's 7th grade "social sciences" class and to the failure of the school district to inform parents of the change in the content of the curriculum.

We are committed to fighting for the First Amendment rights of all Americans...and while others complain about attacks on conservative free speech...Judicial Watch acts.

And we act where it counts...through the legal system and the courts.

But all our efforts...legal research, investigations, and filing lawsuits...[come with very real price tags attached.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63303&L=21610&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzU/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=5aa811551408ad120183e6df4fd2bad29739563006f1e542f0d1f150cfb0a0fb)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63303&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

As a non-profit organization, we do not charge our clients like Kari MacRae for our services. And when we stand up for our clients in court, we are usually facing the deep pockets of government...whether federal, state or local.

That's why I am hopeful you will help us stand and fight for conservative free speech rights today, _and support all our work on behalf of the rule of law_ , [with a special contribution today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63303&L=21610&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzU/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=5aa811551408ad120183e6df4fd2bad29739563006f1e542f0d1f150cfb0a0fb)

clean_body: You and our other members have helped Judicial Watch take an historic leadership role in forcing states to follow federal election laws that are our last line of defense against voter fraud and corrupt elections. | | | | | | Dear Fellow American, This afternoon, we will be appearing in the U.S. District Court of the District of Massachusetts for a hearing in the civil rights lawsuit that Judicial Watch filed on behalf of Kari MacRae. | Kari MacRae is a high school teacher who was fired in retaliation for posts on social media that predated her employment at Hanover High School. She was fired over several TikTok posts that were made prior to her hiring at the school. Ms. MacRae, who was also an elected member of the Bourne School Committee, made the posts in her personal capacity as a citizen and candidate for public office. The fact is that Kari was fired in retaliation for exercising her First Amendment right to speak on issues of public concern, like Critical Race Theory (CRT) and transgenderism in schools. Like all Americans, Kari deserves her day in court and the chance to make her case before a federal grand jury... Last year, we won a great settlement victory of another client of ours, in Massachusetts. He was fired from his coaching job in the school district solely because he publicly objected to Critical Race Theory propaganda in his daughter's 7th grade "social sciences" class and to the failure of the school district to inform parents of the change in the content of the curriculum. We are committed to fighting for the First Amendment rights of all Americans...and while others complain about attacks on conservative free speech...Judicial Watch acts. And we act where it counts...through the legal system and the courts. But all our efforts...legal research, investigations, and filing lawsuits... As a non-profit organization, we do not charge our clients like Kari MacRae for our services. And when we stand up for our clients in court, we are usually facing the deep pockets of government...whether federal, state or local. This order has been critical in protecting Americans from the dangers of mass illegal immigration. Since its implementation, it has significantly... | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jrforohio/jr-majewski-officially-announces-campaign-to-represent-ohios-9th-district-in-congress-8125029?e=0426928d91)
---
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=b648fc5719&e=0426928d91)
Peter,

In two days, Title 42 will expire, leading to a surge in illegal border crossings. This will cause significant problems for our country, including increased crime rates, fentanyl overdoses, and a drain on government resources.

For those who may not know, Title 42 is a public health order that was adopted by the Trump administration to allow border agents to turn away undocumented immigrants at the border.

**This order has been critical in protecting Americans from the dangers of mass illegal immigration**. Since its implementation, it has significantly decreased the number of illegal border crossings.
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=e0ad39e248&e=0426928d91)
| [JOIN TEAM MAJEWSKI TODAY TO FULLY FUND THE WALL >>>](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=40ac4381d7&e=0426928d91)
---
On Thursday, border officials are anticipating over 13,000 illegal immigrants to cross the border, doubling the daily average. This is unacceptable.

We need leaders in Congress who will put America first and extend Title 42 until we pass a law that fully funds the law and protects the American people from Biden's border crisis.
**If you agree that Title 42 should be extended until we have real measures in place that will secure our border, join Team Majewski today with a generous grassroots donation!

**[**Donate $20.24 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate $6,600 (MAX AMOUNT) >>>
Donate ANY amount to SAVE AMERICA >>>**](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=07f0d26f3a&e=0426928d91)
Under the corrupt Biden regime's open-border policy, we have seen a rapid increase in illegal border crossings. As a result, violent crime rates and fentanyl overdoses have skyrocketed, putting our communities in danger.

Corrupt Marcy Kaptur, _**with her 40-year history of supporting policies that have allowed excessive immigration numbers**_ , has only made the situation worse.

When elected, I pledge to fight for the interests of Americans and work tirelessly to protect our communities from the dangers of mass illegal immigration. We need to take immediate action to secure our borders and ensure that our communities are safe.

[**Can I count on your support, Peter?**](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=c8bdf92356&e=0426928d91)
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=a70139db2d&e=0426928d91)

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: How we can retain our reporters and keep up this critical work:
body:
The Washington Post, NPR, VICE News, and CNN.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=955%2E120351%2E5EHTQL)
The Washington Post, NPR, VICE News, and CNN.
Peter, these are just a few of the media groups who have announced massive layoffs and programming cancellations over the past few months. As these cuts sweep the mainstream media, the US’ information crisis grows deeper — with even more people being left without reliable news sources.
**That means Courier Newsroom’s mission to provide trustworthy, factual local news is more important than ever.**
[**The only way we’re able to retain our talented reporters and keep up this critical work is because of grassroots donors like you, so will you chip in $5 now?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3696?refcode=em-20230509&t=2&akid=955%2E120351%2E5EHTQL)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3696?refcode=em-20230509&t=3&akid=955%2E120351%2E5EHTQL)**
Right now, we have local newsrooms in eight different battleground states. Our on-the-ground reporters focus their coverage on local and state news stories, but they also keep their readers informed on what’s happening at the federal level — and how it will impact their communities.
Their tailored approach to the news fills in the gaps otherwise left by the mainstream media. With the latest layoffs and cuts by major media groups, **we can only expect these gaps to widen.**
[**It’s up to us at Courier Newsroom to pick up the slack and deliver accurate, essential news stories to our readers — but to do that, we need resources. If you believe in our mission, will you chip in $5 today to power our work?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3696?refcode=em-20230509&t=4&akid=955%2E120351%2E5EHTQL)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3696?refcode=em-20230509&t=5&akid=955%2E120351%2E5EHTQL)**
Thanks for your support,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=955_120351_5EHTQL&akid=955%2E120351%2E5EHTQL)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=955%2E120351%2E5EHTQL)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROCA FOR CONGRESS](https://links
body:
| | | [>> Biological Men In Women's Sports? << ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=270ad825d56a49ba87f38e53284ca32a&_m=ab277b8296ef4fee842310424c9a2094&_e=lL01SHXG8-vTbI34PWiFLZUtQOs76NHGsXymQd1uGfeizmH8yWaRyOk_gRlPgXSD_6eOlZROYgn5k9OSMZkcQs567EzHeohMhR8iTh1einDn2a6kZITdjfXvsVsLnwiX98J3uDczv6RpP3XtLMAuomRtQIGpRuH0Z7dD9VTU4XyDbXAzwHk7_twr9TNbuYOFDp_ExzdGM4WPaSyeoOy8zXCA_kg6gkAXNcn5tg-8S6xaBApVSJ3PVvuFMtk1feGw)
---
It's hard for me to see, Peter. After fighting for our right to compete, and the decades that it took to build a strong foundation for women's sports, it's on the precipice of all crumbling down. Transgender women (biological men) have infiltrated our sports and are taking away opportunities from passionate and devoted young women who have worked their entire lives to be successful. To prevent this, House Republicans recently passed a bill protecting the integrity of women's sports, but Joe Biden said he intends to veto it. _**As a woman, and the mother of a young girl who competes in track & field, I know where I stand on this issue and I know it's important to her.**__**⬇️**_
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=270ad825d56a49ba87f38e53284ca32a&_m=ab277b8296ef4fee842310424c9a2094&_e=lL01SHXG8-vTbI34PWiFLZUtQOs76NHGsXymQd1uGfeizmH8yWaRyOk_gRlPgXSD_6eOlZROYgn5k9OSMZkcQs567EzHeohMhR8iTh1einDidZjYfrMZlqyRL3eB95ctgaCy71XitWq0SPwf-X0-2LkpSbJz-xXDEVxkhepOmrUnH4ekJGixaIZ1eKHm0n6B7u6SabIYz5j-2EeUWIxhnnY6TNakERI6_vMzajxQmb-9In1RIOqjrVPVsrLDPSR8)

It's Fine <<](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=270ad825d56a49ba87f38e53284ca32a&_m=ab277b8296ef4fee842310424c9a2094&_e=lL01SHXG8-vTbI34PWiFLZUtQOs76NHGsXymQd1uGfeizmH8yWaRyOk_gRlPgXSD_6eOlZROYgn5k9OSMZkcQs567EzHeohMhR8iTh1einCSkl148wX5JZTtJeceAW_aAJQL1Jsu6WAupEpo6FFyqOdfwntmIBr4tU-wWw64J2tq0WwFsx5-9IHO70dhexBAmyO1ET56vd6_BliB9dBlMSjZYkQfAZHOtpSJfEbQeO9v7VAs8Atc6JerKybxyHnt)

clean_body: | | | It's hard for me to see, Peter. After fighting for our right to compete, and the decades that it took to build a strong foundation for women's sports, it's on the precipice of all crumbling down. Transgender women (biological men) have infiltrated our sports and are taking away opportunities from passionate and devoted young women who have worked their entire lives to be successful. To prevent this, House Republicans recently passed a bill protecting the integrity of women's sports, but Joe Biden said he intends to veto it. As a woman, and the mother of a young girl who competes in track & field, I know where I stand on this issue and I know it's important to her.⬇️ | | I want to know what YOU think. | | I understand this is a polarizing issue, but I know what I believe and I'm not going to back down. As your voice in Congress, I will ensure that young women like my daughter have fair competition and opportunities in sports. Help me give women the RIGHT TO WIN in women's sports. Thank you, Mariela Roca | | | | | | |

Soon, the 12 Republicans running against Andy will be narrowed down to just ONE, and he'll be up against a coordinated campaign that is dead set on undoing the progress Andy's made for Kentucky. We're using these final seven days of the primary to prepare for what's to come – and the best way you can help is by becoming a monthly donor to Andy's campaign. Knowing we can count on your support every month helps us better plan our budget, hire staff, and be prepared to take on whichever opponent wins on May 16. = = = Analysts are calling the Kentucky gubernatorial race the "most competitive race of 2023." And they're right. Andy's opponents and their outside spending allies have already spent millions during the primary. The general election will bring millions more flowing into Kentucky to try to defeat Andy. With the general election starting next week, we need your help to be prepared for the next tough and expensive phase of this campaign. = = = Thanks! Team Beshear | | P.S. name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666099%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Mkf3S9dyPWfkLICNb%2bQy5g&sysid=1)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation’s mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666090%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UdhcHJTypRZz2L2Dq%2f9x9w&sysid=1)

**_Now I’ll share my story_ ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to \- is heartbreaking.

We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I’ve dealt with racism... _**I’ve even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666091%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1ol5klCBiOJMvUhNQTbkeQ&sysid=1)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I’m not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT’s efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666092%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WXIOtOZZ2oC%2fCfLEgufbMQ&sysid=1)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666093%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JNHW5VjbWe0XioGc5qqRgw&sysid=1)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666094%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9QUA%2b27cQrxRdU2M%2fpAlpQ&sysid=1)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666005%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iiu7HPlaH7flsXeOaaNcZw&sysid=1)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT’s events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666006%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JhK4I%2b64%2fgtahTjio6hh9Q&sysid=1)

What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666007%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Iq%2fdsIh2rviyRcysHX01tQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666008%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=i1%2bPXk3umSuXU2PN0s3kxQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666009%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n6RVpI1dWkK%2fIwAkVCWvvg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666000%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Q8HuEbCA23IlvyUkyNB6jQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666001%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OdFjQPBrzVE9OfO3nh8MaA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666002%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nna29hopmUKyz1LYBM2hng&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666003%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=akT5LpUBkvdCRgMNh6CHwA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666004%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wDeGXW5STiaBcPWxKSoqjA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666015%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MqM5fEEDHAy6Zi8QvihIJg&sysid=1)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666016%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4mDwVA%2b41cmBLv%2bG4LRR2A&sysid=1)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

American Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666017%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0Bwlzk%2b1FI9ZpUdOIClCwg&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c666018%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oqdFpnKVUrbRLIDKZ5tdIQ&sysid=1)_

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: They’re riled up.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
#
Ever heard the expression, “A hit dog will holler,” Derek?
That’s the GOP right now.
They voted to gut Veterans benefits in their debt ceiling bill. They could’ve carved out protections for Veterans, but they didn’t.
They could’ve voted on a new budget that didn’t cut billions of dollars from the VA and slash millions of outpatient visits, but they didn’t.
They could’ve done the **bare minimum** to honor our commitment to our Veterans, but they didn't.
And we called them on it. We’ve been leading the charge all week, calling them out on this disgraceful vote. And boy, they ain’t happy.
They’re taking to Twitter, to FOX News, even to the House floor trying to explain away this vote. But what’s done is done, and this isn’t gonna wash off.
**[Donate $5 and help us keep this going. We’re firing on all cylinders right now, and we’re not going to stop. Not until every Republican who voted to gut the benefits our Veterans earned pays a price for it at the ballot box.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-may23.LTpcsd&refcode=em230509-1-15&t=1&akid=8416%2E3013755%2EUOCaP5)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | [CONTRIBUTE $5](https://act.votevets.org/go/2933?c0=vv-pac-em-may23.MyC60s&amount=5&refcode=em230509-1-15&t=2&akid=8416%2E3013755%2EUOCaP5)**
---
****
| [CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://act.votevets.org/go/2933?c0=vv-pac-em-may23.MyC60s&refcode=em230509-1-15&t=3&akid=8416%2E3013755%2EUOCaP5)**
---
****
We’ve got a ton of momentum behind us.
Don’t let it slip away.
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

name: State Representative Ryan Mackenzie
subject: Join Me In Helping Local Republicans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Citizens for Mackenzie
body:
Ryan Mackenzie needs your help supporting our local candidates!
| | | | | | [ ](http://click.cmpgnr.com/click/gmnz-69w0b-4n4iu-eamt5g7/)
---
| | | | Dear Friends,
Primary Election Day is just a week away – TUESDAY, MAY 16TH – and all across our community there are strong, conservative Republican candidates who need your help.
Whether it is candidates for School Board or Judge, or anything in between, I can tell you that the grassroots support of people like us is key to them winning both next week and in November.
Why is their winning so important? Because while I am standing up in Harrisburg to the radical extremists who want to defund-the-police, take away parents’ rights, and make abortion on- demand, these are the leaders who will be standing strong at the local level fighting the same kinds of battles. That’s why I have been traveling across our area giving my time to the Republicans who will fight for our core values of smaller government, greater opportunity, and personal freedom.
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | | |
---
|
---
As I have been giving time and energy to help these candidates, one thing is clear: they can all benefit from more volunteers over this last week approaching Election Day. Please take just a moment to click on the link below if you can give just a little bit of time to helping a worthy local Republican. Simply leave your name, phone number and email - and what municipality you live in - and I will forward it to the local candidate in your area to contact you.
---
| [Volunteer](http://click.cmpgnr.com/click/gmnz-69w0b-4n4iv-eamt5g8/)
---
| | | You can help in so many ways, from knocking on doors to calling your neighbors to working the polls for part of Election Day. If you can give any time – even just 30 minutes – I know these local candidates would really appreciate it and it would make a big difference to helping Republicans win this fall.
Please take just a moment to join me in the fight for our conservative values. Sign-up to help your local Republican candidates!
Thank you,
---
|
---
Ryan Mackenzie

---
| [Volunteer](http://click.cmpgnr.com/click/gmnz-69w0b-4n4iw-eamt5g9/)
---
|
---

---

---
