Friend,

**[I'm writing to ask you to donate to Nicole Malliotakis' Congressional Campaign. Nicole has a proven track record of producing real, effective results for the people of New York.](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=76526efd286d482d85435a419bcff89a&_e=fOiu2LBRF1OMr5r2yQFcjzYtRKnugZYAh5xnlKwzsaB2aEbYtMxiiM7VvuaS2MOC_ikxLgBT_T1kmMjBOPJfHCYtCYDLIq402WGAknW_B9i2PCEV89buNjSJRxIVsaXxeRfWGZgL7OLTJAgPRnY2X6iyepEN4tWHEavc7InGoYdmZIrtWwXiFcrRY0F0tZIlq4k3VmWaMP2YzLWGk-aX3DpRdk1pwZMVYOy4qiVsZnFqVRyKRkZ24X48tplBuVUHIm4iftFH7bTdIsAXWtlL2Sz93cLvo_f5WQSjfsNpXg2jk9FavVhop0JbJ66-Rq5m21jVys2gxeZiyvOv_mZTWGwItPTXTt-LON8x27ZlWtI-8RfSvfqpCvaWtA1Z7iiZVxMohY-C8RlDMmIFQy1acpN1qWaYKEY03zDFwTnj1cZW1zmvoWCCZUL9XQR65FL1WVIRMTHVR-qI18C6E9AeYBppRrycAyFkyH4yxekoqsmHpqCAqWaPs4tO9uRJkd88)**

The truth is that we have all seen the results of this administration--**our economy is in shambles, our infrastructure is crumbling, and our national security is at risk.** We need someone who can step up and lead us through these challenging times, someone who will fight for us every day until we fix what's wrong with this country.

Nicole's vision for America is one where we put America FIRST, not last. If that means taking on the President of the United States, then that's exactly what we're going to do. She knows how important it is for conservatives like us--people who care about our communities, families, and country--to stay engaged in politics so we can keep making real change happen!

Your support is crucial to Nicole's campaign. Every donation counts and will go a long way towards helping us Save New York, Save America, and Save our Conservative Values. **[Please consider making a contribution today.](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=76526efd286d482d85435a419bcff89a&_e=fOiu2LBRF1OMr5r2yQFcjzYtRKnugZYAh5xnlKwzsaB2aEbYtMxiiM7VvuaS2MOC_ikxLgBT_T1kmMjBOPJfHCYtCYDLIq402WGAknW_B9i2PCEV89buNjSJRxIVsaXxeRfWGZgL7OLTJAgPRnY2X6iyepEN4tWHEavc7InGoYdmZIrtWwXiFcrRY0F0tZIlq4k3VmWaMP2YzLWGk-aX3DpRdk1pwZMVYOy4qiVsZnFqVRyKRkZ24X48tplBuVUHIm4iftFH7bTdIsAXWtlL2Sz93cLvo_f5WQSjfsNpXg2jk9FavVhop0JbJ66-Rq5m21jVys2gxeZiyvOv_mZTWGwItPTXTt-LON8x27ZlWtI2AYw0q8n773C5RUpbzP1Y0HE_i7wIsaS9DYvu-jYjwYo3Hdk04HT8ZwoNhGRDeirFAAirIerY6WoIF_4kBCN7q75XtCrPi93-EG9puNuBzHQ6J_oOhszABLdqtavYjzj68v8HC84d_DujcbS8EEGz)**

We need someone who can step up and lead us through these challenging times, someone who will fight for us every day until we fix what's wrong with this country. Nicole's vision for America is one where we put America FIRST, not last. If that means taking on the President of the United States, then that's exactly what we're going to do. She knows how important it is for conservatives like us--people who care about our communities, families, and country--to stay engaged in politics so we can keep making real change happen! body:
**[_Peter, news just broke that Trump’s Postmaster General DeJoy will increase the price of stamps AGAIN. I’ve had enough: This Trump mega-donor MUST be ousted once and for all before he can do any more damage. That’s why I’m rallying my top supporters from coast to coast to STOP DeJoy from harming the USPS and save the Post Office from unfair partisanship. Will you rush in $14 before midnight to support my fight to rescue the USPS? >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63031535/405355294/-1810142053?refcode=20230509_em_fr_b1_raja_30_v2&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmUxMmUyZi03YWVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ljHwgshiv16zWguPZDkZJo-52xHwn5n6Jl2nP9UD2-I=)** Peter, I need you to make a choice in this crucial moment: \-- Either we let Trump’s Postmaster General HARM the Post Office and continue his MASSIVE mail slowdowns [**\-- Or we can RISE UP in UNPRECEDENTED numbers, SAVE the USPS, and show DeJoy we will NEVER let him harm our beloved Post Office.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63031536/405355295/-1810142053?refcode=20230509_em_fr_b1_raja_30_v2&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZmUxMmUyZi03YWVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ljHwgshiv16zWguPZDkZJo-52xHwn5n6Jl2nP9UD2-I=) **[_I’m fighting tirelessly in Congress to STOP DeJoy and SAVE our Post Office from his destructive agenda. But I can’t do this alone. That’s why I’m asking you to chip in $14 before midnight to help me restore the future of the USPS. subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsVg6X7DzN

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest
Christians.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osVg6X7DzN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Friend,

I've
always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted
to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced
persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But,
beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early
Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed.
I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the
complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap
in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and
spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To
uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest
online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May
23.

In this
course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first
four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways
the new faith transformed the Roman world.

You can
watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today
using the secure link below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61784204:sVg6X7DzN:m:3:2532013465:6EBB4E233469EDECA47ABB3D357AB5AD:r

I hope
you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the
first Christians.

Best
regards,

Kyle
Murnen, '09
Director
of Online Learning
Hillsdale
College

name: Rachel Patterson, Evergreen Action
subject: Friend's invited: Save your spot for our webinar on May 15
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
How Tribal governments and communities can tap into IRA funding
| | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4539?t=2&akid=13316%2E53494%2E30HtDX)
---
Friend,
Thanks to the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA), billions of dollars are being pumped into the U.S. economy to propel the clean energy transition. Now Tribal governments and Indigenous organizations have the opportunity to take full advantage of these funds to deliver the maximum benefits to their communities. IRA programs have the power to cut pollution, lower energy costs, create jobs, and more.
That's why I'm sitting down with NDN Collective Director of Policy and Advocacy **Jade Begay** , Institute for Tribal Environmental Professionals Co-Director **Nikki Cooley** , Evergreen Executive Director **Lena Moffitt** , and Rosebud Sioux Indigenous Tribe Leader **Wizipan Little Elk** , who serves as the principal deputy assistant secretary of Indian Affairs at the Department of the Interior.
We're going to discuss how Tribal governments and Indigenous communities can tap into this historic funding and advance climate solutions.
**You don't want to miss this, Friend.[RSVP to save your seat for the live virtual event on Monday, May 15 at 2 p.m. ET / 11 a.m. PT.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4539?t=3&akid=13316%2E53494%2E30HtDX)

**
[](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4539?t=4&akid=13316%2E53494%2E30HtDX)
[RSVP NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4539?t=5&akid=13316%2E53494%2E30HtDX)
---
The IRA is the biggest climate bill in American history, but much of its success hinges upon engagement at the local level. **Though Indigenous communities have historically contributed the least to climate change, they are among the most affected by its consequences.** And that's why this conversation is so important—we'll be sharing how the IRA specifically supports Tribal communities, how to apply for this funding, and the way this money can be used to maximize impact.
[RSVP NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4539?t=6&akid=13316%2E53494%2E30HtDX)
---
See you online,
Rachel Patterson
Deputy Policy Director
Evergreen Action
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=13316%2E53494%2E30HtDX). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

name: Greg Casar
subject: Attacks on immigrants from all sides
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREG CASAR FOR CONGRESS]
body:
Peter,

This is a BIG week in immigration news. On Thursday, Title 42—the Trump-era immigration policy that has shuttered our asylum system for three years—is set to expire.

Title 42 has been a bottleneck on our asylum system, blocking millions of desperate families from claiming their legal right to asylum—both under President Trump and President Biden.

But with the policy finally expiring, the Texas border is bracing for an increase in asylum seekers—and I have no doubt that means an increase in anti-immigrant rhetoric too. It’s so important to lift up pro-immigrant voices and focus on practical solutions to this humanitarian crisis.

That’s why I teamed up with Rep. Joaquin Castro to expedite more than $38 million in funding to meet the humanitarian needs of migrant families through the San Antonio Migrant Resource Center. This funding will help connect migrants with their loved ones and get them the support they need to build their futures.

Peter, can you chip in $20 now to support Team Casar as we fight for REAL solutions on immigration? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-20230509] As a pro-immigrant voice in Texas, we need all the support we can get.

[data:image/png;base64,] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-20230509]

[https://secure.ngpvan.com/_6LIZ0rgfESe_H5KeL4Hiw2]

[https://secure.ngpvan.com/_6LIZ0rgfESe_H5KeL4Hiw2]

Chip In » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-20230509]

Title 42 isn’t the only immigration issue we expect news on this week—the attacks are coming from all sides.

*
In
Congress:
Republicans
are
pushing
legislation
that
would
bring
back
many
of
Trump’s
anti-immigrant
policies
and
further
diminish
our
asylum
system.

*
In
the
Texas
Legislature:
Republicans
are
pushing
bills
that
would
create
a
vigilante
bounty
hunter
force
to
terrorize
immigrants
and
throw
billions
more
in
taxpayer
money
on
a
“Texas
border
wall.”

Peter, as the proud son of immigrants, I know that criminalizing immigrants and militarizing the border has done nothing to fix the problem. Rather than doubling down on failed cruelty, we should be investing in real solutions.

Help our team fight back against anti-immigrant rhetoric and legislation and deliver REAL solutions on immigration—chip in $20 now to support us in this fight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-20230509]

Thank you,

-Greg

[https://lh4.googleusercontent.com/Z5PE866HImTLFn2ZdS0S_PxbOLF8he1HH3pn_e04lJb0fsbrcW2Hp2rrW6MIeAHXTNp0-rp9qz280n8jqu1cV1jdPoZowI4bIYJ4SU7HpjvOXLhq4ZJgJxPaic-CtgeZZ_9TarL3B99afIlSFgAPIQ]

Greg Casar
Congressman
Texas Congressional District 35

name: The EMILYs List Team
subject: UPDATE: Standing with our trans friends, family, and community members 💙
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
|
---
| | Important update on anti-trans legislation >> [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63033317/405361788/66865039?sourceid=1050037&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjkxNjVkNy03Y2VlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b--9qnX5Ow6gSnqCc4RTWare76aKvMNZei_kClavQJk=&emci=9a8e614c-e3ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=a29165d7-7cee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter — we emailed you a few weeks ago to tell you about the slew of hateful anti-transgender bills Republicans have introduced this year, and we wanted to reach out with an important update.

**Unfortunately, the GOP is _escalating_ its attacks on trans people.** Florida just expanded its "Don't Say Gay or Trans" law to censor LGBTQ+ students and teachers. Oklahoma signed a trans health care ban into law last week. And a state representative in Colorado recently called out dangerous anti-trans rhetoric used against her and other members of the trans community by a Republican on the House floor.

This isn't a threat — these attacks are real, and they're endangering the trans community. EMILYs List candidates are working to defend the rights of trans people in states across the country. **We firmly believe that everyone should have the right to make decisions about their own bodies and express themselves freely.** **We need your help to get GOP extremists out of office and elect women who will defend our rights. Will you donate any amount now to elect Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot?** **[https://emilyslist.org/go/Elect-Women-This-May](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63033318/405361789/66865039?sourceid=1050037&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjkxNjVkNy03Y2VlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b--9qnX5Ow6gSnqCc4RTWare76aKvMNZei_kClavQJk=&emci=9a8e614c-e3ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=a29165d7-7cee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** Thank you,

the EMILYs List team _\----------Original Message---------
From: EMILYs List
Sent: Tues., Apr. 11, 2023_ [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63033319/405361790/66865039?sourceid=1050037&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjkxNjVkNy03Y2VlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b--9qnX5Ow6gSnqCc4RTWare76aKvMNZei_kClavQJk=&emci=9a8e614c-e3ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=a29165d7-7cee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Republicans nationwide are attacking the civil rights of trans people. Make no mistake: this is yet another way the GOP is trying to destroy our bodily autonomy — and we won't stand for it.

**We can replace Republican bigots with Democratic pro-choice women nationwide. Please, donate today to help elect women who will PROTECT our rights:**

**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63033320/405361791/66865039?sourceid=1050037&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjkxNjVkNy03Y2VlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b--9qnX5Ow6gSnqCc4RTWare76aKvMNZei_kClavQJk=&emci=9a8e614c-e3ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=a29165d7-7cee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** **Peter, we are appalled by the Republicans' recent attacks on our trans family and friends.**

Since the beginning of 2023 alone, at least __492 bills__ have been introduced across 47 states with the intent to block trans people from accessing health care, education, or legal recognition, and even from simply _existing_ in public spaces without fear. Of these nearly 500 pieces of legislation, 36 have been successfully passed and 363 remain active in their respective legislative chambers as of April 10.

After years of calculated attacks on our reproductive freedom, it should come as no surprise that GOP lawmakers are using bigotry, inflammatory rhetoric, and dangerous (and baseless) fear tactics to justify anti-trans legislation. It's all the same agenda: to destroy our bodily autonomy.

[**So please, stand with EMILYs List and donate now to support Democratic pro-choice candidates who will FIGHT BACK against Republican extremism.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63033321/405361792/66865039?sourceid=1050037&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjkxNjVkNy03Y2VlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b--9qnX5Ow6gSnqCc4RTWare76aKvMNZei_kClavQJk=&emci=9a8e614c-e3ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=a29165d7-7cee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)

So here's the good news, Peter: EMILYs List-endorsed women like Gov. **Gretchen Whitmer** in Michigan, Reps. **Jennifer McClellan (VA-04)** and **Jahana Hayes (CT-05)** , and Sens. **Mazie Hirono (HI)** and **Elizabeth Warren (MA)** are already fighting back. From enshrining trans civil rights to providing legal means to pursue protections from discrimination, Democratic pro-choice women _know_ how essential it is to protect choice and autonomy — and that's why we need their voices in office now more than ever. ****EMILYs List endorses Democratic pro-choice candidates who will fight for _all_ of us. Donate to help elect and reelect candidates who can stop vicious GOP extremism in its tracks:**

clean_body: | | | Important update on anti-trans legislation >> Peter — we emailed you a few weeks ago to tell you about the slew of hateful anti-transgender bills Republicans have introduced this year, and we wanted to reach out with an important update. Unfortunately, the GOP is escalating its attacks on trans people. Florida just expanded its "Don't Say Gay or Trans" law to censor LGBTQ+ students and teachers. Oklahoma signed a trans health care ban into law last week. And a state representative in Colorado recently called out dangerous anti-trans rhetoric used against her and other members of the trans community by a Republican on the House floor. This isn't a threat — these attacks are real, and they're endangering the trans community. EMILYs List candidates are working to defend the rights of trans people in states across the country. We firmly believe that everyone should have the right to make decisions about their own bodies and express themselves freely. We need your help to get GOP extremists out of office and elect women who will defend our rights. Will you donate any amount now to elect Democratic pro-choice women up and down the ballot? Thank you, the EMILYs List team \----------Original Message--------- From: EMILYs List Sent: Tues., Apr. 11, 2023 Republicans nationwide are attacking the civil rights of trans people. Make no mistake: this is yet another way the GOP is trying to destroy our bodily autonomy — and we won't stand for it. We can replace Republican bigots with Democratic pro-choice women nationwide. Please, donate today to help elect women who will PROTECT our rights: Peter, we are appalled by the Republicans' recent attacks on our trans family and friends. Since the beginning of 2023 alone, at least 492 bills have been introduced across 47 states with the intent to block trans people from accessing health care, education, or legal recognition, and even from simply existing in public spaces without fear. Of these nearly 500 pieces of legislation, 36 have been successfully passed and 363 remain active in their respective legislative chambers as of April 10. After years of calculated attacks on our reproductive freedom, it should come as no surprise that GOP lawmakers are using bigotry, inflammatory rhetoric, and dangerous (and baseless) fear tactics to justify anti-trans legislation. It's all the same agenda: to destroy our bodily autonomy. So here's the good news, Peter: EMILYs List-endorsed women like Gov. Gretchen Whitmer in Michigan, Reps. Jennifer McClellan (VA-04) and Jahana Hayes (CT-05) , and Sens. Mazie Hirono (HI) and Elizabeth Warren (MA) are already fighting back. From enshrining trans civil rights to providing legal means to pursue protections from discrimination, Democratic pro-choice women know how essential it is to protect choice and autonomy — and that's why we need their voices in office now more than ever. **EMILYs List endorses Democratic pro-choice candidates who will fight for all of us. Donate to help elect and reelect candidates who can stop vicious GOP extremism in its tracks: Thank you, the EMILYs List team ****** | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. body:
As a former high school English teacher, I know how tough the job can be. As a parent with two kids in school, I'm taking the teacher shortage crisis in Michigan very seriously. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63033636/405363394/1201310784?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230509teacherapp_cb_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDZjODA3NWMtN2VlZS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7ZG08vUNao1WfaYshOqLB-toZ-tdxcvhlaxgKvmjDfQ=&emci=1dd467a4-65ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=06c8075c-7eee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9697413)

Hey Peter, As a former high school English teacher, I know how tough the job can be. This Teacher Appreciation Week, I want to honor the incredible contributions of all the teachers out there. Teachers like Lemmer Elementary's Nanette Hanson – who is the first Upper Peninsula teacher in 30 years to be named Michigan Teacher of the Year! I also want to acknowledge that teachers can only take on so much. And, we’ve asked them to take on a lot, particularly over the last decade. Overloaded classrooms, remote learning during a global pandemic, online disinformation – it's overwhelming. And all those challenges coupled with low pay and long hours is causing too many talented teachers to leave the profession altogether. **Michigan is on the cusp of a teacher shortage crisis. Burnout and turnover is high, and open positions are going unfilled.** Schools are trying to fill the gaps by bringing in uncertified, long-term substitutes. But that’s not what I want for my daughters – I don’t think it’s what any of us want for our kids. Meanwhile, our congressman isn’t doing a thing about it. How would he even know what teachers and students in Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula need when he lives in Louisiana? **[Michigan’s teachers, students, and families deserve better. As a parent and former teacher, I’ll fight for them every day in Congress. But to get there, I need your help. Pitch in your first donation of $5 (or whatever you can) – every bit helps me build a strong campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63033637/405363399/-621152178?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230509teacherapp_cb_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDZjODA3NWMtN2VlZS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7ZG08vUNao1WfaYshOqLB-toZ-tdxcvhlaxgKvmjDfQ=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

How would he even know what teachers and students in Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula need when he lives in Louisiana? = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = If you’re an educator reading this, thank you, truly, for all you do for your students. For the rest of us, let’s go fight for all the amazing teachers out there. Thank you, Callie Barr Candidate Michigan’s 1st Congressional District | Callie Barr is a 5th-generation Michigander, advocate for veterans, and lawyer. She’s running to take on extremism and do-nothing politicians in D.C. that are leaving rural America behind. Can you help send Callie to Congress by donating today? | = | Paid for by Callie Barr for Congress Callie Barr for Congress PO Box 6921 Traverse City, MI 49696 United States Callie Barr is an advocate for veterans and spouse to a former U.S. Marine. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: ONE WEEK: Pennsylvania’s Democratic state house majority is on the line in these special elections! MAGA Republicans are eager to reverse their losses last November and tie Democratic Gov. Josh Shapiro’s hands.
body:
What happens in Pennsylvania doesn’t stay there.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T48fac441-9da7-4398-8182-08aae0ec7b7c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Folks, You Can Make A Huge Difference Today.** _In ONE WEEK there'll be 2 special elections in Pennsylvania to determine if we hold onto our state house majority--to protect democracy, abortion rights & enact gun safety--or lose it to a seditionist Republicans hostile to these essential rights._ [**_We have a 101-100 margin in the state house. Yet, if we lose both races, we'll be down 102-101. WE CAN'T LET THAT HAPPEN._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T408949dc-12c6-41dc-907c-a72b4e110aac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**There are 13 million Pennsylvanians who will suffer if we do. Worse yet, what happens in Pennsylvania doesn't stay there--guns, air & water pollution, economic panics (see Silicon Valley Bank) don't recognize state lines. Tens of millions more Americans live in surrounding states like New York, Ohio and New Jersey. subject: Your car WILL be stolen

body:
This reaction to vehicle theft in NYC is ABSOLUTELY INSANE...| | | Peter, Vehicle thefts are soaring in New York City, and you won’t believe what the mayor told the people of New York to do about it... **The mayor told New Yorkers to start putting Apple Airtags in your car so you have a hope of tracking your vehicle when it is, inevitably, stolen.**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5d9e81afbf0d4b8bb434c18e32fce87a&_e=-wTfWnG9c5wbY-YlbzZgcu0sPbttcy7kYbhMEdYoU13xEJQGovvnv8kgN4DVSiCFRYH_3tZDlwYLIn2M3GO21zjKvaVKZVQ75r4ZcQAJt8Kuviu6Gv1Ft3aSGe-RenyARb0okGYNCJ5KR4jCT0opBqm7iATBgwDW8WzTFkuKPJOIy_TyzCy9-MTQK7jRsVv1J0HWhiJYc1PmmK0VhY_oWcZu3yCxIbQnZahzpp1HwP4GBGogS5oW3InHa8wheP6Va0d83PxA1y53BrhHaEFc3ZrKngsvpECIpslnruNnW3yUSK5YIF2SegFfcNXi_NCVp9sxlL-CwZx3A3clZ0TxDwiiUm6WX014OF_k6AQW9tWAmGZBfPII-8fHOdBtUC-YpTTUlJR3hsXvp52Go5_VE1rxz1ca6H_WKu19cShdelU%3D)
---
**We have a better idea:****_How about we start PROSECUTING car theft again?_** _[**It’s no surprise that NYC is represented by Soros-funded prosecutors like Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=5d9e81afbf0d4b8bb434c18e32fce87a&_e=-wTfWnG9c5wbY-YlbzZgcu0sPbttcy7kYbhMEdYoU13xEJQGovvnv8kgN4DVSiCFRYH_3tZDlwYLIn2M3GO21zjKvaVKZVQ75r4ZcQAJt8Kuviu6Gv1Ft3aSGe-RenyARb0okGYNCJ5KR4jCT0opBqm7iATBgwDW8WzTFkuKPJOIy_TyzCy9-MTQK7jRsVv1J0HWhiJYc1PmmK0VhY_oWcZu3yCxIbQnZahzpp1HwP4GBGogS5oW3InHa8wheP6Va0d83PxA1y53BrhHaEFc3SpStK2G78pDzA75Oa27nu5GrizyhXPdcFCvkxPTLC8G0MPq3TMdLQLOe-utDYMPCDI12-yxPBMokgFBro9BytbFNBQi_-ESG8_zQlpeXudbsaq4Ls0BUtiI3l-wcuCzCrxuoukpAaIzJfNlckXeeMk%3D)_ Since his election, vehicle thefts have increased by 32%, which is not even counting the recent surge in car thefts. It’s what happens when you’re soft on crime: You get MORE of it. The Radical Left is so desperate to pin rising crime on ANYTHING other than their own refusal to prosecute that the mayor promised to “hold accountable” Kia and Hyundai for making their cars too easy to steal. _Excuse us?_ **When your car is stolen, our justice system’s response shouldn’t be “that Kia was asking for it.”** Rising crime rates are no accident. They are **exactly** what happens when radical prosecutors who refuse to prosecute crime take office. And the first step to restoring order in our cities is removing radical prosecutors from office. Fair Courts America is the _only_ organization taking a direct stand against George Soros’ prosecutors. We are taking him on, **head-to-head** , but we can't do it without the support of patriots like yourself. **Peter, please contribute to the Stop George Soros Fund here: **

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Ancient Christianity: a new free course from Hillsdale
body:
I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

| | | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9c9883987b8d45468041866d338d0040&_e=s0gLVpSX1yngnV6h_6BgVXKfPpjd2C3I-xzZz2cp-ddBBZ2CTbiMncqYzHBeUV84b4RgPI3ChFM4-qAtjiKs-oxOI5lyFa6RCTNFE636yfR0zD8P18bSkJIqWuq2KidVWrtQ3CNBvFYDlnZFV6FH7CIsR9yE-Roe2it_cJpPaD5Az26hY50i9iw9W_ed5jylk5W8oysmgxxxtfPkIVAwwTQfxoorpiC6DqlKjm5QYDCoICVjCmWCjXuXixyfA1jbNMYQXH2jmsFsYsth3NmEjxUq9KmFj0VvppdS_aCIxSbt1wzXMFPlJHvYlzVZv9CO9CJyWr6GmnjZL_7Hzh3zkCzmXQRCso_GSw7wh4S_m3s9r4iw8BzYuZ8ipAmLVuR0ISaGoyOdCQU81S5oTeK4125U4VbCT_yk6QURVCtnAFlODcRAazGXTYYhMV5qXBew)
---
| | Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our newest online course, "Ancient Christianity," which we'll release on May 23.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

**You can watch the video trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

** [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9c9883987b8d45468041866d338d0040&_e=s0gLVpSX1yngnV6h_6BgVXKfPpjd2C3I-xzZz2cp-ddBBZ2CTbiMncqYzHBeUV84b4RgPI3ChFM4-qAtjiKs-oxOI5lyFa6RCTNFE636yfR0zD8P18bSkJIqWuq2KidVWrtQ3CNBvFYDlnZFV6FH7CIsR9yE-Roe2it_cJpPaD5Az26hY50i9iw9W_ed5jylk5W8oysmgxxxtfPkIVAwwTQfxoorpiC6DqlKjm5QYDCoICVjCmWCjXuXixyfA1jbNMYQXH2jmsFsYsth3NmEj2N-F5TXmSrLeX97EpqktEBaTJXdAADRGiLyaWjOkjsai_36cj5iRwGWR8m8zV82yM6V0Kh-05ZKcwP7MoemsByOTuOkcLj9x-E7_LdzRA9FEJa89kvhhicayNcAmQhF7LwZIqhqXgbvJIejDMf-FGQekMvII2jnlwn7zPL8Uahy)
[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/ancient-christianity/prereg**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=9c9883987b8d45468041866d338d0040&_e=s0gLVpSX1yngnV6h_6BgVXKfPpjd2C3I-xzZz2cp-ddBBZ2CTbiMncqYzHBeUV84b4RgPI3ChFM4-qAtjiKs-oxOI5lyFa6RCTNFE636yfR0zD8P18bSkJIqWuq2KidVWrtQ3CNBvFYDlnZFV6FH7CIsR9yE-Roe2it_cJpPaD5Az26hY50i9iw9W_ed5jylk5W8oysmgxxxtfPkIVAwwTQfxoorpiC6DqlKjm5QYDCoICVjCmWCjXuXixyfA1jbNMYQXH2jmsFsYsth3NmEj3b03ZeVrwxnOnEM2dWGooIrq1UD9YxZu05SnxD8ceEvMe_ogU-gF9nK9n5_diTsKxutPPgYhU3J1d65v37yRuxDaXztG_oa72FQA5uw2pieOvrSWQHRbNjtkFlrUXBfAQpG2R7Wgohp785O7rY_bRcowlxbgXofBeFUJHQzlmWm)

I hope you join us in learning more about the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: We only have two options
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots.

| |
---
| | |
Biden just renewed his push for mass amnesty of millions of illegal immigrants - including the more than 5 MILLION he's ushered in under his administration.

As Speaker of the House, I need to know. Where do you stand on Biden's Mass-Amnesty plan?

Let’s show Kevin McCarthy that we won’t support the MAGA agenda.
#
Peter,
Last week, I gave a speech on the Senate floor and called out Republican Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy for threatening the first ever federal debt default in U.S. history.
MAGA Republicans are demanding that Democrats go along with the GOP’s radical budget proposal that would slash funding for first responders and veterans, put affordable health care for families at risk, and remove access to food assistance for more than one million Americans.
Forcing a decision between defaulting on the federal debt and slashing programs and services that millions of Americans rely on is no choice at all. MAGA Republicans want to hold the country hostage until they get their way, regardless of who gets hurt by their reckless actions.

| | _**Joe Biden tried to silence me.**_ _**_The DC establishment tried to silence me._**_

_**And, Mitch McConnell kicked me off a committee.**_

**[But I kept going - because I know that when I speak out against the DC establishment, I’m speaking for patriots like you.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=d78e7b2b58c2462b8f545ce5bc526052&_e=jC8GLFSdSUEpM5F00tNT5fG5ngKUcCEFFEyj_1G1bkIg5v3K-zF7HaWf82xwE_F8CmlnZA_44h8_ydNBndKcmNoQvnObkX9bkqC729ZfXoSdJj7Mh7RvZeNimBjzqSPp7bOdFrr9IBuX-ddDSYrYiIyHULioHUd1VJ09iElmBNTpYhgERO0cCFdizGJY-x1aWBquP1yXlJ7dcmb3C4yXS9n7Q899SpVkuabgONHjsDULPBKZDQtHHMitZuEcnTV22XY1yngBrMvAiVL66EsCHuc1zyFgmZnPijZk7Ti9ckFmoQ_tYceU59IE2mJuW6gh4ifzv7mXs1A52CFpxdKD3_xMeCWeP6oPz9cd5No0I_IOcLcv2dFhzL7jpDdLy1KbEonjloX0ZM7iYMjx47XIHg%3D%3D) **
---
[**TAKE ON THE ESTABLISHMENT NOW**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=d78e7b2b58c2462b8f545ce5bc526052&_e=jC8GLFSdSUEpM5F00tNT5fG5ngKUcCEFFEyj_1G1bkIg5v3K-zF7HaWf82xwE_F8CmlnZA_44h8_ydNBndKcmNoQvnObkX9bkqC729ZfXoSdJj7Mh7RvZeNimBjzqSPp7bOdFrr9IBuX-ddDSYrYiIyHULioHUd1VJ09iElmBNTpYhgERO0cCFdizGJY-x1aWBquP1yXlJ7dcmb3C4yXS9n7Q899SpVkuabgONHjsDULPBKZDQtHHMitZuEcnTV2Fo4x6tCY_eT-CFU07zL8TYphIPW96_DKJtZMWscGOfnqm6XtPuqHf8Q-xM_3SLqCWo6kSVqUFFDMsgR1BmShUM3Oj1lk9CIdcxTdwwg5t7KLuvYN38Q0QzoPXVsMwbJLSuRSTyI671IdivQdzpzAKQ%3D%3D)
---
They call me the least popular man in Washington, and it’s a title I’m proud to have.

Here’s the truth: to be popular in this town, you have to go along with their business as usual.
**I can’t do that when my constituents demand BETTER. **

My job is to represent YOU, not the DC swamp.

My 2024 Senate race is going to be fueled by patriots like you, and that means that every single dollar counts.

[**Join our team now so we can continue to take on the swamp and RESCUE AMERICA from business as usual in Washington!**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=d78e7b2b58c2462b8f545ce5bc526052&_e=jC8GLFSdSUEpM5F00tNT5fG5ngKUcCEFFEyj_1G1bkIg5v3K-zF7HaWf82xwE_F8CmlnZA_44h8_ydNBndKcmNoQvnObkX9bkqC729ZfXoSdJj7Mh7RvZeNimBjzqSPp7bOdFrr9IBuX-ddDSYrYiIyHULioHUd1VJ09iElmBNTpYhgERO0cCFdizGJY-x1aWBquP1yXlJ7dcmb3C4yXS9n7Q899SpVkuabgONHjsDULPBKZDQtHHMitZuEcnTV2WRVRi3MXqb3u0k7jBPBTBEjkRioimBq0qwcFUJBuWVguCa6jvDnWKRyBBCPEp5dGZLJ0dZomhHXGUKJ6nqolUjLd1xrt0dmH9gCrHDq-3ROTFEC2uMGyFs2Q1Wa1Y5otm9TZrISSs5HAXcuZ5Y7UuA%3D%3D)

subject: If CNN insists on giving Trump air time, they MUST call out his lies! (Sign your name)
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Tell CNN: "Don't let Trump get away with lies on live TV. Call him a liar to his face."](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0006e064-0ba5-437e-8915-cc91b4822b5f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T105ab3d7-0007-4b3a-b744-ef676b040d15/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | CNN is holding a presidential town hall this week, which will [feature Trump](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf4256e4e-eeb5-4739-b47d-9c2bb709e2ef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) answering questions from Republican and undecided voters in New Hampshire. And no doubt, lying. **CNN needs to call him out on these lies in real time. To his face. In plain words that he understands.** CNN shouldn't be holding this event at all, given all the damage Trump has done. But if they're going to do it, and give him air time, they need to push back hard on his lies -- and call them lies. Not weasel words ("difference of opinion", "disagreement", etc). And they need to do it in real time. [**Add your name, and tell CNN: "Don't let Trump get away with lies on live TV. Call him a liar to his face."**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T79db2cdf-ca67-4db7-9cbc-8c9840ad2a60/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: Thrown in jail by the woke mob?
body:
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1gg778a451f3g1esrapqrqa9e3lltog88s7bu5g_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdhm2oj2cth2bs)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs4e93khrju0ol1for8q88fkfil6lncmuv18m1d8_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdhm2oj2cth2bs) [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7cfss9k7olnelenh2gqeo6t7jknq1aog8022oh0_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdhm2oj2cth2bs)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael 's_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0uc3qsnoienh85g5udlo6jnp9ldn5l5mv81asq0_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdhm2oj2cth2bs)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1dj3ive02um2up3hu64vk5qmoj33l2bm12p9tvg_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdhm2oj2cth2bs)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" \- and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpdsfb4ten59mjdrejqos60k3gp2jebcc09mgs9g_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdhm2oj2cth2bs)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7ohagqopc9psqv05emm7ifum5e535jh4ihl6agg_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdhm2oj2cth2bs)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z30rhjc3va4r5r1e9vbnucrgl9jf3817a1a9066g_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdhm2oj2cth2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z92s79tttb96obuablphiho7uajpchgbf5077m20_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdhm2oj2cth2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo98u264rl2tj6hd8k4a5s8jq8ml6q1hstv1b01o_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdhm2oj2cth2bs)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9cl83drpveefs0o00lbshqtd7cgdbrlsjjubd08_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdhm2oj2cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4chg68p34cth2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znff4ghpcrn12nd2fhbr9vogq7tif80lr2gi7358_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdhm2oj2cth2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z53rb84b9623ljpdm1pvcuja6irtd0npqk81qlk0_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdhm2oj2cth238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.
But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.
I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.
Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:
**[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $5 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Letitia James' to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63037364/405377826/1337142349?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1081-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGFkNjNkNy04OGVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aqUVhs5QbeelB7QtDM7bxhY1vhoUO5-J8-ioW8jDBZM=)**
Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

Colin Allred
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/0_qpfjczsECwUbLJUZRAAg2?unsubscribedata=jE6NBmEQEOg4BzbRWZT%2FVAVD%2Bgg2IHcngsizUUae8czIHDna4dVuFvH3lyuySSMnQN%2FjdxzlZ%2BtFiJwbOai7lOCQ3OoM9SXbASZzePI7ofRwKGwZ%2F72qDilqj1Rgdan5iI6gHY0jFj6YtFSchpsGWdyxMS2BxKEMt8i5LoVlgNHl3Ro75It%2B2GL7pNOtxfkK9xxOJ7JsIZzUd1wfiFQzNr9Zj2BdMgxIfH2no6l9GNJ2Dd7w1uyIDnpM9X1oVNS4YIPheXUxd4kXs9KbmaxOioB6Awt%2BmO%2Bx9O%2F0WCrsWnG4iacn2whbF1739MfqsFnAod%2Bh%2F0v4Z5xiwe7CdQlZcCe0lU%2Br9CSGhKu4dySqzEVg%2FBB24ZbVlWhlvkZOavPoj%2F722WB3FHUw3%2FaycH%2F3x17jCiQfcLk5OniFzRjCveK6%2B527odMtvlbEpQQywWRG) James for NY

name: Michelle Vallejo
subject: Just checking in

Every promise I made to the people of Iowa, I fulfilled as your President, and even beyond my promises, I got Farmers 28 Billion Dollars from China, money that was unthinkable by anyone else. | | We all have that one teacher who made a powerful difference in our lives. Whether it was a single lesson they taught, or some special attention they gave us so we could succeed, teachers change lives. **Education has always been a doorway to success in this country and our teachers have always been at the forefront of our success as a nation. And today is no different.** **What has changed is _the safety of our schools._** In the wake of countless school shootings, we are reminded that far too often our schools are not safe, and **teachers who should be teaching math, history, science, and literature are instead asked to teach kids how to fight back or hide if their school has an active shooter.** We all hear calls to arm teachers. We hear calls to turn schools into hardened bunkers. These are not the way to make our teachers, students, and communities safe. **We can make our schools safer by passing commonsense gun reforms,** like universal background checks. During this teacher appreciation week, would you **[join me in calling for safe schools by signing this petition today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63038096/405380866/1884635016?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWIzYjRmMS04YWVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=He7eYIrG6TUgV22WoecIzWnfnJmVIknGu7ccGQVF1-c=&emci=357ee544-e4ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=15b3b4f1-8aee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9494239)** [Sign Now ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63038097/405380867/1884635016?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWIzYjRmMS04YWVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=He7eYIrG6TUgV22WoecIzWnfnJmVIknGu7ccGQVF1-c=&emci=357ee544-e4ed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=15b3b4f1-8aee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9494239) I am thankful for all our hard working teachers who shape our kids futures. We know what's going to happen. Illegal immigration is going to surge, on top of how much it's already surged since Biden took office.

In fact, it's already happening. Here's just one headline about El Paso.

"If you’re able, I’m asking you to chip in just $3 right now. " Your support ensures we have the resources to fight back and win. In service, Tom Cotton | | Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any Service Branch. These emails are the most important means of keeping our supporters updated, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails, "click here", or to unsubscribe, "click here".

subject: Bumping this petition for you

body:
We’re falling behind on our signature goal
| Hey there,

Last week, we sent you our urgent petition asking you to stand with Montana State Rep. Zooey Zephyr after the MAGA GOP viciously expelled her.

**We just checked our progress, and your signature is missing!**

Republicans across the country have made it abundantly clear that they’ll do whatever it takes to remove ANYONE they disagree with.

We won’t sit by a second longer while our democracy is under attack — but we need 1,392 more Democrats to help us hit our signature goal. [**PLEASE, CLICK HERE OR USE THE BUTTON BELOW TO SIGN OUR URGENT PETITION »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-w-zephyr/?source=VPP_20230509_EMPET_E2_T0_NS&t=6&akid=7610%2E878179%2ElqWJ5H) | [**SIGN NOW: I WILLIS, STAND WITH REP. ZOOEY ZEPHYR AGAINST MAGA ATTACKS »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-w-zephyr/?source=VPP_20230509_EMPET_E2_T0_NS&t=7&akid=7610%2E878179%2ElqWJ5H)
---
Thanks so much!

_Team Voter Protection Project_

**– FORWARDED MESSAGE –**

From: ⚠️ URGENT (via VPP)
To: Willis
Subject: Republicans EXPELLED Rep. Zooey Zephyr:
Preheader: From Tennessee to Montana, Republicans are attacking our democracy
**The Montana House EXPELLED Rep. Zephyr for standing up for equality –** _and now she’s fighting back!_
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-w-zephyr/?source=VPP_20230509_EMPET_E2_T0_NS&t=8&akid=7610%2E878179%2ElqWJ5H)
[**URGENT ⚠️ SIGN OUR PETITION TO STAND WITH REP. ZEPHYR NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-w-zephyr/?source=VPP_20230509_EMPET_E2_T0_NS&t=9&akid=7610%2E878179%2ElqWJ5H)
---
****25,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED BY MIDNIGHT****
**From Oklahoma to Tennessee to Montana, Republicans have been silencing duly elected State Representatives.**

_These are bold authoritarian attacks on our democracy — and if we don’t take an IMMEDIATE stand, the GOP will remove ANYONE they don’t agree with!_

_Voting rights, abortion rights, and common sense gun legislation are all on the chopping block!_

[**We REFUSE to let far-right Republicans get away with these attacks on our democracy. That’s why we’re launching an urgent petition to stand with Rep. Zooey Zephyr – please sign now! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-w-zephyr/?source=VPP_20230509_EMPET_E2_T0_NS&t=10&akid=7610%2E878179%2ElqWJ5H)
[**URGENT ⚠️ SIGN OUR PETITION TO STAND WITH REP. ZEPHYR NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-w-zephyr/?source=VPP_20230509_EMPET_E2_T0_NS&t=11&akid=7610%2E878179%2ElqWJ5H)
---
****25,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED BY MIDNIGHT****
Thank you for taking a stand,

Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=7610%2E878179%2ElqWJ5H). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=7610%2E878179%2ElqWJ5H).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=7610%2E878179%2ElqWJ5H) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=7610%2E878179%2ElqWJ5H). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=7610%2E878179%2ElqWJ5H)

body:
| | | If you'd like to unsubscribe,[click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GLNp5FjRArZ2gECnWf63UZWzcCuYR-Es9PjYmAXR4JxZbuH_t8O228MjZNOxN7Lm2WoL5eKG3lZx13kI8WltFNKZyqMd8kEaAiOCP-6Cwvk5JEsqQVrWqG6crCAPwXlnmHBGePxFrBkvlUmuEncAx3z0Fp0NBX2uELqdBn9ZMaa1eWFemMiP65HC2OsTBX6OyJc6HNsKYQOSo1dw2S-meZnYuV8CHWwQKyuQWE3ezWCiae92fhUzL7p_rvvpsJnhPznaOaZW2gtBIMbQtub6VCdc2xzaDntbHfBbcLxTbKoQ-pG4ZvSYsKcQHuYt4E56RuGEpkV88BuPUc2sWts4vC5YevXEM5cExBswA-k4k9zLnaOkGeZBPvFLLFebwR2H4K7m9Oruw78jlhg_geprv4nP2qHUqDn4L-5v60_eEowQ/3w1/QfazBF4-S--_IvA91ftMlg/h0/bFcLv11WRxFgxLT70qNuNxszOoXLTavggNPaXPfvf4w) | |
---
Friend,

Like you, I am heartbroken by the mass shooting we witnessed in Allen, Texas, over the weekend. Eight innocent lives — including young children — were cut short, and we owe it to the victims and their families to keep fighting for progress on this issue.

That’s why we started Their Future PAC. Because there are 73 million children in the United States who don’t have a voice in our political process — and who deserve lawmakers who will enact legislation to build a better future for them.

That includes passing common sense gun legislation, which a majority of people in this country support. Sadly, Republican lawmakers only offer thoughts and prayers while gun violence remains the leading cause of death for children in this country.

Instead of playing politics with our kids, it's time to get political for our kids. Their Future PAC is fighting hard to elect a #KidsFirst majority in Congress in part so we can enact common sense gun safety measures and work to end this constant stream of senseless violence that takes far too many children every day.

**[If you’re with us, join Their Future PAC by signing your name to our petition today to take a stand for common sense gun legislation. We’re looking for 1,000 signatures in the next 24 hours.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlWwvEGwALt4Vh1fagEIRtOJx1y0iWaNeZnL_a9scgRWvzF8YWWUEa2OdK7QIfmeqLNFzo5-vnchf_MyEHuNBQTTTUhMu0a-vs0Z-X-_WYAsMEI-cMVVmdK0bcdL3h9WT3WTLxBwlHAzaaLZ_UotqLLsSyKc_Z5GLurqTGt0YVaUCqeDGxPg00p6nC7ho532fEN5z7qZLIFmsoBMZai0t2DeDexdNBCVJkVu1pHaEbGmRYwBAv74d1nZq3J41BP2mfMCUrU401r5NCzOU0gIQsB_rDoIKEOSUZwqlKANerpKzFgYunwoZ86CZxxa6ZTR8zZ0SXHQ5QtiPp9cH-pyuK5/3w1/QfazBF4-S--_IvA91ftMlg/h1/642xb1Fdo5fCGaghwp2hZwOYPiaaOq9ts_cZ1XSC3eM)**
| [Sign On](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlWwvEGwALt4Vh1fagEIRtOJx1y0iWaNeZnL_a9scgRWvzF8YWWUEa2OdK7QIfmeqLNFzo5-vnchf_MyEHuNBQTTTUhMu0a-vs0Z-X-_WYAsMEI-cMVVmdK0bcdL3h9WT3WTLxBwlHAzaaLZ_UotqLLsSyKc_Z5GLurqTGt0YVaUOLlW7TR5GoTWSWZ8eEuG4UproBSbZF07019-VdxjAkFGLoZ3wiiyo8j2ZFxhSMCJjw3GkBlj4VXkeqEyrDn1XUBXJ8zg9pkdSqnGBx55jNfEHbbfiWHFGKVqEEAKZxS1Q2Vz8lUMpeyJ7s7DsHTVbzYmbVLbwP-IiXWKBWv8mHL/3w1/QfazBF4-S--_IvA91ftMlg/h2/2c7_GANapM-wGu14TKVIYmHZoZQd_Y8pSbEaeBCipxs)

Annie

body:
Workers play a critical role in our economy, so we can’t take them for granted.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63039338/405385186/215821870?refcode=BLU-KKFC-20230509-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0MDEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzU0OTg5MjAtOGNlZS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=orLqCd1oDG07S5qyl82dvdGcTxQbWpPtVWD8-uR9Faw=)

| Peter,

| | The GOP has once again put politics over people and science. **Just days ago, a group of Senate Republicans blocked a bill on the Senate floor containing essential health care and benefits for our nation's veterans, all because it included a provision to allow the research of cannabis use for veterans suffering from PTSD.** Yes, you read that right. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63039476/405385837/-2044921950?refcode=2023-05-09-cannabis&recurring=&amount=7&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=9ad49c55-8cee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWQ0OWM1NS04Y2VlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ljmoaabkml31wND8qn0sIlERem0zNymzXLuGAcby2Qo=) **This antiquated approach to our nation's drug laws is preventing the Americans that have bravely served their country from accessing potentially life-changing medical treatments.** The truth is almost every state in the country has legalized cannabis in some form. The majority of Americans agree that it's time to end our country's failed War on Drugs. It's time for the federal government to enter the 21st century and get with the program. **It's time to stop putting politics above people, and I'll keep fighting to get this done.** More soon, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: | | | | The GOP has once again put politics over people and science. Just days ago, a group of Senate Republicans blocked a bill on the Senate floor containing essential health care and benefits for our nation's veterans, all because it included a provision to allow the research of cannabis use for veterans suffering from PTSD. Yes, you read that right. = This antiquated approach to our nation's drug laws is preventing the Americans that have bravely served their country from accessing potentially life-changing medical treatments. The truth is almost every state in the country has legalized cannabis in some form. The majority of Americans agree that it's time to end our country's failed War on Drugs. It's time for the federal government to enter the 21st century and get with the program. It's time to stop putting politics above people, and I'll keep fighting to get this done. Friend, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas.

Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country!

**That’s why I need you with me: Please, will you split $15 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and American Bridge PAC to help reach my ambitious Launch Week goal of $3,000,000? I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.

_Now, I’m ready for my next challenge:__taking on Ted Cruz._ I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:
**[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $15 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and American Bridge PAC to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63039813/405386996/1711913910?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2584-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4NmRmNDA5LThkZWUtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4fVqFLlmPbupjx78AntCmrcn5jXdoGZbqON5qp-oUIY=)**
Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

Colin Allred
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

clean_body: [ ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE Peter — We thought you should see this from Florida Governor Ron DeSantis’ visit to Wisconsin this weekend: WSAW: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis makes special appearance in Central Wisconsin to promote the “Florida Way” [ ]DONATE While headlining a fundraiser for the Wisconsin GOP, Ron DeSantis doubled down on his far-right stances on voting rights, health care, COVID-19, and so much more. He talked about how Florida could be the blueprint for Wisconsin — a terrifying idea. Peter, this is likely not the last time DeSantis shows up in Wisconsin. As he gets ready to run for President, he’ll do what it takes to win our state in 2024 — and he’ll definitely try to flip Tammy’s Senate seat along the way. [ ]Will you rush a donation to help us prepare for the parade of high-profile Republicans visiting our state, smearing Tammy’s record and propping up the Wisconsin GOP? We need to keep Wisconsin BLUE. clean_body: Let’s get out the vote and keep up our progress. = | Fellow activist, In just one week, Pennsylvania has another special election that will determine the majority in our State House. With it, so goes the Commonwealth’s outlook for the freedom to vote, reproductive rights, and so much more. Just like for February’s three special elections in Allegheny County, we’re hard at work getting out the vote in Delaware County to ensure the voters in our focus communities know the stakes. = = = = We’ve fought too hard to win a reflective state legislature that prioritizes the needs of the communities in which we center. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to : May 9, 2023 Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to : October 23, 2023 Last day to : October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. name: =?utf-8?Q?Greater=20New=20Haven=20Green=20Party?=
subject: GNGHP Meetings and Events!
body:
| |
---
| | |
## Weds May 10 - GNHGP Chapter Meeting (zoom)
Sat May 13 - State Party Annual Meeting (zoom)
---
| You are cordially invited to attend!
---
|
---
| |
---
### May GNHGP Meeting
Weds 5/10 @7:00PM
**Agenda** :
-Chair's report, other reports
-Approve prior [M](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=9cafa92e13&e=91a3f04de5)[inutes](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=6bae2b0915&e=91a3f04de5)
-Review and approve [Bylaws](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=437e6a8941&e=91a3f04de5)
-Officer Elections
-Treasurer's report
-Spending Plans
-Website and Social Media plans
-Event Plans (May 20 Guilford Pride?, June 3 QRiver Fest)
-Other announcements
-Next Meeting 6/14

ZOOM registration link [HERE](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=c3d99dce2d&e=91a3f04de5)
---
|
---
| |
---
### Annual State Party Meeting!
Saturday 5/13 12:30 to 2:45PM
ZOOM link will be announced
12:30 opening remarks
12:45-1:30 How to organize a Green Chapter / Town Committee w/Q&A
1:30 remembering Cliff Thornton
1:45- 2:45 Drug Policy Panel and Discussion
---
|
---
| Recent Events
---
| |
---
### Middletown Earth Day Extravaganza, April 22
I had a great time tabling and representing GNGHP at this Earth Day event. Got a signup sheet filled (welcome new members!), had some great conversations with other vendors, and got a couple nice free plants for our yard! CT Voters First was there with a table promoting Ranked Choice Voting in Connecticut!
---
| |
---
### North Haven Earth Day, April 29
David Bedell and I had a great time tabling at the North Haven Earth Day. We saw an owl, had many conversations with other vendors, bought some girl scout cookies, and I even signed up for solar power at my house with SunRun!
---
| |
---
### May Day (May 1) on the New Haven Green
Ronna, Bob, David and I enjoyed a beautiful day on the New Haven Green tabling for the CT Green Party. We had several signups, and many interesting conversations. Thanks to Unidad Latina En Accion!
---
|
---
Thanks to Billy Fischer, we were able to have a Maypole Dance complete with live fiddle music. It was delightful and many smiles were shared. A traditional May Day festive dance on International Workers Day!
---
| |
---
### Guilford Peace Alliance
The Guilford Peace Alliance demonstrates every Saturday 11AM-12Noon on the Guilford Green and has been doing so without fail for over 30 years! Come join any Saturday!
---
|
---
| More Upcoming Events
---
|
---
| |
---
### QRiver Fest at the Qunnipiac River Marina, New Haven
June 3 1-6pm.

GNGHP will be tabling at this great event, can you join us?

Your presence will be a powerful demonstration of your support for the Green Party!
---
|
---
|
# **We are the Party of People, Planet, and Peace!**
---
| The need for multiparty democracy and an independent left party is clear. We are an ecosocialist peace party who fight for social, economic, and environmental justice. Come to our meetings and events to meet us and get involved!
---
| The Greater New Haven Green Party is a chapter
of the Green Party of Connecticut!

Find our chapterBylaws [HERE](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=96c09942a9&e=91a3f04de5)
Read minutes of our past meetings [HERE](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=28f4277edb&e=91a3f04de5)
Follow us on Facebook [HERE](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=675ae13948&e=91a3f04de5)
Follow us on Twitter[ HERE](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=79c8f72f1e&e=91a3f04de5)
Follow our Instagram [HERE](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=770c1c6ba5&e=91a3f04de5)
---
|
---
| | | Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/profile?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=18b5d036be&e=91a3f04de5&c=62cbba274a) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=18b5d036be&e=91a3f04de5&c=62cbba274a).

---
|
---

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d6ca7b117f141978cf3d86a0914ebb9&_e=kVtm5ISs_bitc7tIGDLJkw6BrsKdGAheuGZ3OFKzQv_S2G3_xPPD3KgD7pWXUZ2kS34ocGPjC5Kah3fTgwcU5A0nWjzpzXnRmFzcSH0MWAhUBLfjX9GbmwtQ8Ozr61yRiZN6Tv8cRTROABb69dY5TMRIRx177E3a9g7WMUnsWAGfff-nWxRw4Us3fzDXQOvpS1cyfqZpJhzquwuHRig1Rjqk04rg-2bjJnYDls8UQ857L8XAs1gv8loTKNXb65rH_y6dYuinQSwa6mAs6Vba8tJXkmDv_UinKpb7CYrYT6w%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d6ca7b117f141978cf3d86a0914ebb9&_e=kVtm5ISs_bitc7tIGDLJkw6BrsKdGAheuGZ3OFKzQv_S2G3_xPPD3KgD7pWXUZ2kS34ocGPjC5Kah3fTgwcU5A0nWjzpzXnRmFzcSH0MWAhUBLfjX9GbmwtQ8Ozr61yRiZN6Tv8cRTROABb69dY5TM0laWguL3GflSx4kF-jQb5XQyaD59Ej9UQGy0DA-Fo56CxGyZGk5haqxncWY6ynrorwJDbI1Sy-vvNJhfMMEUN_R4JheElGes0_GJUGGUGr2NsHM--E0ygzBCl-G7mRhK_VBt2abWHe9qizN5Oiuak%3D)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d6ca7b117f141978cf3d86a0914ebb9&_e=kVtm5ISs_bitc7tIGDLJkw6BrsKdGAheuGZ3OFKzQv_S2G3_xPPD3KgD7pWXUZ2kS34ocGPjC5Kah3fTgwcU5A0nWjzpzXnRmFzcSH0MWAhUBLfjX9GbmwtQ8Ozr61yRiZN6Tv8cRTROABb69dY5TNTLw78F7ln7CDQN9FO4Lg33YPcnFrMhrAQi75RFG6kzXxGcSTqE4Xpy0Rc2goK3WOh5lRxmccmV7hJITo8hNevB_HQZKrIjm9XwiId5nW2u6TJnTyUoGh6YIkU79Mde83x5ki2crN1vhWhAf4tJS4k%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty.
