clean_body: I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Conservatives Give 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

body:
I couldn’t believe it
| Friend, it’s Bryan. Do you have a minute?

I was just looking over the numbers of the opposition and where the money is coming from to attack us in Wisconsin’s 1st District, and you will not believe it.

---
This is already on top of the $26 million that House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries brought in to FLIP toss-up districts like ours.
---

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
Ted Cruz won his last campaign by 2 points, and if Colin has the resources he needs *from the start* we could be done with Ted Cruz in the Senate forever. And wouldn’t that be great?

Friends -
I am writing today with an important request:
Can you contribute $3 directly to Colin Allred’s campaign against Ted Cruz in Texas?
Ted Cruz won his last campaign by 2 points, and if Colin has the resources he needs *from the start* we could be done with Ted Cruz in the Senate forever. And wouldn’t that be great?
But that early money is critical. So please give directly to Colin Allred’s campaign right here:
[**https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/defeat-cruz**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-allred?refcode=em230509-1-full&refcode2=1351_4767699_g8Oi9t&akid=1351%2E4767699%2Eg8Oi9t)
Need a few more reasons?
$3 because Ted Cruz is one of the biggest defenders of the “guns everywhere” culture that has led to record levels of mass shootings and guns being the leading cause of death for kids in the United States.
$3 because after the Uvalde elementary school shooting in his state, Cruz said that the solution was not to make it harder for criminals to get guns, but for schools to only have one door going in and out.
$3 because Ted Cruz was the loudest voice against letting Barack Obama confirm a Supreme Court nominee after Justice Scalia died before the election in 2016, but then implored Trump and McConnell to get a nominee confirmed within a week after RBG died in late 2020.
And honestly, $3 because if we can flip this seat, we’re going to get enough votes in the Senate to bypass the filibuster and protect abortion access, expand voting rights, and get meaningful gun safety legislation.
Plus, wouldn’t it just be great to never hear the words “Senator Ted Cruz” ever again?
It’s up to us. We all have a role to play. And the early money for Colin Allred’s campaign is the most important.
[**Please use this link to contribute $3, or whatever you can afford today, directly to Colin Allred’s campaign to defeat Ted Cruz in Texas. It will all add up if we’re all chipping-in.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-allred?refcode=em230509-1-full&refcode2=1351_4767699_g8Oi9t&akid=1351%2E4767699%2Eg8Oi9t)

---

Thank you,
Gavin

body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be8fa4d7fd76432eae2057bd91b4edaa&_e=1_TRDvu862e2ukqbMQFULZDlhGJqBM9lSOwe_MveNH1r__kmoDgADIhdDTmLkPHUu_cwmwYYA521NjT-WjSEcEeyCwgOSqE-e2Z7xz-jyzHH8NnQFhpgGdE3vhKxQHlAr0Cxj3lwWXPyOaObpOejefVz8zGvw0tDTkzeyBmytuBuC-luaWs-WvLXbsoo-W8BHygf7gNr3_L17ADwlzu8I8I_MeHV0CJ2nTeV_d8l49oh4zbwc1W0jqoW-Ti8E9mf4oJBHjANTrd_qmt767O2gQ%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be8fa4d7fd76432eae2057bd91b4edaa&_e=1_TRDvu862e2ukqbMQFULZDlhGJqBM9lSOwe_MveNH1r__kmoDgADIhdDTmLkPHUu_cwmwYYA521NjT-WjSEcEeyCwgOSqE-e2Z7xz-jyzHH8NnQFhpgGdE3vhKxQHlAR9_1xSBlc-qyshxpi2VhSIRs0C27JzW8s_NkaLQkLcjXM4pwArEUCpJzjfpj0bKGaNgd320aj_OvG_6brTdYpGs7BTjFroSa2ZdfYpQog5wwfTPk7uAeLoefwHmDkOPW-ODRRlrTJ1rShP7JBgfVbw%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=be8fa4d7fd76432eae2057bd91b4edaa&_e=1_TRDvu862e2ukqbMQFULZDlhGJqBM9lSOwe_MveNH1r__kmoDgADIhdDTmLkPHUu_cwmwYYA521NjT-WjSEcEeyCwgOSqE-e2Z7xz-jyzHH8NnQFhpgGdE3vhKxQHlAyxy45LJdbHrdfkZT78_LtJbOSeKGZRzRjybyZHV84uQAQ6n1zU5HlKL2FpuHBvDt3QUxSzNvFf9Bb_rDqJMpGO15pR47jFRbL_ryzqdxt9V1BdTr8dti7llnR9BlePWjlh9lr6-hZKUSM8i69FCziA%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com

clean_body: Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. For Freedom, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

body:
State Republicans are laser-focused on building power in the states to pass their right-wing agenda | | |
---
| | **** **🚨 We’re just**one week away** from six critical special elections 🚨** 👉 In Pennsylvania, two House seats are up for grabs next Tuesday – and if Republicans win both races, Democrats will lose control of the chamber. 👉 In New Hampshire, Republicans hold an ultra-thin majority in the House – we’re just _four seats away_ from flipping the chamber. So it’s vital that Democrats secure a victory in this special election. 👉 State Republicans are laser-focused on building power in the states to pass their right-wing agenda of abortion restrictions, barriers to the ballot box, and anti-gun safety legislation. **We can’t let extremists take advantage of these special election opportunities.** [Will you chip in $7 right now to elect state Democrats and defeat Republican extremists in states like Pennsylvania and New Hampshire? | Friends and Neighbors,
We love hearing from you. Tracy, my team, and I are still trying to respond to all the congratulation emails, calls and text messages. Thank you, again, to my family, our incredible team, our convention supporters, and everyone else for helping us get the win. God is good!
Now, fellow Republicans candidates and I need your help to win the general election for Senate District District 10. Please visit our website [www.mcguireforvirginia.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FBTAi9gXeBzR138Vhh6jZSQqk_1WnjSmA828q5J0sog0mIgSHxweF3sAbl1MGlHYDu6De6DvTH4QHvNinCYg8TEU4Nr6tOlPFebcZwCxZpSBncp24SmqOhXNkFgJ3D9Okvr_8BE15_yseL6ENlZCqQ0pvzPcWTD7&c=uIaNCBDyTbWrqUW-cXQqA70HrGnIFDvgpfaxv3pEI6fuue6W_TvjcA==&ch=SUcXfIAl3MmNH-jgwhQGpgNVSVuj319vrxu0uqN2JGLvku3gGFtLag==) to learn more, donate, get a sign, and or volunteer.

| Buckingham County High School may very well be the location of the last Republican Senate District 10 convention. The process was slow, but I have to admit, hanging out with all of you was fun. Someone said all the positive cheering reminded them of a Trump rally.

A fuzzy photo, according to this spreadsheet time stamped 3:30pm on May 6, 2023 Republican Delegate John McGuire won the nomination for Virginia State Senate District 10 in a four way race with 63 % of the vote on the first ballot. Duane Adams achieved 24%, Jack Dyer achieved 11%, and Sandy Brindley achieved 2%. We won eight out of ten counties. We lost Louisa by just one vote and we lost Fluvanna by just three votes. My opponents ran a spirited race and I know I learned a lot about the district. "We the People" have spoken. Now we must unite and win the general election in November. [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FBTAi9gXeBzR138Vhh6jZSQqk_1WnjSmA828q5J0sog0mIgSHxweF3sAbl1MGlHYWAurzUAn9ewxM2CEpJzwxDhBLbopZiqf3SodeJW7BJSJ1-6QLC5UIYT8tnz2MKhGhYUaP6-073H20UxfD8XUag==&c=uIaNCBDyTbWrqUW-cXQqA70HrGnIFDvgpfaxv3pEI6fuue6W_TvjcA==&ch=SUcXfIAl3MmNH-jgwhQGpgNVSVuj319vrxu0uqN2JGLvku3gGFtLag==)

| I'm running for State Senate so we can un-California Virginia. It starts with election integrity. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause.
I am committed, as your Representative, to adhering to the principal duties of government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, i.e., the protection of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.
Thank you, once again, for allowing me to serve you in the Virginia House of Delegates. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district!
---

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Friends and Neighbors, We love hearing from you. Tracy, my team, and I are still trying to respond to all the congratulation emails, calls and text messages. Thank you, again, to my family, our incredible team, our convention supporters, and everyone else for helping us get the win. God is good! Now, fellow Republicans candidates and I need your help to win the general election for Senate District District 10. Please visit our website == to learn more, donate, get a sign, and or volunteer. | == | We look forward to seeing you at Amelia Day this weekend, == for details. | Convention Photos | | ==, thank you Governor Glenn Youngkin! | == | God helped us put together an incredible team of staff and volunteers. You guys are the best. I'm glad to have Delegate Buddy Fowler by my side. We used Axiom Strategies Sean Brown and Noah Jennings for our consultants. We had two campaign managers: Teemu Garrity and Britton Ross. You guys crushed it. Thank you! | | == Trucking the Truth was there. | == | Convention speech == | Thank you, the introduction. You fired them up! | My new friend, Annie Gross, from Amelia County is adorable. She waved a John McGuire sign all day everywhere in support. Her husband, Fred, is a farmer and he called to say how proud they are of our team. | | == was there! | | | | | | Buckingham County High School may very well be the location of the last Republican Senate District 10 convention. The process was slow, but I have to admit, hanging out with all of you was fun. Someone said all the positive cheering reminded them of a Trump rally. | | A fuzzy photo, according to this spreadsheet time stamped 3:30pm on May 6, 2023 Republican Delegate John McGuire won the nomination for Virginia State Senate District 10 in a four way race with 63 % of the vote on the first ballot. Duane Adams achieved 24%, Jack Dyer achieved 11%, and Sandy Brindley achieved 2%. We won eight out of ten counties. We lost Louisa by just one vote and we lost Fluvanna by just three votes. My opponents ran a spirited race and I know I learned a lot about the district. "We the People" have spoken. Now we must unite and win the general election in November. == | | Tracy and I got a photo with George Washington and Patrick Henry. What a fun day! | | | I'm being told it's time for some new boots! | | | | | | Our incredible supporters showed up in mass and stayed until the job was done. Thank you and God bless you! | | A nice surprise when I returned home to Goochland County! | == | I'm running for State Senate so we can un-California Virginia. It starts with election integrity. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. I am committed, as your Representative, to adhering to the principal duties of government, as stated in our Declaration of Independence, i.e., the protection of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. Thank you, once again, for allowing me to serve you in the Virginia House of Delegates. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district! | 70 Plus Endorsement List == | == == You can donate == or by mail. If you'd like to donate by mail, please make a check out to "Friends of John McGuire" and send to: Friends of John McGuire P.O. Box 168 Manakin-Sabot, VA 23103 | | | | | | | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Running for == in 2023 Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro-Life == Pro-Gun America 1st The Spirit of Virginia Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 == NFIB 100 Endorsement List == == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | == | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | Friends of John McGuire | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

name: Amanda K. Edwards
subject: Enough
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Amanda Edwards Campaign, Melanie Gray, Treasurer
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ae-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ae-email]
Friend,
The news out of Allen this weekend was absolutely devastating. According to GunViolenceArchive.org [https://www.gunviolencearchive.org/] , this marks more than 200 mass shootings in America, in just this 2023 alone.
Malls, movie theaters, schools, and places of worship are spaces where we should be safe. What happened in Allen was another reminder that they are not. We deserve better leadership who will decide that enough is enough.
Thank you for your continued support,
Amanda K. Edwards
Amanda K. Edwards has the experience and innovative vision to move Houston forward. To learn more, visit our website. name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: Reaching out to ask if you’ll split a $10 contribution between my campaign and GIFFORDS PAC
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It’s my priority to advance common sense legislation that will save lives
#

[
---
Hi there, it’s Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries. Every day, innocent lives are stolen by senseless acts of gun violence. Gun violence is the NUMBER ONE cause of death for American kids and teens. It’s time that this Congress put Kids Over Guns. We must work together to stop the scourge of gun violence across our country and make sure that weapons of war do not fall into the hands of those who want to harm others. [**That’s why I’m asking if you’ll split a $10 contribution between my campaign and GIFFORDS PAC. We can’t continue the work to keep our communities safe from gun violence without the help of dedicated supporters like you.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-jeffries-em-may23.mc76U-&refcode=em230509-1-15&t=2&akid=5601%2E3935704%2EK7HXnh) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your splilt contribution between GIFFORDS PAC and Hakeem Jeffries instantly:_ | | **[Donate $10](https://go.giffords.org/go/20738?c0=giffords-jeffries-em-may23.fhdFS3&refcode=em230509-1-15&t=21&akid=5601%2E3935704%2EK7HXnh)**
---
**** | **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-jeffries-em-may23.oAf7Jw&refcode=em230509-1-15&t=22&akid=5601%2E3935704%2EK7HXnh)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-jeffries-em-may23.LscRLu&refcode=em230509-1-15&t=23&akid=5601%2E3935704%2EK7HXnh)**
---
**** | **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-jeffries-em-may23.ZQUurV&refcode=em230509-1-15&t=24&akid=5601%2E3935704%2EK7HXnh)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-jeffries-em-may23.NFWiJB&refcode=em230509-1-15&t=25&akid=5601%2E3935704%2EK7HXnh)**
---
**** | **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-jeffries-em-may23.BU23Lp&refcode=em230509-1-15&t=26&akid=5601%2E3935704%2EK7HXnh)**
---
****
I’m proud to support my friends at GIFFORDS and their work to end our nation’s gun violence epidemic. Their research and advocacy are so important for lawmakers like me who are working to enact common sense gun safety solutions that will save lives. Their work also helps to elect leaders up and down the ballot with the courage to act on gun violence prevention. We can and must do more to protect our communities and our schools. House Democrats are laser-focused on advancing legislation For The People that will save lives and end our nation’s gun violence crisis. This won’t be easy. Extreme MAGA Republicans in the House majority refuse to bring common sense legislation to the floor. It’s going to take all of us to keep up the fight to make progress happen. [**So please: Split a $10 contribution between my campaign and GIFFORDS PAC today. Together, we can work towards a future free from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-jeffries-em-may23.mc76U-&refcode=em230509-1-15&t=27&akid=5601%2E3935704%2EK7HXnh) Thank you for taking a stand, Hakeem Jeffries
House Democratic Leader

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63042686/405397508/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDY1OGQwMS05NWVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pJp3a9IP7EyowVbuvFiOoJiHhJu3v_yyg_AoDsdmwcY=)
Team -
It’s been four months since Robert began his work in Congress and he has been working hard to fight for Californians and working families across the country.
Whether it be through his bill to protect LGBTQ+ community members, his role in the Green New Deal, or even his pushing for accountability of lawmakers during House Oversight committee hearings, he has been getting the work done and fighting for Americans as he promised.
As he continues his first term, Robert wants to hear _directly from you_ what issues matter most, so he can focus on them in Congress too. Because that’s the job he was elected to do — fight for folks like you.
[**So can you take our May issues survey and let Robert know what your top priorities are? We are looking for a lot of responses today and want yours to be one of them**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63042687/405397509/1878425969?refcode2=44658d01-95ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&refcode=em230509-1-t2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDY1OGQwMS05NWVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pJp3a9IP7EyowVbuvFiOoJiHhJu3v_yyg_AoDsdmwcY=&emci=ac1d04f6-92ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=44658d01-95ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=16877361)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63042688/405397510/1878425969?refcode2=44658d01-95ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&refcode=em230509-1-t2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDY1OGQwMS05NWVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pJp3a9IP7EyowVbuvFiOoJiHhJu3v_yyg_AoDsdmwcY=&emci=ac1d04f6-92ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=44658d01-95ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=16877361)**
Sharing your priorities with Robert will directly impact the policies he fights for in Congress. Because this movement is meant to uplift the voices and needs of working people and marginalized communities.
If you share your priorities with him, he will do everything in his power to make real change that improves your life.
**[**Please take our short May issues survey today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63042689/405397511/1878425969?refcode2=44658d01-95ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&refcode=em230509-1-t2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDY1OGQwMS05NWVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pJp3a9IP7EyowVbuvFiOoJiHhJu3v_yyg_AoDsdmwcY=&emci=ac1d04f6-92ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=44658d01-95ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=16877361)**
You are at the center of this people-powered movement and your input matters. So we hope you take just a moment of your time to take our brief survey and share your thoughts with us today.
Together,
Team Robert Garcia

name: Nancy Mace
subject: Is everything ok?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: A GOP self-funded millionaire is running against me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
I needed to share this update with you directly, friend: **A self-funding GOP millionaire – one of Donald Trump's yes-men – announced he's running against me for Ohio's Senate seat.**
**With national Republicans prepared to spend millions on this race, I need your immediate grassroots support to fight back ASAP.****[So I'm personally asking: Will you chip in right now and split $5 or more between me and Kirsten Gillibrand so we can win and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63059178/405436662/-431201696?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4125-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjkxMmE0ZC1iYWVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-xaWx6BzzdQnZLAh0wKYZtg0iXvwe4MxO-G49qalyy0=)** Here's why this is so important: With experts saying that Ohio could decide Senate control, Washington Republicans are doing everything in their power to defeat me and flip the Senate red. The truth is, I'm not scared. But I do know that where Trump goes, GOP dark money follows. That's why I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help. **This is, without a doubt, the biggest moment yet for our campaign – and how we respond in the next 24 hours is critically important to our chances of defending this seat.** Unlike my potential opponent, I don’t have a massive personal fortune to pour into this race. Instead, I'm relying on critical support from folks like you, one grassroots donation at a time.******[So please, will you split $5 or more between me and Kirsten Gillibrand to help us hit our $50,000 rapid-response goal, win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63059179/405436663/-431201696?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4125-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjkxMmE0ZC1iYWVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-xaWx6BzzdQnZLAh0wKYZtg0iXvwe4MxO-G49qalyy0=)**

clean_body: | | | I needed to share this update with you directly, friend: A self-funding GOP millionaire – one of Donald Trump's yes-men – announced he's running against me for Ohio's Senate seat. With national Republicans prepared to spend millions on this race, I need your immediate grassroots support to fight back ASAP.= Here's why this is so important: With experts saying that Ohio could decide Senate control, Washington Republicans are doing everything in their power to defeat me and flip the Senate red. The truth is, I'm not scared. But I do know that where Trump goes, GOP dark money follows. That's why I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help. This is, without a doubt, the biggest moment yet for our campaign – and how we respond in the next 24 hours is critically important to our chances of defending this seat. Unlike my potential opponent, I don’t have a massive personal fortune to pour into this race. Instead, I'm relying on critical support from folks like you, one grassroots donation at a time.****= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sherrod Brown and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for rushing your support to show the strength of this grassroots movement, friend. With you by my side, I know that we'll be able to take on whatever the GOP throws our way – and win. \- Sherrod | *

From: Ashley _
_Date: Sat, May 6, 2023 at 10:49 AM
Subject: Fitzpatrick voted to cut veterans’ healthcare, and I’m pissed_ Hello, I asked my team to help me reach out personally. Brian Fitzpatrick just voted to slash the VA’s budget by 22 percent, and as an actual combat veteran who relies on the VA for healthcare, I’m pissed. I'm pissed because I have friends who will never be able to work again because of the injuries they sustained fighting for our country. They gave everything of themselves just to watch Republicans blow up the healthcare that they paid for with their bodies. Brian Fitzpatrick and his GOP cronies — most of whom have never lifted a finger for this country much less bled for it — happily slashing the healthcare of our country's heroes to score stupid political points makes me sick. Stopping this kind of shit is EXACTLY why I am running for Congress. I know you’re just as pissed as I am, so I hope you’ll consider giving to my campaign so that we kick these guys out of office once and for all. You can make a donation here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eha-email-may2023?personal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63044055/405401906/-945033547?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230509vabump_te_act_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjhjZTA0MS05YWVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PUs9HKVRsGuLIWPk50KPKPtR_tH2wH0hUYcaqjwB7e8=) Thanks for reading and Brian Fitzpatrick sucks, Ashley Sent from my iPhone

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Rumors of McConnell Retirement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
Mitch McConnell has been the Senate Republican “Leader” since George W. Bush was president.

| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Mitch McConnell has been the Senate Republican “Leader” since George W. Bush was president. His 16-year tenure has been marked by corporate bailouts, lost wars, Obamacare, the Covid lockdowns, two impeachments of a Republican president, and an unending war against Senate conservatives.

Rumors are swirling that the 81-year-old Swamp boss may finally be nearing retirement. And several Republican Senators are reportedly angling to run to replace him.

---
---
Sen. Mitch McConnell holds a gun at the 2014 CPAC to prevent attendees from booing him. (_Photo by Gage Skidmore_)
---
We aren't endorsing any candidate for the job now, but we absolutely endorse new leadership, particularly a new generation of conservative leadership for Senate Republicans.

During his entire career, Mitch McConnell has represented the Swamp and its priorities. His idea of leadership is earmarks, budget-busting spending, ducking policy fights, and producing Republican votes for Democrat bills.

McConnell has won plaudits for years for privately and publicly attacking conservatives: Jim DeMint, Ted Cruz, Mike Lee, and others. He constantly complains about conservative Senate candidates, but the candidates McConnell supports — like Arlen Specter and Charlie Crist — have a curious habit of losing ... and becoming Democrats!

The next Republican Leader must understand that the party is not the one McConnell imagines: socially liberal, country club millionaires. Like the new GOP, the new conservative movement is a working-class party looking out for young families instead of big businesses.

The new generation of Republicans wants to fight the Left and win the Culture War. The issues that Republicans actually care about are the issues McConnell has always shied away from – immigration, abortion, woke indoctrination of our kids, and the corruption of the Deep State. McConnell likes Washington more than he likes actual Republican voters, and that fact will hold back the party and the country as long as he remains in power.

**Republican Senators have grumbled for years about McConnell. The difference now is that they're showing signs that they're ready to do something about it.**

In the 2024 elections, Republicans have a chance for a sweep — to win control of the Senate, the House of Representatives, and the White House. But to truly win, we need more than a change of parties. We need a change of leaders.

**[Senate Conservatives Fund](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeamku0np74mh4osmg4ns2qiflmn0i1nhuioohio_rp22sh2s8i66o76cdjm4pj2clh2bs)** will continue doing our part: supporting conservatives in Senate races, including against McConnell’s hand-picked lapdogs. We will continue to hold current leaders accountable, including in the looming fight over the federal debt ceiling. And finally, we will hold McConnell accountable and keep you updated about the leadership race heating up inside the Senate.

If McConnell is on his way out, conservatives could finally be on their way in. With your help, we will work to give America that opportunity. Sincerely,
---
---
Matt Hoskins Senior Advisor Senate Conservatives Fund
---
|
---
**PRIORITY SENATE CANDIDATES**
---
---
**END OF THE MONTH** **COUNTDOWN**
---
|
---
---
|
---

name: ElizabethWarren.com
subject: Elizabeth asked for your advice for the Class of 2023. Here’s what you shared:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Elizabeth wanted to share a few submissions that stood out to her. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63059318/405437204/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ13P_ENG_T_20230509_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTQ4YmI5Ny1iYmVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B_SoMY33_eYETRiBFEBl_IGaiqgToz9Q7cv0n6U-R1s=&emci=ed48bb97-bbee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ee48bb97-bbee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
Last week, Elizabeth sent an email asking supporters like you to share advice for this year’s graduating class. As she prepares to give a couple of commencement speeches this month, she reviewed your advice, and wanted to share a few submissions that stood out to her. Please forward this email to a recent or soon-to-be graduate in your life — or take some of the advice with you into your day!
* * *
Keep reading and learning. Read everything you can get your hands on. Don't stop learning.
* * *
Help all to have food, security, opportunity, love, and respect — this includes you.
* * *
As an 8th grade teacher who has one of her favorite classes graduating this year, I would give this advice. Whatever particular plan you may have for your life, just remember that your country also needs you to step up and serve. Your curiosity, sense of fair play, and boundless talents are much needed by everyone around you. So whatever path you take, don’t forget to lend a helping and healing hand wherever you go!
* * *
Start each day with the resolve to do the very best you can. Put aside yesterday's errors. Allow yourself a fresh start.
* * *
Although pursuing a career and discovering ways to enhance it and take forward strides is important, it’s also important to live life. Much is learned from friend and family relationships. Juggling time can be tricky but rewarding as well. No one ever said there would be no frustration! Channeling energy in productive ways becomes a daily endeavor whether you are single or have 8 children! Take time to smell the roses and be thankful for the gifts.
* * *
Look for the joy in everything. This outlook will make a world of difference in the outcome of your life. Next, take care of yourself first, as it’s like putting the oxygen mask on yourself first in the airplane. Lastly, be good to each other. It’s the little things that soothe the soul. A smile, a wave, opening a door for another, letting someone in while in traffic, sing a happy song on your voicemail. It’s the simple gestures that can change another’s life for the better.
* * *
Congratulations. Please pay attention to who you are voting for in your local elections. Make sure they have your values on their agenda. Stay awake. Pay attention. Please vote.
* * *
Wear Sunscreen.
* * *
Do not be afraid to make mistakes because you will make them and you will recover from them. Forgive those who hurt you and forgive yourself. Do your best in everything that you do and do not be afraid to help others.
* * *
Never underestimate the power of the individual to make a difference. Remember that for evil to thrive it just takes a good person to do nothing. Get out there, make a difference and take action even if you're the only one — stand proud and stand tall.
* * *
Be involved with your town, city, state. Pay attention to what is going on in government. At your age, it may seem boring or unimportant, but it will affect you! Travel, see other cities and states, if you have the opportunity, go to other countries. Think outside the box and remember that perfection is highly overrated. Be yourself. Love yourself.
* * *
I am a sixty-nine-year-old graduate student who is looking forward to graduating this year with my Environmental Science degree. It took me a long time to be able to finish one of my lifelong goals. But I am proud to be at the finish line. My advice to anyone who wants to pursue their goals, GO for it. Never give up. I had wanted to be a marine biologist but life chose another path for me. So here I am forty years later with a new degree and a new beginning to a purposeful career. Thank you to all of my professors who helped me on my journey.
* * *
Remember to break down all your large complex and difficult problems into small tasks you can confidently handle and start doing them one at a time. All my best.
* * *
Connect locally. Form connections with people you can see. Talk to them, whether they are retail workers or good friends. Form groups that meet regularly. It will ground you and help you keep your faith in humanity.
* * *
It’s okay to not know exactly what you want to do in your career. Some of you may have known since you were three years old exactly what you wanted to be when you grew up — and some of you may still be completely unsure of where to go next. Focus on your values and your interests, and start somewhere that aligns with that. It doesn’t have to be perfect. Learn from that experience what you like and dislike in a career, then seek out the next opportunity that matches your interests a little bit more. Keep learning and growing, making changes. Maybe you stay in one field for five years and then completely change course. Maybe you find a new job every two years until you land in what feels like the right fit. That’s normal and part of learning and growing as a person. There’s no shame in figuring it out as you go — trust your instincts, remember that you deserve happiness and fulfillment, and keep moving forward.
* * *
Vote. Get involved with organizations and groups that support your views and encourage growth. Keep reading. Keep asking questions. Don’t give up. You are the change we seek and our hope for a brighter, cleaner future.
* * *
We hope you enjoyed reading those kind and thoughtful submissions as much as we did. Thanks for being a part of this movement. clean_body: Elizabeth wanted to share a few submissions that stood out to her. | | | Last week, Elizabeth sent an email asking supporters like you to share advice for this year’s graduating class. As she prepares to give a couple of commencement speeches this month, she reviewed your advice, and wanted to share a few submissions that stood out to her. Please forward this email to a recent or soon-to-be graduate in your life — or take some of the advice with you into your day! Keep reading and learning. Read everything you can get your hands on. Don't stop learning. Help all to have food, security, opportunity, love, and respect — this includes you. As an 8th grade teacher who has one of her favorite classes graduating this year, I would give this advice. Whatever particular plan you may have for your life, just remember that your country also needs you to step up and serve. Your curiosity, sense of fair play, and boundless talents are much needed by everyone around you. So whatever path you take, don’t forget to lend a helping and healing hand wherever you go! Although pursuing a career and discovering ways to enhance it and take forward strides is important, it’s also important to live life. Much is learned from friend and family relationships. Channeling energy in productive ways becomes a daily endeavor whether you are single or have 8 children! Take time to smell the roses and be thankful for the gifts. Look for the joy in everything. Lastly, be good to each other. It’s the little things that soothe the soul. A smile, a wave, opening a door for another, letting someone in while in traffic, sing a happy song on your voicemail. It’s the simple gestures that can change another’s life for the better. Congratulations. Please pay attention to who you are voting for in your local elections. Be involved with your town, city, state. Pay attention to what is going on in government. At your age, it may seem boring or unimportant, but it will affect you! Travel, see other cities and states, if you have the opportunity, go to other countries. Think outside the box and remember that perfection is highly overrated. Be yourself. Love yourself. I am a sixty-nine-year-old graduate student who is looking forward to graduating this year with my Environmental Science degree. It took me a long time to be able to finish one of my lifelong goals. But I am proud to be at the finish line. My advice to anyone who wants to pursue their goals, GO for it. Never give up. I had wanted to be a marine biologist but life chose another path for me. So here I am forty years later with a new degree and a new beginning to a purposeful career. Thank you to all of my professors who helped me on my journey. Remember to break down all your large complex and difficult problems into small tasks you can confidently handle and start doing them one at a time. All my best. Connect locally. Form connections with people you can see. Talk to them, whether they are retail workers or good friends. Form groups that meet regularly. It will ground you and help you keep your faith in humanity. It’s okay to not know exactly what you want to do in your career. Maybe you stay in one field for five years and then completely change course. Maybe you find a new job every two years until you land in what feels like the right fit. That’s normal and part of learning and growing as a person. There’s no shame in figuring it out as you go — trust your instincts, remember that you deserve happiness and fulfillment, and keep moving forward. Vote. Get involved with organizations and groups that support your views and encourage growth. Keep reading. Keep asking questions. Don’t give up. You are the change we seek and our hope for a brighter, cleaner future. * We hope you enjoyed reading those kind and thoughtful submissions as much as we did. name: Team Deluzio
subject: Republicans should take a page out of the Naval Academy's book.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
For Republicans, it’s party over people. But in 2024, we the people have a chance to fight back.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63044515/405403727/-576970961?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.09_b1_td_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWUwZDRmZC05YmVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iGI1WAtGqfsUDXCrLVW1ctiVowwmYYPFSbqIc_CWP6s=) Hi Derek,

When Chris was in the Naval Academy, one of the first lessons he learned was: **Ship, shipmate, self.** It means you put the mission first, and you put others before yourself.

**Those values are core to Chris and his work in Congress.** He never forgets the people he is representing back home in western Pennsylvania, and he leads with their best interests in mind.

**_But we can’t say the same about House Republicans._ For them, it’s more like: Self, self, self.**

That’s why they’re so willing to turn their backs on our nation’s veterans. It’s why they’re unashamed in their attempts to carve out tax loopholes for mega-corporations while leaving everyday Americans in the dust. It’s what keeps them from reaching across the aisle to find common sense solutions on the issues hurting working families.

**For Republicans, it’s party over people. But in 2024, we the people have a chance to fight back.**

**[Derek, the best way we can chip away at the Republican’s House Majority is by reelecting leaders like Chris. Will you chip in today to help us keep Chris in Washington fighting for PA-17?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63044516/405403729/-576970961?refcode=em_fr_2023.05.09_b1_td_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWUwZDRmZC05YmVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iGI1WAtGqfsUDXCrLVW1ctiVowwmYYPFSbqIc_CWP6s=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

For them, it’s more like: Self, self, self. That’s why they’re so willing to turn their backs on our nation’s veterans. It’s why they’re unashamed in their attempts to carve out tax loopholes for mega-corporations while leaving everyday Americans in the dust. It’s what keeps them from reaching across the aisle to find common sense solutions on the issues hurting working families. For Republicans, it’s party over people. But in 2024, we the people have a chance to fight back. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Team Deluzio | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran representing Pennsylvania's 17th District in Congress. He's a champion for our unions, and he's fighting to guarantee good healthcare for every American, taking on corporate power, and advocating for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. = | = = | Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress Chris Deluzio for Congress PO Box 16210 Pittsburgh, PA 15242 United States Chris Deluzio is a United States Veteran. From my first day in office, I’ve been driven to deliver results for our community and nation. I believe it is a representative’s duty to look out for their constituents, not their own interests.

While that may seem obvious, _**it’s not always clear.**_

To support transparency and promote accountability in Congress, I introduced a bill to ban Members of Congress, their spouses, and dependent children from trading individual stocks. No one should use their position to look after their financial portfolios instead of their constituents.

_**My common sense reform is gaining popularity every day,**_ and a majority of Americans from both parties support it. name: Presidential Campaign Alerts 2024
subject: Clap for that, you stupid bastards
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Service and Honor
body:
Those are two of the most insulting things Joe Biden has said

| |
---
| | | _**“CLAP FOR THAT, YOU STUPID BASTARDS”**_
-VICE PRESIDENT BIDEN, MARCH 2016

**_“YOU REALLY ARE A DULL BUNCH” _**
-PRESIDENT BIDEN, MAY 2021
---

Patriot,

Those are two of the most insulting things Joe Biden has said to American troops & veterans.

**The third will come any minute now when he announces,** _“I am once again running for President of the United States in 2024.” _

---
**THEY NEED OUR SUPPORT NOW MORE THAN EVER.
WILL YOU STAND FOR OUR VETERANS WITH US?**
---
| | [**YES**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c11712%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ozwC17SmDB7Y%2beOjGWS9Sg&sysid=1)

---

Before the news even breaks, the limousine liberals & Wall Street fat cats will be cutting him a blank check to further the humiliation of every conservative veteran on the ballot in 2024.

The floodgates will have opened, and any shot we have at defeating him will be washed away before the cameras cut and they wheel him off the stage.

Knowing you to be the patriot you are- we will not sugar coat it, lie to you, or beat around the bush.

**So here’s the truth- if we don’t match this major surge of support to Biden, our veterans will lose & Joe Biden will win. **

If you have the guts to go to bat for our veterans & our nation - stand with us right here & right now to deliver Joe Biden & the liberal elite an overwhelming defeat.

---
**DO YOU HAVE THE GUTS TO DEFEAT JOE BIDEN ****AND DEFEND OUR VETERANS?**
---
| | [**YES**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c11712%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ozwC17SmDB7Y%2beOjGWS9Sg&sysid=1)
---

---

It will take less than a minute of your time, and it will save our brave men and women who wore the uniform a lifetime of trouble.

We hope you will do the right thing & stand with us today.

---
**[>>>>> DEFEAT JOE BIDEN & DEFEND AMERICAN VETS <<<<<](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c11714%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WnsxDn6YzwDRfc9qLaK2jw&sysid=1 "DEFEAT JOE BIDEN & DEFEND

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Donald Trump will be held accountable for sexual assault, but it took years. There are 20 more women every minute who may never see justice for abuse and need help now.
body:
E. Jean Carroll will get some justice, at last!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6d8b759c-84f1-48ee-8528-b3f9fd5e160a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_BREAKING:_**_ Donald Trump found liable In E. Jean Carroll's lawsuit for defamation and assault! When his penalties for acting with malice, defaming her and sexually abusing her are added together, it totals $5 million._ **_E. Jean Carroll gets some justice. Trump learns there's accountability for his actions. And perhaps it encourages accusers, juries, judges, prosecutors, witnesses & others to make predators pay for their behavior._** [**_We'd just like to support the Domestic Violence Resource Center that helps assault survivors by providing hotels when they need to escape, purchasing and delivering food and providing for other essential needs._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T745fa1f3-4f60-44db-b50c-1feb1a8e35f1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _I'm heartened Trump's paying a price._ **_But let's never forget there are 20 victims of intimate partner abuse each minute--100 in the time I've been writing this._** [**_Can we show them support by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to the Domestic Violence Resource Center to assist these brave survivors?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6f1b51eb-edfc-41d1-a183-5faa74d50eba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for just being good human beings._ Cliff
---

| | |

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T862f332c-cfa1-4194-9724-48149b3a4f51/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: McConnell Replacement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
Rumors are swirling that the 81-year-old Swamp boss may finally be nearing retirement.

| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: Mitch McConnell has been the Senate Republican "Leader" since George W. Bush was president. His 16-year tenure has been marked by corporate bailouts, lost wars, Obamacare, the Covid lockdowns, two impeachments of a Republican president, and an unending war against Senate conservatives.

Rumors are swirling that the 81-year-old Swamp boss may finally be nearing retirement. And several Republican Senators are reportedly angling to run to replace him.
---
---
Sen. Mitch McConnell holds a gun at the 2014 CPAC to prevent attendees from booing him. (_Photo by Gage Skidmore_)
---
We aren't endorsing any candidate for the job now, but we absolutely endorse new leadership, particularly a new generation of conservative leadership for Senate Republicans.

During his entire career, Mitch McConnell has represented the Swamp and its priorities. His idea of leadership is earmarks, budget-busting spending, ducking policy fights, and producing Republican votes for Democrat bills.

McConnell has won plaudits for years for privately and publicly attacking conservatives: Jim DeMint, Ted Cruz, Mike Lee, and others. He constantly complains about conservative Senate candidates, but the candidates McConnell supports -- like Arlen Specter and Charlie Crist -- have a curious habit of losing ... and becoming Democrats!

The next Republican Leader must understand that the party is not the one McConnell imagines: socially liberal, country club millionaires. Like the new GOP, the new conservative movement is a working-class party looking out for young families instead of big businesses.

The new generation of Republicans wants to fight the Left and win the Culture War. The issues that Republicans actually care about are the issues McConnell has always shied away from - immigration, abortion, woke indoctrination of our kids, and the corruption of the Deep State. McConnell likes Washington more than he likes actual Republican voters, and that fact will hold back the party and the country as long as he remains in power.

**Republican Senators have grumbled for years about McConnell. The difference now is that they're showing signs that they're ready to do something about it.**

In the 2024 elections, Republicans have a chance for a sweep -- to win control of the Senate, the House of Representatives, and the White House. But to truly win, we need more than a change of parties. We need a change of leaders.

**[Senate Conservatives Fund](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b60b0815bcbe4dc9b6f015bf8876276b&_e=q3pmtSnXBX28QDtwXB2bweSF07grz3AYDNH7eK3fOu6mhgyt1CQJ3nJ5HctonLwEY1ollDRF34OtFQRg6v-NL_oNtXE65WsQj1N9cqaPh3uYWmdpzGge4u0yVpavA3dbL5aB_vHjo6mMiEMc3HdwnSqal8mOFYrs3qIx51Z-gMhHqWzSQ6plC4SmZOlSGlQPIEulamcCeUAv2Q4kGKyxLRA6VXFFpOpCjrsZKnfeVP4rFaMpVYRYGKueV8isM8nY)** will continue doing our part: supporting conservatives in Senate races, including against McConnell's hand-picked lapdogs. We will continue to hold current leaders accountable, including in the looming fight over the federal debt ceiling. And finally, we will hold McConnell accountable and keep you updated about the leadership race heating up inside the Senate.

If McConnell is on his way out, conservatives could finally be on their way in. With your help, we will work to give America that opportunity. Sincerely,
---
---
Matt Hoskins Senior Advisor Senate Conservatives Fund
---
|
---
**PRIORITY SENATE CANDIDATES**
---
---
**END OF THE MONTH** **COUNTDOWN**
---

body:
Will you add your name to show our teachers just how much we appreciate their work?

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63045975/405409135/-345890914?refcode=EM_C_230509TeachersDay_TN_4_TESTA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWRiY2ZhZi1hMGVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pQh-uvxTI6FIUdBSg1upKHxpSU8auEGA1YGcwmrY8Ho=)
Team,

Today is National Teacher Appreciation Day, and we want to take this opportunity to uplift the tireless work our educators do every day.

Nikki’s grandmother was a proud union teacher who taught her the value of a good education, and how teachers are key in ensuring strong, prosperous communities. From learning to read to preparing our young people for the workforce, teachers impact our kids in countless ways. We hope you’ll join us today in telling them thank you.

[Will you sign our thank you card to show our teachers how much we appreciate their invaluable work in our communities?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63045976/405409136/2023010132?refcode=EM_C_230509TeachersDay_TN_4_TESTA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWRiY2ZhZi1hMGVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pQh-uvxTI6FIUdBSg1upKHxpSU8auEGA1YGcwmrY8Ho=&emci=dddbcfaf-a0ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=dedbcfaf-a0ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=13891387)

Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan.

Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead.

I'm not sure if you’ve seen what’s going on with the debt ceiling – but it's a mess.

Far right Republicans seem to think that cutting federal spending on President Biden's climate change initiatives and student loan forgiveness is a better solution than cleanly raising the debt ceiling, _which we did 3 times under President Trump without batting an eye._

Lifting the debt ceiling is the only way to evade an economic crisis and possible recession. It's unfathomable that some of my colleagues across the aisle are willing to let hard working Americans suffer just so they can get their way.

[**To show that engaged Americans like you are with me on this, I'm creating a petition demanding that the House pass the debt ceiling increase as soon as possible. I'm opening this to citizen co-signers, and I'm hoping you’ll be one. Can you add your name by midnight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63046131/405409619/-1049944418?source=LOC_EM_PET_2023.05.08_B1_Debt-Ceiling_Main-90o&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTMwY2M0OS1hMWVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nLi94h5D9IkHaXV7yY4FVcshnfRehJeDoOfFHT72Mzw=&emci=43fb7602-77eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=b530cc49-a1ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=11913588) [SIGN NOW >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63046132/405409620/-1049944418?source=LOC_EM_PET_2023.05.08_B1_Debt-Ceiling_Main-90o&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTMwY2M0OS1hMWVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nLi94h5D9IkHaXV7yY4FVcshnfRehJeDoOfFHT72Mzw=&emci=43fb7602-77eb-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=b530cc49-a1ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=11913588) Together we will make our voices heard,

name: Update via DanKildee.com
subject: We’ve got to work together on this, but we don’t have long
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| Did you get Dan’s call-to-action? He’s calling on Republicans and Democrats to stop the political games and negotiate a compromise to raise the nation’s debt ceiling, as well as pass a responsible national budget.

Dan needs to hear from you, especially on which parts of the latest Republican cuts proposed to health care, veterans benefits and early childhood education you’re concerned about.

Answer by midnight tomorrow:

**_[https://go.dankildee.com/a/debtceilingsurvey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63046298/405410052/-2004309527?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230509_SV_1.2_0_1MO_vanity_NA_NA_DebtCeiling&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDNmMWQwMC1hMmVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JhDxhW9BTd9ZbjaCk43FSRQdKJizMphVglF4llXZrv0=&emci=c1a0d391-90ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=303f1d00-a2ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)_**

* * *
**_Here’s Dan’s original message:_**

In less than a month, unless Congress acts, the U.S. will default on its obligations.

This would be devastating for Michigan’s working families—defaulting on our nation’s debt could trigger a job-killing recession, mean higher out-of-pocket costs because of rising interest rates, and potentially crash the stock market in a way that would hurt the retirement security of older Americans.

Both parties must come together to both raise the debt ceiling and pass a responsible national budget. Paying our nation’s bills should not be a partisan issue.

But since the start of the new Congress, there have been no serious proposals put forward to address this looming deadline. Instead, Republicans have proposed extreme cuts that would eliminate jobs, hurt our economy and take away health care from veterans.

Congress should not be playing political games with the full faith and credit of the United States. **_[If you agree, will you add your name and let me know which of these proposed Republican cuts you are most concerned about?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63046299/405410053/-2004309527?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230509_SV_1.2_0_1MO_vanity_NA_NA_DebtCeiling&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDNmMWQwMC1hMmVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JhDxhW9BTd9ZbjaCk43FSRQdKJizMphVglF4llXZrv0=&emci=c1a0d391-90ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=303f1d00-a2ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)_**
**[Answer Here→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63046300/405410054/-2004309527?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230509_SV_1.2_0_1MO_vanity_NA_NA_DebtCeiling&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDNmMWQwMC1hMmVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JhDxhW9BTd9ZbjaCk43FSRQdKJizMphVglF4llXZrv0=&emci=c1a0d391-90ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=303f1d00-a2ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)**
Congress has, dozens of times, raised the debt limit, including under both Republican and Democratic presidents. Under former President Trump, Republicans ran up trillions of dollars of debt and voted to raise the debt limit three times, all while giving a huge unpaid for tax cut to the wealthiest Americans and biggest corporations.

Going into default would send the U.S. economy into a tailspin. America wouldn’t be able to pay Social Security and Medicare benefits, the salaries of service members, or for health care of those on Medicaid. It would signal to the world that the U.S. can’t be counted on to meet its obligations.

The time for political games is long over. Congress needs to act immediately to both raise the debt ceiling and pass a responsible national budget that reduces the deficit in the long-term while focusing on working families, not the wealthy and well-connected.

If you agree, I need to hear from you. Please answer my survey today:

**_[https://go.dankildee.com/a/debtceilingsurvey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63046301/405410055/-2004309527?source=EM_NBI_DK_20230509_SV_1.2_0_1MO_vanity_NA_NA_DebtCeiling&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDNmMWQwMC1hMmVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JhDxhW9BTd9ZbjaCk43FSRQdKJizMphVglF4llXZrv0=&emci=c1a0d391-90ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=303f1d00-a2ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=31479900)_**

Thank you,

Dan

name: Katie Porter
subject: More than a flowery graphic for Mother's Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Let's celebrate Mother's Day with more than flowers and create policies that support families.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=22613%2E3422442%2E9dZTNm)
Derek,
When my daughter Betsy attended preschool at UC Irvine, where I taught, her preschool tuition cost more than the college classes next door.
As we get ready to celebrate Mother's Day, you'll see plenty of politicians posting about how much they love moms, and their respective votes. **But let's skip the flowery graphics and actually pass legislation to provide families with paid family leave and affordable child care.**
The high cost of child care and lack of paid family leave means it's often impossible for talented people to stay in the workforce and succeed at the highest levels—and our country is falling behind because of it. Affordable child care isn't just about kids: Our global competitors invest in families because it benefits a country's entire economy.
**As a single mom of school aged kids, I know firsthand how the policies that affect women, children, and families have been put on the backburner.**
In the Senate, I'll work to put families first and continue to advocate for paid family leave, affordable child care and other pro-family policies.
**[But I can only do this with your support. Will you consider chipping in to our movement today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230509-1?refcode=EMAH09_1_MOM_20230509_V1_F&refcode2=22613_3422442_9dZTNm&akid=22613%2E3422442%2E9dZTNm)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230509-1?amount=&refcode=EMAH09_1_MOM_20230509_V1_F&refcode2=22613_3422442_9dZTNm&akid=22613%2E3422442%2E9dZTNm)**
Thank you as always for your support!
—Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAH09_1_MOM_20230509_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=22613_3422442_9dZTNm&akid=22613%2E3422442%2E9dZTNm)**
