name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: Life in prison for doing his job?
body:
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5e84125aaee04a0bacfcf91484497233&_e=0KOfbWZBJtScYRDDLm8S68IcPKI65N0fUlLz3eM-tXtwvryu603gNP_RPhsxJipVXSMk-2ZYUeToZxZncDR1QYlyQTpmfUGmCFb-jdvAOE_ceBqzzIDLCEtUaGIgDgN7NudZNaclXN0hkmrrRdxJF1AJONyjnMjM78EYcu_VEw_o2zUM1UhJsDTf07BcJkOsm5bMZfY5PZq62G2p2brSTcLF5nvhTsiyeXOj2en1vDqGioou3kE4ies1qJJlIyi_4dpDdvSYwvY-cJWvD6WiIqGim9cdblBxnQob2ED8lP0Z1MQs9WMijw2qjdXIz5SSCnx-PXXoKQKKvaIBgCEzTKXDaG1-xbPNCcVOqT0wrZ4%3D)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5e84125aaee04a0bacfcf91484497233&_e=0KOfbWZBJtScYRDDLm8S68IcPKI65N0fUlLz3eM-tXtwvryu603gNP_RPhsxJipVXSMk-2ZYUeToZxZncDR1QYlyQTpmfUGmCFb-jdvAOE_ceBqzzIDLCEtUaGIgDgN7NudZNaclXN0hkmrrRdxJF1AJONyjnMjM78EYcu_VEw_o2zUM1UhJsDTf07BcJkOsm5bchQt5UBpHPDN_fh_eH3QTNHeV1uLsye9Sa3VP-8lhV7OlkOJScirQMZlzldkb3tkBfcPFURKiBIWfE-cp3dPJx8PD2b3CGdHwD3JiodV8jU9zMMQSS97pXNFBbOks0AvOwPIMslPzkq2MWJjRbQtz9dNvyGyxGVnfYkCu1io%3D) [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5e84125aaee04a0bacfcf91484497233&_e=0KOfbWZBJtScYRDDLm8S68IcPKI65N0fUlLz3eM-tXtwvryu603gNP_RPhsxJipVXSMk-2ZYUeToZxZncDR1QYlyQTpmfUGmCFb-jdvAOE_ceBqzzIDLCEtUaGIgDgN7NudZNaclXN0hkmrrRdxJF1AJONyjnMjM78EYcu_VEw_o2zUM1UhJsDTf07BcJkOsNjhNgb8F1PsqVEpAHyPFmJffylP-fx5f0pUElQa4sCO9OctloUyPn2exvb_KcJjrHW2ErV3k6piiXCD8ul-aqoNo8c4WTaoPLEbl2mHTyKM5zDLXqTMeStFv9JInngmN6_Hh1WhRC3Ha_Yp6X-nlZie2YcbmBh1prv3R0y5QcXY%3D)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael 's_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5e84125aaee04a0bacfcf91484497233&_e=0KOfbWZBJtScYRDDLm8S68IcPKI65N0fUlLz3eM-tXtwvryu603gNP_RPhsxJipVXSMk-2ZYUeToZxZncDR1QYlyQTpmfUGmCFb-jdvAOE_ceBqzzIDLCEtUaGIgDgN7NudZNaclXN0hkmrrRdxJF1AJONyjnMjM78EYcu_VEw_o2zUM1UhJsDTf07BcJkOsdmzik4JLYZ-mS7LjnzocAopsTMEEwT9NcmT0uNxXFDoA4MkKts0FMLZq5s_pHJ00PBmWXG-bLGc69juDjNl5N7E2pxuWHw2zY_VVNQ9Cdl5EBksfLI0ZUVk7NWeR8-kQbC7-I6Ce7A_xJril6LI7-GF0vffTjcEziX8lwWgxFRo%3D)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5e84125aaee04a0bacfcf91484497233&_e=0KOfbWZBJtScYRDDLm8S68IcPKI65N0fUlLz3eM-tXtwvryu603gNP_RPhsxJipVXSMk-2ZYUeToZxZncDR1QYlyQTpmfUGmCFb-jdvAOE_ceBqzzIDLCEtUaGIgDgN7NudZNaclXN0hkmrrRdxJF1AJONyjnMjM78EYcu_VEw_o2zUM1UhJsDTf07BcJkOs_Es9kh2XTbY_sCEctc1alujQWn8scKVZOt-EPQR51vfW6p2-2LmgDyFYVpZ-qLc1hviSuEDsEbvbw9aA31S_fYP_mVevp3bkAi2c4xvsio298y8aC74rP0-0v90z_aoIxxfiwXlOXYAaXn07yJnUM_0yULujfUpCn_EStXm0s6g%3D)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" - and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5e84125aaee04a0bacfcf91484497233&_e=0KOfbWZBJtScYRDDLm8S68IcPKI65N0fUlLz3eM-tXtwvryu603gNP_RPhsxJipVXSMk-2ZYUeToZxZncDR1QYlyQTpmfUGmCFb-jdvAOE_ceBqzzIDLCEtUaGIgDgN7NudZNaclXN0hkmrrRdxJF1AJONyjnMjM78EYcu_VEw_o2zUM1UhJsDTf07BcJkOs9wQlGfhn3LWYj-O9Vn_kMnWK6ajjh6rbPPywZmDyWlqAhSHdjCood6qjGmjyHRETwYVqvY27rphOy3k-2YYruEedpeBHwPLboXgr5TjECtVPvnK-ElstzkPUcOOg5frwyHfYSb-yjfdfhQGV1v0GYApld-xLJ4qC1DTC88l3WZc%3D)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5e84125aaee04a0bacfcf91484497233&_e=0KOfbWZBJtScYRDDLm8S68IcPKI65N0fUlLz3eM-tXtwvryu603gNP_RPhsxJipVXSMk-2ZYUeToZxZncDR1QYlyQTpmfUGmCFb-jdvAOE_ceBqzzIDLCEtUaGIgDgN7NudZNaclXN0hkmrrRdxJF1AJONyjnMjM78EYcu_VEw_o2zUM1UhJsDTf07BcJkOsQEYr04oO_amavp2JzU4jsgUxqU60mUd-7ugcTKAHp2ah7dresnPxwEOib6xCXqata6VNlmTpj7-rsiLPjIR4kqk7FlOVXAhDCxLEHkPm598y4j2bo6NJcJ4o2hiblZbt3sfI8MwLrL0e65p-2iGsl4X65HNPNYyqaFk6V1pEwP8%3D)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.

_That's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5e84125aaee04a0bacfcf91484497233&_e=0KOfbWZBJtScYRDDLm8S68IcPKI65N0fUlLz3eM-tXtwvryu603gNP_RPhsxJipVXSMk-2ZYUeToZxZncDR1QYlyQTpmfUGmCFb-jdvAOE_ceBqzzIDLCEtUaGIgDgN7NudZNaclXN0hkmrrRdxJF1AJONyjnMjM78EYcu_VEw_o2zUM1UhJsDTf07BcJkOs7g64WVxReCKjSl3TYLFk6pleMTtLmn9tAipe5R24pa7HP_5bpwXBFzRedY5GvD7WmcSdwrI1-Q_MX35_XHOU_YcnykQHtjD_lUJJxDflbfCVyR-v9BrgfhtVkPAZkBpyI1sWXM2SKEXYO_KVMyPZa3WLtMR9JH-j1QlEnYPpeQ8%3D)
_That's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5e84125aaee04a0bacfcf91484497233&_e=0KOfbWZBJtScYRDDLm8S68IcPKI65N0fUlLz3eM-tXtwvryu603gNP_RPhsxJipVXSMk-2ZYUeToZxZncDR1QYlyQTpmfUGmCFb-jdvAOE_ceBqzzIDLCEtUaGIgDgN7NudZNaclXN0hkmrrRdxJF1AJONyjnMjM78EYcu_VEw_o2zUM1UhJsDTf07BcJkOsuDNnlw353bd8_NkDa7w622ACKsGWj3IkR1GrvKFyHkA9Ur37BUYD2tgJCDfCILYNeodvgJTS-BcGGpGdgQ_z89nrbBolsV8vNLR5OJ4dLbbnLDCYJC4stsQXXQ5xNnjfjlFXsJoIok0SUhj11myv_scHQLi7JU0baQXZrRi2fVw%3D)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

clean_body: I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael. I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael. Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas. But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck. That's Michael in the photo. In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve. I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job. Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty. It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years. What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need. I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist. Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats. Fear of losing their jobs. I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back. But I was wrong. So now Michael 's life is at stake for simply doing his job and we have nobody to turn to except for good hearted strangers like you. Let me give you some more of the details... Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade." The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police. Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man. When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car. The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him. Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired. The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene. My son suffered back and leg injuries. Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck. In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community. There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day. He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others. But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years. Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did? That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died. But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified. And then our whole world was rocked. Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted. Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said: "We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never." I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court. We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense. After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser. They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" - and helping him violated their terms of service. So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds. No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process. Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime." Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael. With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading. Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have. LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty. The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department. And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son! You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers. Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a I pray you will consider doing so. Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers. My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal. That's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn That's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today. Sincerely, Margaret Mary Dunn PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind to help Michael will mean so much to my family. \---------------- More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter! name: Lucas Kunce
subject: It’s weird, it’s creepy, and I just don’t get it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Josh Hawley is obsessed with controlling our lives.
#
Peter,
Josh Hawley thinks the only way to be a man is to be just like him — **and this month, he’s even publishing a whole book about it:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/32412?refcode=em20230509-3102&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3102%2E614464%2ETH8iGX)
This guy wants to control what happens in your bedroom, in your doctor’s office, and what you do with your own body. He’s telling us the only way to be a man is to be exactly like him — and he's even got a book about it!
**It’s weird, it’s creepy, and I just don’t get it.**
**I’m the 13-year Marine veteran and Democrat running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate — and I need your help to get it done.[So Peter, will you chip in $10 or whatever you can afford to my grassroots campaign today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/32412?refcode=em20230509-3102&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3102%2E614464%2ETH8iGX)**

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
Pro-Family, Pro-Life, 100%
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017fB_HAJod0rDVa7qG0VFUZh_ca1ROg8KvU9gH2sXxvj846h5HeGU16zXtPiZKC-5TNLtfe2ZZ_hdg8FcYnrVVth-1-xQioX-X4wLlF7fkqaiUMjrSYYzqzBSfirLVKhAkVpEVMc3CRkTfs8w4ol7PLpQ0Hwr-h8Z0D_GRo7M1EU=&c=vXRSDTuWxilYzGoQsOy7WJJxsFuClzYZgFRL2i-RjEsfL4BrU5rYdA==&ch=RsFGtMi69sRVFrQFcQJGa80xsPrkvHT6fceeHmGp29Oa1dHNgUCVkA==)

| Family Foundation Scorecard Released
---
| | |
---|---
|
Dear Friends,

Once again, the Family Foundation Scorecard has me at the top of the list with a perfect 100%.

My commitment to Life is unquestionable and I have the voting record to prove it. My opponents, on the other hand, have either sponsored anti-family legislation such as the poorly named Equal Rights Amendment, or have no voting record at all. These are significant contrasts in this Republican Primary.

Take a look. [Here's the link](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017fB_HAJod0rDVa7qG0VFUZh_ca1ROg8KvU9gH2sXxvj846h5HeGU14xmiSPFH_RO4H1KZDeO4tuVChC_Q2PzMhpbM_bgYxao9MsWzSfEedTn00Vv6Q8P9xGtFNbA0Rqr4h-CfoaoCIkhkS42BfjJnipJfm6YdQGF4G4ADhbU2wgeWstSe4aIJWSToiAdKQz3SmJbI9dVs7fYxa9p_DGBBtr5xPk4Tj-f4BmKFjhGIpmU8W_atPVDMsCkZ7hLPqGHPTa-2Jq7XXKhvVmQ9o1dRU86tJcNIVsUv0dVPfW4hGb13c-2S53iQHiy07qc_AQA&c=vXRSDTuWxilYzGoQsOy7WJJxsFuClzYZgFRL2i-RjEsfL4BrU5rYdA==&ch=RsFGtMi69sRVFrQFcQJGa80xsPrkvHT6fceeHmGp29Oa1dHNgUCVkA==), and a picture of the Family Foundation Scorecard is below.

For God & Country,
Amanda Chase

subject: Re: You can help reunite families for Mother’sDay:

The immoral and unconstitutional practice of money bail is keeping families apart this Mother’s Day. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvJODvhoBlbv9zOgMkdiyAUZWd9x6BsSijYjf8KdFkp3cTPI1CQt3qjj7QNmuCJByyMUo6Ryre4WQ-7hnIgqIZKPk0DBr2_aV1Zr4XpaEzgpQkqBLY_-A6uk399fQ_owX_iLhEiPUZ0aaW5HP7OB_bBk4Ny2Z1vIUkeFcI7Gth_YTMxz_1aeIg4084WhsZYhcXF5hdKItopVEpd-eusa74HA/3w1/6hCmt6EwTQiFIRl8ng4lLQ/h0/95CzzLKoHZ95iN34KSsBlDgdoF67FDzm6X-19fp4OtE)

Friend, Sunday is Mother’s Day. And one way you can celebrate and honor mothers is by donating to post bail for mothers, Black women, and gender non-conforming people who were jailed solely because they could not afford cash bail. The cash bail system, also known as wealth-based pretrial detention, punishes people who have not been convicted of anything, forcing them to await trial in cages because they can’t afford to post bail. [**Can you chip in to bail funds today for mothers and caregivers so that they can come home to their families and communities for Mother’s Day and beyond?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKh3Aco7S8BA05s1hMWtPtndMpBT2R7SivqUatLStr8xIYfO6apKXob3cRay7eGuRbivvXNdXZq5g_-sjFRKU3z0efMaMgVV6YBJB01esDCyd6YDUeCodL6Mnw2a3hNijvdQR0OWyws0vNFXQGjAYz0xQNe2Z1J0qaiL9R0aI0LuiC0oysDEr4RLOztA0tyLApPBzlEu_NQhQ0L96LPo107-xmmaKNiBHTdiorCJFeVhH260RN0ZpurwwqX9sBLohw9LbpFf2xI-kZao8EbjjRFNVw4_7WqUY3J-lEVD-8UwrLE0GkldwcnErSCZd-SAVanJFYQJhsp7WrfsmGM1t0NjFdQwk-_sNYvQQ0CFZnJovjcPaiGlvYCaVikRZBtMkT/3w1/6hCmt6EwTQiFIRl8ng4lLQ/h1/EqCTx4qVrIDC5_VuSXTDVvTPvNojhZ_9nyeyayQoBqU) | [DONATE TO BAIL FUNDS TODAY](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKh3Aco7S8BA05s1hMWtPtndMpBT2R7SivqUatLStr8xIYfO6apKXob3cRay7eGuRbNHbPipgmZh7h0z96BiEV-Qmv5Sx979ny5WW_AoliSdC9vOdziYPrxLTVOKE8PJQLJSEkWkNGmgoWlye70_orSyeFdvVc10C9AAH-mcWIbn3rjDrlV6Toeq7KYz875QwXcNXR0hNb6aNt49Ff_I8exR1aqdlIUb465RkfaSDtd8sMZYjf-5KeORmkd5G2vrQ4kjsck0gwIA37O3WJxX-f7-vVEd1KgsfExC5Sl2Wu68msfuiCU9Wynavi8ZzSQ0MkaCzOoJBW0gUDiv4BKDovNAsGx2uwcIGUYUtGTGM9y3pSoGaD5ooZVyBMwy2YFnS3/3w1/6hCmt6EwTQiFIRl8ng4lLQ/h2/9ZqKlZIfNl7VgOOaTn6IWBKxztoSMwXuqw6_3dwq4f8)

**Michigan Liberation Education Fund, a project of Mothering Justice, runs campaigns to transform our criminal legal system and to create a more just world today.** Your donation will go directly toward bail funds, posting bail for people who would otherwise spend Mother’s Day separated from their families.
**Together, we are fighting for racial justice, for an end to poverty, and for communities to have what they need to thrive.** The racial wealth gap keeps widening, and our anti-Black criminal legal system continues to criminalize communities like ours.
[**Please, chip in $5, $25 or more to help mothers, Black women, and gender non-conforming people post bail and come home this Mother’s Day.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKh3Aco7S8BA05s1hMWtPtndMpBT2R7SivqUatLStr8xIYfO6apKXob3cRay7eGuRbHbjfTCzI1m3YDupe-5VIgemekU2H7ORcHlXEJ6W-ABcEQtsiqU9UPkUD2IaFMpOIlM9xC5kdveSlWfJgiDvh4sE2mS3VWzGUy5C2TYPuTm4Orx-BkS6HVSypAdyiaHR9Mvtolz8HD8GvpJnyMeNAJQFFTVmfM6Q8yv1Pt0QRb--s-ePBdkhB-CNAptz9kkDUf-0N2hGp8Iq6m29lao2m4Jd-SMNyuZI2vVJIEN3WjIsllWm0wN6XqGAcBs9eN2WFGT8tdVwdfvOPDrzmvIij6vwJnZbXZlkxRT19XqK5muEtDSbgw8pMwjFmHqzbgepq/3w1/6hCmt6EwTQiFIRl8ng4lLQ/h3/VltIDWLdv87N36mYqBM7vr9sFAzvLDrsFlncNDxKnH0)

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Mon, May 8, 2023
Subject: You can help reunite families for Mother’s Day:
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
Each year, families are kept apart on Mother’s Day because of the United States’ immoral and unconstitutional practice of money bail. This system punishes people who have not been convicted of anything, forcing them to await trial in cages because they can’t afford to post bail.
Here in Michigan, Michigan Liberation has done incredible work on the ground to free mothers, Black women, and gender non-conforming people who were jailed solely because they could not afford to post bail, highlight the role of profiteers in the bail bonds industry, and expose the massive underlying social inequities leading to contact with the legal system.
[**Please donate today so Michigan Liberation Education Fund and the coalition can pay the bails, fines, and fees of mothers who are sitting in jail because they cannot afford bail. Your donation will help reunite families this Mother’s Day and beyond.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKh3Aco7S8BA05s1hMWtPtndMpBT2R7SivqUatLStr8xIYfO6apKXob3cRay7eGuRbEEPP7enz-iJPYwFo_BO1CEm5G3bNWP_O86mHF3CJRc8NUYEs2mzFkFburbNJypNO-GXVV0hJLx_NycMer2tXS2-UuoVzzdRbA9FuqF_XWvmiJI4gHUURwwYPaTn_d9bEUAwFaKESWVHkeSWKOiDvSC59DPtB74p5d7Tt0lGL6pkwbJy18WjORWSEj1HKLDaxNWorsAfwn48XuPxOlwDsCdChoPQxkTBAcAmXKYgQ6DEdgAyzDdZelJYVl0_dAlT8CKrAV-Tb8vSymyNwjwKfAPVCbxZfSynyShUNrmUrsgeqFYhsPF6Mj-GW4V6tJgWs8g1mE2irz_4y0QRmeRvUWQ/3w1/6hCmt6EwTQiFIRl8ng4lLQ/h10/stj0WNoLGnmI1UGv-v-sgNYQxNBx8V-YyLnVbfX9Qog)

Due to a long history of systemic racism, there’s a huge racial wealth gap, and Black people are also much more likely to be targeted for arrests. Black folks are disproportionately impacted by unjust money bail.
**What started as a bailout, which our campaign has helped fundraise for since 2019, has evolved into a quest for transformational change across the legal system in Michigan.**
This is important, game-changing work. And it’s urgent.
When caregivers are locked in cages, entire families and communities suffer. Even a few days behind bars can result in irreparable physical, emotional, and financial harm: Parents may lose their jobs, housing, and even their children.
[**Please donate as generously as you can today to help mothers and caregivers post bail before Mother’s Day. Any amount you can spare right now will truly make a difference.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKh3Aco7S8BA05s1hMWtPtndMpBT2R7SivqUatLStr8xIYfO6apKXob3cRay7eGuRbeq5rvQWLsiz8xDkrhvX5OFpdyMNzTEhAo8L0ctcXtvnb25GiZiQDpxKKrhvUIzT4817QDh-ns4r_ksyd-sk6vLTdyaLUT9JkhQQj-QcWw7P6o44NBd1In5AtKg-IPoiRiK70ZptqqHdGCpo583JJMNTCnXTU-n2tLVxzZYzkmdob4Ct-ikftHaLjdbe0CbElyit917aGhrS7XMF4OHDmsctyrgOWwyM9EXf-l6NOzqNsmtn25_OR16mH4yb0E8WAf-CgnqwwzUBAXlPaaYM9u5VDMsiQX9yJDYKzCI4jTAL2CuKST3G0IHsmM9esrknTvV3xJQIWMzRtvkCH7YoHBA/3w1/6hCmt6EwTQiFIRl8ng4lLQ/h12/z7giuclrK09KzBFOzcsJPTLIomAxURZ9E3ZPSPW1rIA)

clean_body: The immoral and unconstitutional practice of money bail is keeping families apart this Mother’s Day. | | | Friend, Sunday is Mother’s Day. And one way you can celebrate and honor mothers is by donating to post bail for mothers, Black women, and gender non-conforming people who were jailed solely because they could not afford cash bail. The cash bail system, also known as wealth-based pretrial detention, punishes people who have not been convicted of anything, forcing them to await trial in cages because they can’t afford to post bail. | Michigan Liberation Education Fund, a project of Mothering Justice, runs campaigns to transform our criminal legal system and to create a more just world today. Your donation will go directly toward bail funds, posting bail for people who would otherwise spend Mother’s Day separated from their families. Together, we are fighting for racial justice, for an end to poverty, and for communities to have what they need to thrive. The racial wealth gap keeps widening, and our anti-Black criminal legal system continues to criminalize communities like ours. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly to Michigan Liberation Education Fund, a project of Mothering Justice: | | | | | | | | | With solidarity and care, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Mon, May 8, 2023 Subject: You can help reunite families for Mother’s Day: To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Each year, families are kept apart on Mother’s Day because of the United States’ immoral and unconstitutional practice of money bail. This system punishes people who have not been convicted of anything, forcing them to await trial in cages because they can’t afford to post bail. Here in Michigan, Michigan Liberation has done incredible work on the ground to free mothers, Black women, and gender non-conforming people who were jailed solely because they could not afford to post bail, highlight the role of profiteers in the bail bonds industry, and expose the massive underlying social inequities leading to contact with the legal system. Due to a long history of systemic racism, there’s a huge racial wealth gap, and Black people are also much more likely to be targeted for arrests. Black folks are disproportionately impacted by unjust money bail. What started as a bailout, which our campaign has helped fundraise for since 2019, has evolved into a quest for transformational change across the legal system in Michigan. This is important, game-changing work. And it’s urgent. When caregivers are locked in cages, entire families and communities suffer. Even a few days behind bars can result in irreparable physical, emotional, and financial harm: Parents may lose their jobs, housing, and even their children. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly to Michigan Liberation Education Fund, a project of Mothering Justice: | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much. With love, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . | Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. I’m reaching out with some exciting news!

We have two exciting virtual fundraisers coming up to support our endorsed Pennsylvania climate champions Sara Innamorato and Helen Gym!

Sara has fought hard to hold big polluters accountable, ensure we have clean air and safe drinking water, and address climate change. As County Executive, we know she’ll bring that same passion to office, but _**we need your support.**_

Team – it’s Teacher Appreciation Week!

As a former public school teacher himself, Greg understands how hard American educators work to teach, support, and encourage the next generation. Especially over the last three years, teachers across the country have displayed incredible levels of resilience and commitment to our students – even in the most unprecedented of circumstances.

**Teachers are the unsung heroes of our country.** That’s why, this Teacher Appreciation Week, our team is taking every opportunity to celebrate and thank educators across Ohio.

**[Can we count on you to add your name to our card to honor the phenomenal group of teachers across our district?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63047306/405415636/132473599?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODc2OGNlOS1hNGVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hQF3C-qkajz5jIFbFakrlPLDNofh5ooloCTBMtA1GsE=&emci=7257644b-99ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=18768ce9-a4ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=10283101)**

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Not-so-great news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We’ll keep this quick.
#
Derek, this isn’t the email we want to be sending as we approach the halfway point of the quarter.
Buuut, despite a ton of effort, we’re running behind our fundraising goal for our next public FEC deadline — and it’s got us looking a little bit like this.👇
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230509-1?refcode=em20230509-1-8367&refcode2=8367_434096_9OWF6B&akid=8367%2E434096%2E9OWF6B)
Occasional slowdowns in fundraising are pretty normal for campaigns, but we were really hoping to reach our goal + fuel our work for the rest of the entire year. _Now, it’s looking unlikely unless we see a big surge soon._
**[Will you please chip in $5 — or anything you can, even one or two bucks — to ensure we don’t fall short before our next FEC fundraising deadline?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230509-1?refcode=em20230509-1-8367&refcode2=8367_434096_9OWF6B&akid=8367%2E434096%2E9OWF6B)**

Without supporters like you, John would never have defeated Dr. Oz, flipped PA blue, and became a U.S. Senator. So we know you’ve got our backs.
Thank you, thank you, thank you!!!
💛 Team Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230509-8367-footer&t=1&refcode2=8367_434096_9OWF6B&akid=8367%2E434096%2E9OWF6B)**

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: One week to save the future of abortion rights in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
In exactly one week, there is a Special Election that will determine which party has the majority in Pennsylvania’s House of Representatives.

Hi Derek, this is important:

**In exactly one week, there is a Special Election that will determine which party has the majority in Pennsylvania’s House of Representatives.**

If Democrat Heather Boyd wins, Democrats will keep our slim majority and can continue to protect fundamental freedoms like your freedom to choose here in Pennsylvania.

**But if we lose, it could give Republicans the chance to pass an abortion ban.**

**[So I’m not exaggerating when I say this is one of the most important races in the country right now. We can’t afford to lose, so I’m humbly asking you: will you donate $5 or whatever you can directly to Heather’s campaign today to help us keep abortion legal in Pennsylvania?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63048034/405418777/-1059842178?refcode=email_050923_shapiro-boyd&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjUyMGEyYS1hN2VlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=df7i5qnMi98wsEQP8WSHKMrp4nMLPAxRpri8_DlZ0Tk=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Heather Boyd will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63048035/405418778/-1059842178?refcode=email_050923_shapiro-boyd&amount=5&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjUyMGEyYS1hN2VlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=df7i5qnMi98wsEQP8WSHKMrp4nMLPAxRpri8_DlZ0Tk=)

Heather is a devoted mother, former teacher, and public servant. She’s worked for years to elect Democrats up and down the ticket – and she’s exactly the person we need in Harrisburg to protect against the extreme elements threatening our political system.

But she’s counting on all of us to step up and make sure she has the resources to win, because the stakes in this race couldn’t be higher.

name: Cori Bush HQ
subject: Fighting for Jana Elementary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
No one should have to live with hazardous radiation in our communities.
#
Peter,
In October, radioactive waste dating back to the Manhattan Project was found in classrooms, the playground and elsewhere at Jana Elementary School in Florissant, MO.
**That's why last month, Cori introduced the _Justice for Jana Elementary Act of 2023_ to require the cleanup of Jana Elementary School.**
This urgently-needed legislation would require the Army Corp of Engineers to:
* Direct the Army Corps to establish new remediation goals to clean up Jana Elementary;
* Test all Hazelwood School District schools for radioactive contamination;
* Direct the Department of Energy to review all testing performed at the school and determine if this testing was reliable and;
* Create a fund to permit localities with schools impacted by these atomic projects to request financial assistance for radioactive testing or the construction of new schools.

**No one should have to live alongside harmful radiation.** Cori and our movement has always pushed for environmental justice and remediation efforts and we don't plan on slowing down now. [**And that's why we're asking if you can sign our petition as a citizen co-sponsor for the Justice for Jana Elementary Act?**](https://act.coribush.org/sign/fight-for-jana-elementary?source=em20230509-2661&t=1&akid=2661%2E1082990%2EJz0aw0)
**[Sign Your Name](https://act.coribush.org/sign/fight-for-jana-elementary?source=em20230509-2661&t=2&akid=2661%2E1082990%2EJz0aw0)**
This toxic discovery at Jana Elementary came right after a report found contamination in the wooded area near the Coldwater Creek — a designated Superfund site, a designation the government gives to especially polluted locations. For decades, this contamination has been linked to an increased rate of some cancers.
Even before she arrived on Capitol Hill, Cori advocated for the cleanup of Coldwater Creek. Cori also introduced the Coldwater Creek Signage Act, which would require signs to be posted along the creek to warn residents of the dangerous radioactive exposure, and initiated a federal review with the Government Accountability Office for the cleanup of the creek.
**Solutions and accountability are long overdue.** Our schools and communities deserve protection from radioactive contamination and other types of environmental hazards — and Cori won't stop fighting until our communities are safe and thriving.
[**Will you stand with Cori and our movement's efforts today to help our communities by adding your name as a citizen co-sponsor for these essential bills?**](https://act.coribush.org/sign/fight-for-jana-elementary?source=em20230509-2661&t=3&akid=2661%2E1082990%2EJz0aw0)
**[Add Your Name](https://act.coribush.org/sign/fight-for-jana-elementary?source=em20230509-2661&t=4&akid=2661%2E1082990%2EJz0aw0)**
Thank you for taking action today!
In solidarity,
Cori Bush HQ

Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.coribush.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=2661%2E1082990%2EJz0aw0)

Hey, Peter,

I know I’ve been reaching out a lot, but it’s been a while since I heard back from you. Is everything okay?

You see, I know how crazy things get, but let me take a moment to explain why your support is so critical, even more than a year out from the election.

Democrats are raising millions to defeat me, in fact, I’m one of their top targets to unseat in the 2024 election. This is the most purple district in the country and was held by a Democrat just three years ago. **Not to mention, the Left is more motivated than ever to take back the majority.**

So, now you see why I have to keep emailing you... [**I know money is tight, but can I rely on you to send just three dollars my way today?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ccacdd86ce0d41eea47f706f30b1e1a4&_e=jb_skrRLu_kssk5aGFV9FTsDg9NST2RE1yCjA7ax9tiW_u9-3tCbR9CZZQtGskOtnojVID-zPQ9az7n39dWquU6lqJAJzGkYVUjlgqJamkFzWqFP8sMSB5m6j8HydMkOLngDLZe4Z9mW4NZnSV4KZfx1F8shzXh615Hi39719j2yrynb20BLaPPo30aw_Yj1cVxO3ol5xj3kSBgaU1NUiIRlEU8LsHx-Dj_sJnVK8doZya9Icf6nRnb72yr4jBze-zdL1N274yKQmRHa7skwLNagR4HVqnHWzwEsNEPz85KyOg3cFfoUhVrUTSyza2nHUIK0uvnTci_xz7YK5vCDGEWFIIizY4LLvCFDjeGdSrtl8yJuSp3t1MdUUUcD21qc)

clean_body: Every eyeball is on this one. | = Sit down for this, Peter. The New York Times and Fox News rarely agree on anything, but they both recognize that a Democrat has a good chance of taking the governor's mansion this year in deep-red Mississippi. | The Mississippi Governor Race is “Surprisingly Close” \- Fox News The Mississippi Governor race is “turning into one of the most interesting races of 2023” \- The New York Times = Tate Reeves is one of the most deeply unpopular governors in the nation — 57% of voters say they would prefer another candidate over him. He’s been caught in the middle of the worst corruption scandals in Mississippi history for helping funnel over a million dollars to his personal trainer. Meanwhile, we have watched the tail lights of young people leave Mississippi. And it’s because they don’t feel like there’s any hope in our state for them to be able to have a bright future. And why should they? Reeves seems more focused on helping the ultra-wealthy and special interests than the people who really need it. In Mississippi, ‘the Governor Has Been So Bad That This Time Might Be Different’ \- The New York Times Enter Brandon Presley. Poll after poll shows Brandon and Reeves NECK AND NECK — it’s that close! Brandon has even gained support from both sides of the aisle — thanks to his track record of keeping his promises to working families. Mississippi hasn’t had a gubernatorial election this competitive in decades. But things are about to shift dramatically. = = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for your support, Team Brandon | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. clean_body: Background on Biden Administration handling of border at end of Title 42 [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [600x300] [] ‘Sad joke’: Border Patrol union rips DHS for warning of ‘targeted enforcement’ in Texas [] Source: New York Post [] The Border Patrol union tore into the Department of Homeland Security, calling its public warnings of “targeted” immigration enforcement a “sad joke.” The union ashed out after DHS announced the ops at the border crossing in El Paso, Texas, where thousands of migrants are waiting for Title 42 to end Thursday. “Nothing like publicly announcing that dangerous people will be arrested, while warning them ahead of time exactly where to run and hide to avoid arrest,” the union tweeted in reply to the press release. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] 2023-02-14 Texas Border Operation Catches 348,000 Illegal Immigrants, 361 million Lethal Fentanyl Doses [] Source: Judicial Watch [] In the absence of adequate federal enforcement a Texas border security initiative heavily criticized by Democrats and the media has apprehended hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants—including thousands of criminals—and seized millions of lethal doses of fentanyl. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] 2022-09-13 Mayorkas Secretly Met with Soros-Funded Groups During Border Trip to Address Migrant Crisis [] Source: Judicial Watch [] During a highly publicized Mexican border visit to address the record-breaking migrant crisis, Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas secretly met with influential open border groups including nonprofits funded by leftwing billionaire George Soros and another operated by a former Hillary Clinton and Obama advisor. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [] 2023-03-30 Open Border Groups Call Proposed Rule to Curb Illegal Immigration Unlawful Asylum Ban [] Source: Judicial Watch [] It took an unprecedented immigration crisis for the Biden administration to finally propose a rule that limits the chaotic asylum free-for-all on the southern border and, not surprisingly, the left is up in arms. Under the measure to finally curb illegal immigration, migrants would be required to seek asylum or other protection in countries through which they travel. name: Donald J. Trump, me (2)
subject: FW: Following up on your invitation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
I'm hosting a dinner right before my birthday. Will you join me?

| | Friend - I simply couldn't imagine this dinner on the eve of my birthday without YOU there.
---
_But I noticed you had yet to act on your invitation. _
I hope you'll change your mind before the contest closes, Friend, and enter to WIN this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity.
**You and a guest of your choice would get to join me for FREE at my beautiful golf course in Bedminster.**

name: Laura Loomer
subject: “Bill Gates” EXPOSED on Video
body:
Election officials sure are shady folks. Most go unnoticed unless they REALLY screw up, and this week, I confronted an entire conference full of some of our nation's most notorious election official and radical leftists who were meeting in secrecy to discuss the 2024 elections. | | | | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2Ff763L7WN1BLEjHZ7763H0IZndg%2FXkmrUXcoNwFR7gVekFNL4w/1/0100018802507f31-267a07fc-d4b8-4036-ab39-228d516e819b-000000/4loX_SZqlpChzKf4BqJEMYfe4pU=321) | Dear Friend,

Election officials sure are shady folks. Most go unnoticed unless they REALLY screw up, and this week, I confronted an entire conference full of some of our nation's most notorious election officials and radical leftists who were meeting in secrecy to discuss the 2024 elections.

I have multiple videos of my numerous confrontations with election officials, and my first video came out last night. . . and it's BLOWING UP!

[**You can watch it here, and please don 't forget to support my investigative journalism and help cover the expenses of this investigation.**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2Ff763L7WN1BLEjHZ7763H0IZndg%2FXkmrUXcoNwFR7gVekFNL4w/2/0100018802507f31-267a07fc-d4b8-4036-ab39-228d516e819b-000000/zsMd7eShz9esQP8oYcBJrQRd_1U=321)
[](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2Ff763L7WN1BLEjHZ7763H0IZndg%2FXkmrUXcoNwFR7gVekFNL4w/3/0100018802507f31-267a07fc-d4b8-4036-ab39-228d516e819b-000000/VjUjYgq0dL1IjvlUFf0k7WxhOcU=321)
Now, I had to kick off this investigative video series by highlighting Bill Gates (not THAT Bill Gates, but it wouldn't surprise me at all), who is a Maricopa County Election Official. Yes, that's the same Maricopa County Supervisor who's currently embroiled in litigation with Arizona Gubernatorial Candidate Kari Lake, who ran a Republican.

Gates is listed in her lawsuit, which is currently being reviewed by the Supreme Court of Arizona.

Why was Gates attending this secretive D.C. meeting regarding the 2024 election that was hosted by CEIR, a group with ties to George Soros, is funded by Mark Zuckerberg, and led by an extreme Leftist political operative named David Becker?

[**You 'll have to see what Gates says here.**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2Ff763L7WN1BLEjHZ7763H0IZndg%2FXkmrUXcoNwFR7gVekFNL4w/4/0100018802507f31-267a07fc-d4b8-4036-ab39-228d516e819b-000000/3KdPnMPl9ZC1fmKkJ_guzylSSpg=321)

Gates was just one of MANY election officials I confronted this week as they tried to dash in and out of the International Spy Museum in Washington D.C., which ironically served as the venue for this secret election summit.

I'll be publishing more reports and videos about my confrontations with election officials, and which officials I spotted walking into the event very soon. But, in the meantime, the Internet is BLOWING UP about the video I just released.

Even Elon Musk has weighed in about my report. This morning he tweeted, "Strange that election officials from pivotal regions attended a far left conference when they're supposed to be impartial"
[](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2Ff763L7WN1BLEjHZ7763H0IZndg%2FXkmrUXcoNwFR7gVekFNL4w/5/0100018802507f31-267a07fc-d4b8-4036-ab39-228d516e819b-000000/uUh91zI3yUNuBCnHEyloRKH_F8o=321)
Along with exclusively breaking the story which exposed this secret election summit, my team and I spent over a month preparing for this expose, and our travel expenses alone are more than we can afford right now. In order to gain access to these election officials, we had to book our hotel rooms in the same exact hotel they were staying at. And let's just say, it wasn't cheap!

[**Will you chip in to help cover the costs of this investigation?**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2Ff763L7WN1BLEjHZ7763H0IZndg%2FXkmrUXcoNwFR7gVekFNL4w/6/0100018802507f31-267a07fc-d4b8-4036-ab39-228d516e819b-000000/eKAPyv5ER1c8m91ukI_Jk_D0Na4=321)

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Please stay tuned, and as always, thank you so much for all that you do.

P.S. If you haven't watched my latest video, please [**just click here,**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2Ff763L7WN1BLEjHZ7763H0IZndg%2FXkmrUXcoNwFR7gVekFNL4w/7/0100018802507f31-267a07fc-d4b8-4036-ab39-228d516e819b-000000/jcHCQ6-XKDIlYuz_OAzshT6yE-g=321) and don't forget that I can't do this without you, and I need and appreciate your ongoing financial support. Thanks again!

---

Lake Worth, FL 33460

[View Web Version](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fw%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FjNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg%2FXkmrUXcoNwFR7gVekFNL4w/1/0100018802507f31-267a07fc-d4b8-4036-ab39-228d516e819b-000000/GBHggY--3Brus_oi1bvA96uZOQM=321) **

name: Geoff Simpson
subject: We’re not afraid to call out entrenched incumbents on their bullshit.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Hey, Peter! It’s
Geoff again, campaigns director at Justice Democrats.

Our goal is to transform Congress into a body that fights for the working
class, communities of color, and all marginalized people. Many Democratic
incumbents actually stand in the way of that, and we're not afraid to call
them out and challenge them.

We’re in the final stages of honing in on five potential targets to
primary in 2024, but we urgently need your support. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134320?refcode=em20230509-28873&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=28873%2E1203867%2EDfSfFk ]Will you please
contribute $3 right now to help make sure we have the
resources to primary entrenched incumbents?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134320?refcode=em20230509-28873&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=28873%2E1203867%2EDfSfFk ]Contribute $3

We often challenge rich, older, white, male incumbents who are out of
touch with their districts.

For example, one of our possible target incumbents takes hundreds of
thousands of dollars from big pharma, Wall Street, and the healthcare
industry — in a district where Bernie Sanders did quite well in the 2020
presidential primary! Those two facts just don't add up.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134320?refcode=em20230509-28873&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=28873%2E1203867%2EDfSfFk ]If you think that we should challenge this entrenched incumbent and
take on big pharma and Wall Street, rush a contribution of
$3 right now.

I deeply appreciate everything you’re doing to support our work to recruit
and elect more progressive leaders like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez.

Thank you so much,

Geoffrey Simpson
Campaigns Director

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=28873%2E1203867%2EDfSfFk ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=28873%2E1203867%2EDfSfFk ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230509-28873-footer&t=1024&refcode2=28873_1203867_DfSfFk&akid=28873%2E1203867%2EDfSfFk

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=28873%2E1203867%2EDfSfFk

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Colin Allred (via Shontel Brown for Congress)
subject: re: I’m running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority
Peter, I can’t even begin to tell you how grateful I am right now.

The grassroots response to my campaign launch has been incredible, and every single penny we’ve raised puts us one step closer to defeating Ted Cruz and flipping Texas blue!

Democrats from across the country are donating in droves to launch this campaign and power us to victory. _We’re so close to hitting our $3,000,000 launch week goal!_

[**_Look, I can’t take down Ted Cruz without you, and we just need $5,000 more before midnight to reach this goal. Can you spare just $5 to power my Democratic campaign and Shontel Brown’s? Let’s do this →_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63051118/405426223/-2044271459?refcode=EM_FR_230509AllredFWD_SplitCA_CA_90DO_13_NG_N_l2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2YxOGE5MS1hZWVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3_Fh6r8D1ajXoodWmzrEuNLRpU_pHiETkhKgyZqCJvM=) [DONATE TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63051119/405426224/-2044271459?refcode=EM_FR_230509AllredFWD_SplitCA_CA_90DO_13_NG_N_b1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2YxOGE5MS1hZWVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3_Fh6r8D1ajXoodWmzrEuNLRpU_pHiETkhKgyZqCJvM=) \---------Forwarded Message---------
Sender: Colin Allred
Date: Wednesday, May 3, 2023
Subject: I’m running
> [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63051120/405426225/-2044271459?refcode=EM_FR_230509AllredFWD_SplitCA_CA_90DO_13_NG_N_p1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2YxOGE5MS1hZWVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3_Fh6r8D1ajXoodWmzrEuNLRpU_pHiETkhKgyZqCJvM=) Peter, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas.
>
> Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country!
>
> **That’s why I need you with me from day one: Please, will you split $5 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Shontel Brown's to help reach my ambitious Launch Day goal of $500,000?** [**_Every dollar you can spare will help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Senate majority. > I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full-ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.
>
> But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.
>
> I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.
>
> _Now, I’m ready for my next challenge:_ taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:
>
> [**_That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding donor of my campaign on day one. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots movement to unseat Ted Cruz, and I’m counting on you to be a part of it. Please, split $5 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Shontel Brown’s to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our Democratic Senate majority →_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63051128/405426233/-2044271459?refcode=EM_FR_230509AllredFWD_SplitCA_CA_90DO_13_NG_N_l2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2YxOGE5MS1hZWVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3_Fh6r8D1ajXoodWmzrEuNLRpU_pHiETkhKgyZqCJvM=)
>
> Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.
>
> Let’s do this,
>
> Colin Allred

subject: Trinity University Censors My Free Speech
body:
Trinity University in Texas labeled me “an elevated risk” and forced me to pay “special liability insurance” because my last name is Trump. Will you stand with me now and demand the university reverse this?| | | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=67ce1ad61d46420bab4d4ed496d71c35&_t=CHVkCgbKj2znI0hKnjVTCendMcecS0FiANu53pCCDzywvfw3OAqLjRmeGhi14kRKhNzOQdR44qTbC7cpXZF6boFthaZPRyE0RKcuDT-o3_g%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=67ce1ad61d46420bab4d4ed496d71c35&_t=CHVkCgbKj2znI0hKnjVTCendMcecS0FiANu53pCCDzywvfw3OAqLjRmeGhi14kRKhNzOQdR44qTbC7cpXZF6boFthaZPRyE0RKcuDT-o3_g%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=67ce1ad61d46420bab4d4ed496d71c35&_e=Mdq2hakP70GE5_Q3E70JjDgnZodzz6jnOf19Ps3Wm_syOKJGxbdmVFr3RQ2LdT3FaWZ4kXyI0pJircG2OKsDevA-gKtKKW-VaKDw_G0DjLm23MPyv8L8XihuMLrelYxL076khgJo9BsUjCEbNe-IsBjV3RlJ6kWriKR3KJtl1Gbw3IgPLX3LRDEn6LZA83EjV9xiu-2xkRI22zUPmTWAFQctM7ismQWgSIOTmaWroUlV0EuapA0-D2xbf4k2lLUw0tLHC0QcvrSWpYliK1W30gVTcq5poCjp1rtnycdj-sc%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative, Trinity University in Texas labeled me “an elevated risk” and forced me to pay “special liability insurance” because my last name is Trump. [**Will you stand with me now and demand the university reverse this?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=67ce1ad61d46420bab4d4ed496d71c35&_e=Mdq2hakP70GE5_Q3E70JjDgnZodzz6jnOf19Ps3Wm_syOKJGxbdmVFr3RQ2LdT3FaWZ4kXyI0pJircG2OKsDevA-gKtKKW-VaKDw_G0DjLm23MPyv8L8XihuMLrelYxL076khgJo9BsUjCEbNe-IsNJlYXzaqb2vd7BOcejTu_CmZUIbPNJ0vGNSi01ykL5lgeevfYCtj3mEBs62XfsofaTwE7-YogWyuB0sZfOyCg95olTYCRVjI1MmBel0-hljRSEoGiYYTOjazxfMBCLkDgLtxatqmZ87ESPcZ_WEH3M%3D) That’s right... before I could step foot on campus for my event promoting Free Speech Rights, my organization, Speech First, was forced to pay for special liability insurance. The Young Conservatives of Texas, who sponsored my speech, told me they have _NEVER seen this happen to a speaker before._ [**Will you join me in telling the Trinity University leadership that they should overturn this outrageous decision? Add your name to our open letter right now.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=67ce1ad61d46420bab4d4ed496d71c35&_e=Mdq2hakP70GE5_Q3E70JjDgnZodzz6jnOf19Ps3Wm_syOKJGxbdmVFr3RQ2LdT3FaWZ4kXyI0pJircG2OKsDevA-gKtKKW-VaKDw_G0DjLm23MPyv8L8XihuMLrelYxL076khgJo9BsUjCEbNe-IsIIlIQ6E2ov0g2VlAn38AGl9wkWxFwcjqyxkFPRwA6sZddpJ44udRAFEQ_HI5RSLwrpv1ws9jLBfdvsGwpqUHF7Xwa4ZeqTwmd21p-pwsHFzrdJkx4f9JxqQhKzzKkE_IFa_awmFsUymrLJkZX5Ihuk%3D)****
---
[Stand with Speech First](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=67ce1ad61d46420bab4d4ed496d71c35&_e=Mdq2hakP70GE5_Q3E70JjDgnZodzz6jnOf19Ps3Wm_syOKJGxbdmVFr3RQ2LdT3FaWZ4kXyI0pJircG2OKsDevA-gKtKKW-VaKDw_G0DjLm23MPyv8L8XihuMLrelYxL076khgJo9BsUjCEbNe-IsDKS9oCYjK1P-bioH0RhwbJ7PBK-ocpzr2leDchv9-2QRf-e9IHWGKLC0-e_1Jj6BmJsgZiwF0Hbajh8gPhfxSjhwFGbmWGf6vh_nCFTRbkUUPt8TDSlKOllWYikJvvqzD8Rk9IvQpPJpi9Pfk7NoIg%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative, even if I were related to President Trump (I’m not related), Trinity University would still be making a gross misstep and setting a dangerous anti-free-speech precedent. Not only is it wrong to burden anyone who shares a name with a famous political conservative ... but it also caters to the “Woke” student mob in trying to preemptively silence anyone whom far-left students might find objectionable. Put simply, when school administrators let “Woke” student protestors hold their schools hostage, this is where the next generation – and our educational system – ends up: A small number of far-left student activists are feared and coddled, while free speech and free thinking suffer! **After all, do you think this would be happening if my last name were Biden, Obama, or Clinton instead?** I don’t think so! [**Fellow Conservative, add your name to Speech First’s open letter right now to tell Trinity University to overturn their outrageous decision ... and show their support for free thinking and free speech instead.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=67ce1ad61d46420bab4d4ed496d71c35&_e=Mdq2hakP70GE5_Q3E70JjDgnZodzz6jnOf19Ps3Wm_syOKJGxbdmVFr3RQ2LdT3FaWZ4kXyI0pJircG2OKsDevA-gKtKKW-VaKDw_G0DjLm23MPyv8L8XihuMLrelYxL076khgJo9BsUjCEbNe-IsNSxhZRWwan7tT-9E9QkRpS0RDXY0yAWX_U64gKFWaZvJsOMHvmowQ7W7D2fK53_7F_GqHDyOGMvgxpsOE9_PweXlAVP9dY-nA8eKdSw0Ad7Oxvi_bzUDu9wqkk9K5cDJeREUCSagiIeL7U7xc2MT-I%3D) They want you to think that the issue is over, but their decision sets a dangerous precedent of discrimination on campus. I urgently need you to sign this Open Letter and stand with me against the Leftist administrators at Trinity University. Thank you for your support!

name: Senator Heidi Campbell
subject: [ALERT] Gov. Lee Announces Special Session on Public Safety 📢
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
body:
https://rkevpizu.paperform.co [https://rkevpizu.paperform.co]
Peter,
Yesterday, Gov. Lee announced that there will be a special session on public safety on August 21, 2023.
Peter, this special session on gun policy is being called because of your desire to see change in our state.
Right now, we have the drive and the momentum to champion and adopt gun policies that would have actually stopped the Covenant shooter. We have the chance to follow in the footsteps of **Texas** and raise the age to purchase assault weapons.
But we can’t get there without broad grassroots support, Peter. Will you sign this petition and support gun reform that would have actually stopped the Covenant shooter? [https://rkevpizu.paperform.co]
SIGN NOW [https://rkevpizu.paperform.co]
Peter, I know what it’s like to fight for common-sense gun reform in our state. Rep. Bo Mitchell and I filed joint legislation calling for a ban on the purchase of assault weapons in Tennessee.
Even MAGA Republicans and NRA supporters in our state support action on gun reform, which means that there is no better time to act than now.
Gov. Lee recently signed an executive order to strengthen our state’s background checks, but there are still gaping loopholes in our system. We can change that together, Peter.
Please, Peter, add your name to our petition today to stand with the majority of Tennesseans to pass common-sense gun violence prevention. >> [https://rkevpizu.paperform.co]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://rkevpizu.paperform.co]
With gratitude,
Heidi [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230430_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
Heidi Campbell is a Nashville native, Mom, former music industry executive and the first female mayor of the city of Oak Hill.
https://rkevpizu.paperform.co [https://rkevpizu.paperform.co]
As mayor, Heidi established a track record for fiscal discipline, balancing the budget every year of her Mayorship, eliminating my own salary, and returning $2M to my city’s reserves.
Heidi was elected in November of 2020 to represent District 20 in the Tennessee State Senate. Since then, she’s been an outspoken advocate for science, the LGBTQ community, public education, local control, women's and kids' issues, Medicaid expansion, and the environment.
Heidi sponsored or co-sponsored over 100 pieces of legislation in her first year in the senate, including legislation to allow cities to offer paid family leave, increase funding for school counselors and reading interventionists, and make it easier to cast a vote.
Heidi is focused on sustainable infrastructure, economic development and job creation, fully funding our public schools and supporting educators, expanding access to affordable healthcare, investing in suicide prevention, making certain that vulnerable children in state custody are not falling through the cracks, and ensuring that every Tennessean - regardless of ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age or ability - can achieve the American Dream.
Election Day is Thursday, August 3, 2023.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Campbell for Mayor
P.O. Box 330302
Nashville, Tennessee 37203
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/campbell-email?refcode=20230509_em_fr_b1_HC_initial]
Paid for by Campbell for Mayor
Chip Forrester, Treasurer
Paid for by Campbell for Mayor, Chip Forrester, Treasurer
Campbell for Mayor
PO Box 330302
Nashville, TN 37203
United States

name: Please take action (via UniteDemocrats)
subject: Demand Trump be barred from holding federal office >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
Trump is facing accountability from every angle

| **Trigger warning:**_This email briefly mentions the sexual assault verdict against Donald Trump, but does not go into detail. If this is a topic you would like to avoid reading about, we’ve included a warning here to help you make that decision._
* * *
**Peter, TRUMP IS FACING ACCOUNTABILITY FROM EVERY ANGLE:** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63054068/405429101/1598267246?refcode=UD_20230509_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJkMTA0MDEwLWIyZWUtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-wM736mZJVRVKIjB53FkAxI_mA1-tieahm9A0kELPdw=&emci=f0c308b7-aaee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=2d104010-b2ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=4584036) **In both civil and criminal courts, Donald Trump continues to prove he’s a fraud and an abuser – he should not be anywhere near the White House.**

But we have a path forward to stop him, Peter! _Democrats have already introduced a bill to invoke the 14th amendment to bar Trump from ever holding federal office again!_

**[But we need to increase public pressure to seal the deal! name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: We only have two options
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I need you to make your decision ASAP. I hope to see your name among my list of Pro-Border patriots.

| |
---
| | |
Biden just renewed his push for mass amnesty of millions of illegal immigrants - including the more than 5 MILLION he's ushered in under his administration.

As Speaker of the House, I need to know. Where do you stand on Biden's Mass-Amnesty plan?
**Option 1: We surrender to Biden 's Open-Borders agenda, and allow him to legalize millions of illegal immigrants.**

Should I put you down for Option 1 or Option 2?

I know where I stand: as long as I am Speaker of the House, there will be _NO_ amnesty for illegal immigrants. **[Are you with me?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cf073a626aef44ffbdf2255fd50162dc&_e=-CkMYFtW_8XZvoob_sBU8uzh6_LaVpT7EYwLTJ03966pghi3prgiafc4uG8YIivcfAfxK6G1gA6Vm30d8Xe2sZG64GTeyEhucxwmZYAqpvl40y0WJ3Sajn0zzgy3HcqXmkyoHq3goYnFsYNdPHdrKqTzesGy8rsGpg62tQmsKlYZAYzNtblvCHQq4yNTof39F5HsVVk0Dhj66y9V_dFGBtRf0Zm090aWdUOg8ElUpoiJTtMcz4IqWrXOTewzLX5MisS-VQP7o-gUNd54mUovdE8kcWjLMIGHSckw-VC9zLa7Xgf0HM9m_O3h6v34DOQKopWPlDPUZSnElnzOs_8GNf36CrjVp7ntqJDowexBUUH54dYGBgckOSCdc2dTywryxLevdfpYP2f95KUAu0FGZDve33NYJ3aUaFefUrKFBc0k_k8r-cp3oynnFDuV3PaQQDdIwj-MpAAYRg0wdXdC2Q%3D%3D "Are you with me?")** I need you to make your decision ASAP. name: David Trone
subject: Need your help as I run for the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland
body:
Peter,

The clock is ticking. Every hour in America:

* 10 people die from overdoses,
* 5 people take their lives due to mental health,
* Over 100 black men are arrested at 5 times the rate of white men.

These aren’t statistics – they are tragedies . And it is simply unacceptable to me, Peter. That’s why I’m running to represent Maryland in the US Senate.
As a three-term Congressman and Maryland native, I know firsthand the challenges our state is facing. We need real solutions now, and I'm committed to delivering them as your Senator.

But I can't do this alone. I need your help to make a difference. Will you join me in this fight for Maryland, Peter? Click here to watch a short video and learn more about me and what I stand for.

Video Link: Learn more about David Trone >> https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pT5zAofQ6Ek

The clock is ticking to stop the opioid epidemic, fix the mental health crisis, and reforming our broken criminal justice system. We can't afford to wait any longer to take action.

When you grow up on a farm lost to the bank, you understand the struggles of everyday Marylanders. That’s why I am committed to fighting for our state and delivering results for our communities.

Thank you for your support, I appreciate it!

Best,

David Trone

Paid for by David Trone for Maryland.
David Trone for Maryland
P.O. Box 83998
Gaithersburg, MD 20883-3998

Every hour in America: 10 people die from overdoses, 5 people take their lives due to mental health, * Over 100 black men are arrested at 5 times the rate of white men. These aren’t statistics – they are tragedies . And it is simply unacceptable to me, Peter. That’s why I’m running to represent Maryland in the US Senate. As a three-term Congressman and Maryland native, I know firsthand the challenges our state is facing. We need real solutions now, and I'm committed to delivering them as your Senator. But I can't do this alone. I need your help to make a difference. Will you join me in this fight for Maryland, Peter? Click here to watch a short video and learn more about me and what I stand for. Video Link: Learn more about David Trone >> The clock is ticking to stop the opioid epidemic, fix the mental health crisis, and reforming our broken criminal justice system. We can't afford to wait any longer to take action. When you grow up on a farm lost to the bank, you understand the struggles of everyday Marylanders. That’s why I am committed to fighting for our state and delivering results for our communities. Thank you for your support, I appreciate it! Best, David Trone Paid for by David Trone for Maryland. name: Our Revolution
subject: STICKERS: End Medical Debt and Medicare for All!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
Peter Willis,

100 million Americans — that's how many of
our neighbors suffer from Medical Debt, and that's how many people
President Biden could help with the stroke of a pen.

That's why Our Revolution is partnering with Bernie Sanders, Ro Khanna,
the National Consumer Law Center, and our members across the country on a
new campaign demanding the cancellation of existing medical debt, and to
implement root-cause solutions that prevent more people from going into
debt.

As Bernie Sanders prepares to reintroduce Medicare for All next week, we
are organizing people struggling with medical debt to speak up and fight
for healthcare justice.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8649?t=1009&akid=4262%2E5885482%2ES5m7M7 ]Help us launch our campaign to End Medical Debt by chipping in $10 or
$5 recurring, and we'll send you both a Medicare for All and an End
Medical Debt sticker!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8649?t=1010&akid=4262%2E5885482%2ES5m7M7 ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8649?t=1011&akid=4262%2E5885482%2ES5m7M7 ]GET YOUR STICKERS

We're organizing patients to pressure Congress and the President to hold
hospital chains, credit card companies, and others who perpetuate this
sickness in our healthcare system accountable.

Our demands are simple and broadly popular: end price-gouging, guarantee
the right to free care and financial assistance, and stop predatory
collection practices that cause debt to spiral out of control.

Our theory of change is simple. Hospitals are federal contractors who
receive hundreds of billions of taxpayer dollars through the Medicare and
Medicaid programs. That means President Biden and Congress can withhold
federal funding from hospitals that hurt patients.

Working people can toil their whole lives to amass a bit of financial
freedom, but one medical issue can destroy all that progress and ruin
families financially.

Here are just a few stories of the unnecessary pain our neighbors have had
to endure.

“In 2010, I was hit by a car on my bike. I barely survived, had a brain
injury, my hand amputated and reattached — costing nearly $1 million. Even
with insurance, I went bankrupt. I’ve already sold my home, my retirement
account is gone, my parents took out a loan to help. Medical Debt has
ruined my whole family.” - Kristin N., Washington

Sadly, her story is just one of many. The situation is so dark that states
that didn't expand Medicaid now have a significantly shorter life
expectancy than those that did because of the soaring medical debt. Greed
is quite literally killing our fellow Americans.

"I wouldn't owe anything if hospitals didn't gouge patients," said Mary
Willis of Texas, another Our Revolution member. "The cost of an MRI in the
hospital was eight times the cost of an outpatient MRI and 80 times
outsourced MRIs. I owe over $8,000."

These are just some of the millions of stories of medical debt, and all of
this pain is avoidable.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8649?t=1012&akid=4262%2E5885482%2ES5m7M7 ]Become a campaign cosponsor by pitching in $10 or $5 recurring, and
we'll send you these two powerful stickers calling for Medicare for All
and the end of medical debt!

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5923?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230509_FR_ENDMEDICALDEBT_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_ENDMEDICALDEBT.Av6Qxv&t=1001&akid=4262%2E5885482%2ES5m7M7 ]Our membership card

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230509_FR_ENDMEDICALDEBT_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_ENDMEDICALDEBT.8iLW2A&t=1002&akid=4262%2E5885482%2ES5m7M7 ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing as a 2023 Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $10 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230509_FR_ENDMEDICALDEBT_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_ENDMEDICALDEBT._9NmSr&t=1003&akid=4262%2E5885482%2ES5m7M7 ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5926?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230509_FR_ENDMEDICALDEBT_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_ENDMEDICALDEBT.aKXv21&t=1004&akid=4262%2E5885482%2ES5m7M7 ]GIVE ONCE

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1005&akid=4262%2E5885482%2ES5m7M7 ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1006&akid=4262%2E5885482%2ES5m7M7 ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1007&akid=4262%2E5885482%2ES5m7M7 ][IMG]

Don't live in Pennsylvania? [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/Update_Information?t=1008&akid=4262%2E5885482%2ES5m7M7 ]Click here to update your address so
that we only send you the most relevant organizing opportunities.

name: Joe Biden
subject: What we have accomplished
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I’m writing today to remind you of all the things we’ve accomplished because we won in 2020. | | |
---
Peter, I’ll get right to it: **[I’m reaching out today to ask you to make a donation to my reelection campaign. You can click here to make a contribution right now.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ymOoaZ2Tr-ojHUJEEb0iKbe46rgXAelUYiv0eD9jFoyIzlD58zhHvtdSE4fpvKt0foN1nXhpovfM-8J09yxuNeYKOb0lnZp4LI1HQtZwnmDJgEUfSh_CzMnXcU72nALOpg6OLVKlP-jMq-dyW3WPdNFO2X3A1vN32gxYCBCAOo8xgBm1nX6UbOxP6Ey-t_DMDKaN99UEQ2J4ep7H4nHl84d067pEeGcU_UoX5uV3_eAlNb_809z5h4P6BbVtIItj7Gm5Vpo1r_ON9i2ErGkkaCJj0BuSzUEaQqhx08IQO5mK-6NRx72df5McjT1EeMzLM1IikVFWVLEMh3wLDtIJL1Yh_uhD__dB175XmpKDHxj0TUbF3YPEbSFn9ruDmyDzY/3w1/kIm_6JbRQJSg1WVx6etfSg/h0/-39Q1IWakpaoNx3rnJl0FXd7iZ7K_axLcF9rVMCRApw)** I know this message is long, but I hope you’ll take a moment to read it and be reminded of all the things we have been able to accomplish because of our victory in 2020. Then, I’ll explain why your support matters so much -- especially this early in a campaign. When Kamala and I were sworn in over two years ago, the economy was on its back. Schools and businesses were closed. People were hurting. And far too many were mourning the loss of a loved one to COVID. Kamala and I agreed that we couldn’t just rebuild the economy as it was before: we needed to build an economy from the bottom up and the middle out, not the top down. So we got right to work and passed the American Rescue Plan. **Today, our economy has recovered faster and stronger than any other developed country in the world, we’ve created more jobs in two years than any president in a four-year term, and the unemployment rate is near record lows.** And we didn’t stop there: we kept working to make progress on the issues that matter. We passed the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, kicking off a decade of rebuilding our country’s roads, bridges, highways, ports, internet, and railroads. We passed the most significant gun safety legislation in over three decades. We took on Big Pharma _and won_ , capping the cost of insulin at $35 a month for seniors -- now, the biggest insulin manufacturers are lowering the cost for everyone. We passed the Inflation Reduction Act, which is bringing down costs for working people and is the largest investment to combat climate change in U.S. history -- because I believe building a clean energy future starts in America. When I look back at all the things we’ve accomplished together, I feel proud -- _and I’m reminded that there’s so much more work for us to get done._ **If you’re with Kamala and me in this fight, can you pitch in a donation of $25 right now? Grassroots contributions from supporters like you are laying the strong foundation we’ll need to win in 2024.**
| If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
