I know I don’t need to remind you what’s at stake in this election: the MAGA Republicans in this race want to drag us backward.
When they look at America, all they can see is carnage, darkness, and despair. They spread fear and lies for profit and power.
When Kamala and I look at America, we see possibility.
If the last two years show you anything, it’s that there’s not a single thing beyond our capacity if we do it together. I am proud to have you in my corner.
Thank you,
Joe
Joe Biden

Today, our economy has recovered faster and stronger than any other developed country in the world, we’ve created more jobs in two years than any president in a four-year term, and the unemployment rate is near record lows. And we didn’t stop there: we kept working to make progress on the issues that matter. We passed the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, kicking off a decade of rebuilding our country’s roads, bridges, highways, ports, internet, and railroads. We passed the most significant gun safety legislation in over three decades. We took on Big Pharma and won , capping the cost of insulin at $35 a month for seniors -- now, the biggest insulin manufacturers are lowering the cost for everyone. We passed the Inflation Reduction Act, which is bringing down costs for working people and is the largest investment to combat climate change in U.S. history -- because I believe building a clean energy future starts in America. When I look back at all the things we’ve accomplished together, I feel proud -- and I’m reminded that there’s so much more work for us to get done. If you’re with Kamala and me in this fight, can you pitch in a donation of $25 right now? Grassroots contributions from supporters like you are laying the strong foundation we’ll need to win in 2024. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | I know I don’t need to remind you what’s at stake in this election: the MAGA Republicans in this race want to drag us backward. When they look at America, all they can see is carnage, darkness, and despair. They spread fear and lies for profit and power. When Kamala and I look at America, we see possibility. If the last two years show you anything, it’s that there’s not a single thing beyond our capacity if we do it together. I am proud to have you in my corner. Thank you, Joe Joe Biden | If you would like to unsubscribe from emails like these, Paid for by Biden for President.

body:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Gabe=20Amo?=
subject: Have you seen my latest interview on WPRI?
body:
My story, my values, and my priorities in Congress | | | |
---
| | | Dear Friend,

Yesterday I went on TV and had the opportunity to speak with Kim Kalunian at WPRI about my candidacy and what I’m prepared to deliver in Congress. [Watch our conversation](https://gabeamo.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cc42fee5a4ff30fb7e2aead18&id=f0ddec56df&e=9651074c98) by clicking below: [](https://gabeamo.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cc42fee5a4ff30fb7e2aead18&id=1490c1fbf7&e=9651074c98) Listen, my story is a Rhode Island story. My parents met here in Rhode Island, my dad from Ghana and my mom from Liberia. Due to their hard work and a community that invested in me, I was able to serve at the heights of government.

This is a big race and we have big challenges to overcome. But there’s nothing we can’t do together. I hope you will consider [chipping in](https://gabeamo.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cc42fee5a4ff30fb7e2aead18&id=a58401db40&e=9651074c98) and joining the fight. [****](https://gabeamo.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cc42fee5a4ff30fb7e2aead18&id=32ecf3d202&e=9651074c98) I am in this race because there are huge issues at stake and I have the experience to be effective from **day one.** From reproductive freedom, to safety from gun violence, to affordability, to bringing resources back home – we are going to get big things done for Rhode Island.

Join me by [contributing today](https://gabeamo.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cc42fee5a4ff30fb7e2aead18&id=7feb74cd17&e=9651074c98). [****](https://gabeamo.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cc42fee5a4ff30fb7e2aead18&id=8a75787ab3&e=9651074c98) In gratitude,

Gabe Amo

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8b3337d4381b405c8da789d6d7dfa7cd&_e=pRMXY4j5HC-m9VuqS4VGsBgwVzl3wCWEVJc7InODdyG7TWX7ayQsOB5nvM9YrA9b_vNJvuSRrNBp_HnJQUp7T1r_zFlYjhObYcXf6DqoR_9MnSN16NX8oT3PlVfehIYt5ithWJUjLPxkmO58QkPzdSKw72axvhCvYb-gYUiIkOcIzAT6AXYmQefurIjVrSdr4BOJYeYej-EncEgIKH7xSHoHmpgdBFZS3JVLE0Mje20528-tdL6-un6uTpAgKl0746Hz76-R0XgvNJtihBeUZQlrwGHqwJyyPRwUVJPhSaQDQR0Vx8mANfJuZ6-JhEK5AmEgM-nndB4T4uawVCVZ-MghHx7idfH8azrya1xZnC0rKKZuo29ALXzadYdLzpFQeHwHFNMrjM8QfT5J5gHA1itSdYa1NuiCU7jdPMIresw%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8b3337d4381b405c8da789d6d7dfa7cd&_e=pRMXY4j5HC-m9VuqS4VGsBgwVzl3wCWEVJc7InODdyG7TWX7ayQsOB5nvM9YrA9b_vNJvuSRrNBp_HnJQUp7T1r_zFlYjhObYcXf6DqoR_9MnSN16NX8oT3PlVfehIYt5ithWJUjLPxkmO58QkPzdSKw72axvhCvYb-gYUiIkOcIzAT6AXYmQefurIjVrSdr4BOJYeYej-EncEgIKH7xSHoHmpgdBFZS3JVLE0Mje20528-tdL6-un6uTpAgKl0746Hz76-R0XgvNJtihBeUZY39BaxV3s4gAFu9mc2o0Lv54J23rAHXBS3JlQ_lHuqFmSTpu0hSD4OcQ9pgb6EPPgpdX5N46NNfNqV0Lked2jQLhpbQ84WiMZUCTTXymyzJqdlu-q4fHqwPw-sOgt4UDOszgTu2NBsMaSFM-LHCOJ4%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8b3337d4381b405c8da789d6d7dfa7cd&_e=pRMXY4j5HC-m9VuqS4VGsBgwVzl3wCWEVJc7InODdyG7TWX7ayQsOB5nvM9YrA9b_vNJvuSRrNBp_HnJQUp7T1r_zFlYjhObYcXf6DqoR_9MnSN16NX8oT3PlVfehIYt5ithWJUjLPxkmO58QkPzdSKw72axvhCvYb-gYUiIkOcIzAT6AXYmQefurIjVrSdr4BOJYeYej-EncEgIKH7xSHoHmpgdBFZS3JVLE0Mje20528-tdL6-un6uTpAgKl0746Hz76-R0XgvNJtihBeUZYo4I-B9gX_CcQo8IEndXcyTJXrrz-y6g3BKV78Bk5Vw3hihtakNesloIqavJSaTy9DQzFoF2Y_q7AyhycltMyZ6SjlbzCHg_PQ3OMd9XbOl1zYT6H08iKOMh_4eLabTRbMMEQed9_q8d39TqOUz97c%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8b3337d4381b405c8da789d6d7dfa7cd&_e=pRMXY4j5HC-m9VuqS4VGsBgwVzl3wCWEVJc7InODdyG7TWX7ayQsOB5nvM9YrA9b_vNJvuSRrNBp_HnJQUp7T1r_zFlYjhObYcXf6DqoR_9MnSN16NX8oT3PlVfehIYt5ithWJUjLPxkmO58QkPzdSKw72axvhCvYb-gYUiIkOcIzAT6AXYmQefurIjVrSdr4BOJYeYej-EncEgIKH7xSHoHmpgdBFZS3JVLE0Mje20528-tdL6-un6uTpAgKl0746Hz76-R0XgvNJtihBeUZRot5sjeEHjexFLBkAQ6o-LUuGB6A1tsxRb4Wsy40k7utd29C77Sg8qPhpWeuSpUDqfNjV9nzyVhZEZHow4J-MAbAKQLx5wXOfqF55ZOAwo71p9QFx2hJPkU-P-C0hjSwqIPODT3jEL2G_YUQiT5v6Q%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

clean_body: After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law | | | | | Fellow American, There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. In addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed. This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life. Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith? Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America. Thank you for your consideration. Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. _Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63056475/405431905/253275352?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWU2YjZkYi1iNGVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w7XTkE3WNHOJi_S09o0lASSivXYTOOEuvxZCaoHq2Js=)
Team, There are 73 million children in the United States. As you know, my three kids are the driving force behind the work I do in Washington. But far too often, America's kids don't have a voice in our political process. And it shows. Our planet is warming, voting rights are under attack and our kids can’t even go to school without fear of being shot. If you agree something needs to be done **[click here to split a donation that will help put our kids first and read on.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63056482/405431936/-899957609?refcode=E21421-20230509-TheirFutureSplit-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWU2YjZkYi1iNGVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w7XTkE3WNHOJi_S09o0lASSivXYTOOEuvxZCaoHq2Js=)** I am so excited to introduce you to Dr. Annie Andrews. Annie is a pediatrician and mom of three young kids. After a decade of working in a Children’s Hospital, she couldn’t sit on the sidelines anymore and watch kids needlessly suffer because of bad policy choices being made in DC. She ran for Congress in South Carolina to give kids a voice. I followed her race closely and was disappointed that she came up short on election night. Now, Annie and her former Finance Director, Renee, have launched a first-of-its-kind PAC just for kids. **Their Future PAC is dedicated solely to electing leaders who are willing to put kids first.** Our nation’s children need a game changer and I believe Their Future PAC will be just that. They are focused on six core issues that impact kids: addressing climate change, passing common sense gun laws, ensuring every child has access to affordable healthcare and a quality public education, strengthening our democracy, and addressing child hunger and poverty. [**They have an ambitious goal to help elect a #KidsFirst majority in the House in 2024. So I am writing today to ask you to chip in a split donation between Their Future PAC and my campaign. Your support is critical to ensure children have a voice in Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63056487/405431943/-899957609?refcode=E21421-20230509-TheirFutureSplit-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWU2YjZkYi1iNGVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w7XTkE3WNHOJi_S09o0lASSivXYTOOEuvxZCaoHq2Js=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

They are focused on six core issues that impact kids: addressing climate change, passing common sense gun laws, ensuring every child has access to affordable healthcare and a quality public education, strengthening our democracy, and addressing child hunger and poverty. | Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. = Team, There are 73 million children in the United States. As you know, my three kids are the driving force behind the work I do in Washington. But far too often, America's kids don't have a voice in our political process. And it shows. Our planet is warming, voting rights are under attack and our kids can’t even go to school without fear of being shot. If you agree something needs to be done = I am so excited to introduce you to Dr. Annie Andrews. Annie is a pediatrician and mom of three young kids. After a decade of working in a Children’s Hospital, she couldn’t sit on the sidelines anymore and watch kids needlessly suffer because of bad policy choices being made in DC. She ran for Congress in South Carolina to give kids a voice. I followed her race closely and was disappointed that she came up short on election night. Now, Annie and her former Finance Director, Renee, have launched a first-of-its-kind PAC just for kids. Their Future PAC is dedicated solely to electing leaders who are willing to put kids first. clean_body: Pitch in right now to unseat members like Jason who are standing in the way of common sense gun solutions | = It’s the guns, Jason. = That was the overwhelming response of over 100,000 people responding to Republican state Rep. Jason Zachary. He still doesn’t get it. It’s not complicated. It’s the guns. Republicans refuse to take the obvious answer and do their jobs. Democrats submitted at least FIVE common sense gun bills before the legislative session ended, but Republicans ended session without so much as bringing any one of those bills to the floor for a vote. In fact, they took their negligence one step further by passing legislation to ensure that gun manufacturers can’t be held accountable for the repeated acts of violence our communities have had to endure. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = We need to pass real solutions to keep communities across Tennessee safe from unchecked gun violence. Texans deserve better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics.

**We’ve all watched as Cruz bowed down to Donald Trump, and peddled baseless lies about the 2020 election, even as rioters stormed the Capitol on Jan. 6 and fled to Cancun while Texans were freezing in their homes.**

Now, we have a chance to replace him with a leader who will fight for our fundamental rights, from voting to reproductive freedom.

And flipping this seat blue would all but guarantee Democrats protect our razor-thin Senate majority – a majority we must protect with the future of so many of our shared values on the line.

[_**So please, don’t miss your chance to join this powerful grassroots movement: Chip in a split donation with Fight for Progress to become a Founding Donor of Team Allred. And flipping this seat blue would all but guarantee Democrats protect our razor-thin Senate majority – a majority we must protect with the future of so many of our shared values on the line. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Team Allred | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. subject: what I told Lawrence O'Donnell on MSNBC

body:
Did you tune in last night?
| Friend, last night, I joined Lawrence O'Donnell on MSNBC to talk about why I'm running for Senate to defeat Ted Cruz. [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17152?t=6&akid=1799%2E564421%2E1XoJLJ) The thing about Ted Cruz is, he's in this for Ted Cruz – he's always going to put himself first, and quite frankly, it's embarrassing to call him our senator.

But I know we can win this thing and finally put Texans first. CNN says Cruz is one of the most vulnerable senators in the country, and just hours after I launched my campaign, Cook Political Report _increased_ Democrats' chances of flipping this seat!

**So I want you to know I'm running this race for _all_ Texans and that we can win – but I need your helpfriend.** [**Defeating Ted Cruz is going to take a historic outpouring of grassroots support like we've never seen before, so please, will you join my team with a gift of $3 or more today? →**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17138?t=8&akid=1799%2E564421%2E1XoJLJ) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Colin Allred and Ron Be Gone will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17144?t=14&akid=1799%2E564421%2E1XoJLJ)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17145?t=15&akid=1799%2E564421%2E1XoJLJ)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17146?t=16&akid=1799%2E564421%2E1XoJLJ)
Friend, I believe deeply in public service, and I recognize that it's not about me. I'm proud to represent North Dallas, and I've never lost sight of the fact that I was elected to speak for the folks in my district. That's the kind of leader every single person in our great state deserves.

This race isn't going to be easy. Ted Cruz is at the mercy of special interests and corporate donors. They give him millions in exchange for his loyalty. **But I'm running a grassroots campaign because I answer to the folks who elect me – not the highest bidder. So I'm counting on you to make sure I have the money I need to win this race.**

[**Will you donate $3 or more to help me reach my $3,000,000 goal by midnight? Every dollar truly makes a difference in our fight to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue, and defend the Senate →**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/17138?t=18&akid=1799%2E564421%2E1XoJLJ)

Thank you so much. Let's do this!

Colin Allred

name: Josh Harder
subject: new report: GOP attacks
body:

body:

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63059204/405436748/428766023?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230509-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTNhZDM5ZS1iYWVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6wlh2fiGPua_gX8Fb30hfibIb6hrDk_DqzguCYdTANE=)

| Peter –

Before I came to Congress, I was a working mom. I understand the chaos, the stress, and the unpredictability that comes with it – I even remember having to bring my (very active!) toddler to work with me after his preschool suddenly closed.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63059205/405436749/428766023?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230509-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTNhZDM5ZS1iYWVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6wlh2fiGPua_gX8Fb30hfibIb6hrDk_DqzguCYdTANE=)
My kids are all grown up now, but I continue to personally understand the everyday challenges that our working parents face in Pennsylvania and across the country. That’s why I am such a strong advocate in Congress for working families, from ensuring they can access affordable, reliable childcare to connecting them with good-paying jobs and reliable transportation.

clean_body: My kids are all grown up now, but I continue to personally understand the everyday challenges that our working parents face in Pennsylvania and across the country. | = | Peter – Before I came to Congress, I was a working mom. I understand the chaos, the stress, and the unpredictability that comes with it – I even remember having to bring my (very active!) toddler to work with me after his preschool suddenly closed. = My kids are all grown up now, but I continue to personally understand the everyday challenges that our working parents face in Pennsylvania and across the country. That’s why I am such a strong advocate in Congress for working families, from ensuring they can access affordable, reliable childcare to connecting them with good-paying jobs and reliable transportation. I am determined to stay in Congress as a champion for working families, and I’m counting on supporters like you to ensure I have the resources to do it. = | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = Endlessly grateful to have you on my team, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Add your name: We need to ban assault weapons
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Not only is this crisis affecting our own neighborhoods, it’s also fueling violence globally.
#
_Content Warning: This email discusses the topic of gun violence. Please read with discretion._
Peter, we have to ban assault weapons — no more excuses.
There have officially been more mass shootings in the US than there were in 2023. Yet our current legislators are focused on expanding their special interests and showing favor to those who propagate our current gun violence crisis. **We cannot keep living this way.**
**It is our duty as legislators and activists to stop these killings. That starts with reinstating the assault weapons ban.****[Peter, t](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/ban-assault-weapons-petition/?source=em20230509-2465&t=1&akid=2465%2E420207%2E81EqV2)[he fight to end this endemic of gun violence will take all of us. Please add your name to our collective petition to urge all lawmakers to prioritize safety and reinstate the assault weapons ban. ](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/ban-assault-weapons-petition/?source=em20230509-2465&t=2&akid=2465%2E420207%2E81EqV2)**
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/ban-assault-weapons-petition/?source=em20230509-2465&t=3&akid=2465%2E420207%2E81EqV2)**
As GOP lawmakers waste time debating completely unworkable bills aimed at disenfranchising and discriminating against immigrants, poor people, and trans children —**our country is facing a real crisis.** Gun violence in the United States and our lack of gun regulation is spreading to other countries. _This is the real crisis at the border._
**Not only is this crisis affecting our own neighborhoods, it’s also fueling violence globally.** The United States is the number one source of semi-automatic weapons in El Salvador, approximately half a million guns are trafficked to Mexico each year, and 70% to 90% of guns recovered at crime scenes in Mexico are tracked back to the United States.
We have the immediate tools to fix this crisis, but the catch is: **Republicans in Congress are hellbent on keeping our country in this gridlock of inaction.**
**The time for compromise is over****, Peter. We must be bold and determined in our fight to ban all assault weapons once and for all if we want to solve this crisis.**[**Please add your name to stand with me and our collective progressive movement and call on lawmakers to choose people over profits and ban assault weapons.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/ban-assault-weapons-petition/?source=em20230509-2465&t=4&akid=2465%2E420207%2E81EqV2)
Together,
Pramila Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230509-2465-footer&t=5&refcode2=2465_420207_81EqV2&akid=2465%2E420207%2E81EqV2)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=6&akid=2465%2E420207%2E81EqV2)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=2465%2E420207%2E81EqV2)

**Americans and millions of freedom-loving individuals throughout the world are now at risk as a result of Joe Biden and his administration’s utter incompetence. President Biden has yet to treat the office of the presidency with the seriousness it warrants and he has been derelict in his duty to keep America safe. | Americans and millions of freedom-loving individuals throughout the world are now at risk as a result of Joe Biden and his administration’s utter incompetence. Putin’s invasion and Biden’s soft response worsened a bad situation — Matt Dolan is running to be the next U.S. Senator from Ohio and needs our help. Our elected leaders must stand up to tyrants and bullies like Vladimir Putin and Xi Jinping. Joe Biden has been nothing more than a bystander as America’s standing around the world crumbles. -Defend Democracy PAID FOR BY DOLAN FOR OHIO Not authorized by any other candidate.

body:
Join us on Thursday, May 11 for a livestreamed virtual Senate forum hosted by the CA Working Families Party, featuring Reps. Katie Porter and Barbara Lee. | | | Hi Peter, I'm Jane Kim, State Director of the California Working Families Party. **This Thursday, May 11, at 9pm ET / 6pm PT, I'll be moderating the CA WFP virtual Senate Forum featuring Reps. Katie Porter and Barbara Lee — both of whom are running to be the next U.S. Senator from California and I'd love it if you could join us!** Across California, hundreds of Working Families Party members, supporters, and elected leaders will gather at dozens of in-person watch parties at restaurants, bars, and homes. Watch party attendees will be able to ask the candidates questions about their records, values, and visions for the state. With the news of Senator Feinstein's retirement, all eyes are on California — and for good reason. It's safe to say that California's progressive future lies in the balance in this Senate race and the priorities raised in this race are likely to shape progressive priorities across the country in 2024. **Even if you don't live in California, you can still watch it all go down.[Join us on Thursday, May 11 for a livestream via the CA Working Families Party Youtube channel.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDLsLJ-Vh_OKSHlTVaFH-TQx4Y-6N365BGtpKGrmd_U4e-Go_d5rOq0phmhFNl_PYQDfjdbuAc6ArCtJ1W6YcIRpNz3ExzsdPhHNVARSxm0g-2PTRZiIRTcafHePGcI-37ltmEHwRoTgftmLVzOZB5jz_qy7w0-i75Av0HsW--kAJst6zydx-cbWU5z5F-_i9QIBeMwWwP6qZ9ZSMUIi2P9rhOHQBoDjXBzVybZOuhkWdO7ndhzHg1Xie0AI2Fbe7p0vSSkd1SZMWfSpXFb-KpzhPXqomtGGtG06S7MMwuSLid1jR01yhJu0udz8oroiYbA/3w1/jUEwkEcgRZubtF6wd_tV_Q/h0/qS-NpfhbOsbGAefQ2TGwXxyfsxCL9D5_Pf6lUUPRuns)** [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDLsLJ-Vh_OKSHlTVaFH-TQx4Y-6N365BGtpKGrmd_U4e-Go_d5rOq0phmhFNl_PYQDfjdbuAc6ArCtJ1W6YcIRpWcMGQHkIPIVJ4YXNRi-SkyGXx9OUtDO6f_MUPh0_tE9XqbZiR82pgdycYQ0K9ffaKb30-Av4K5xBRIC__ze76gK1Atj4lrJI7YdacgTrkXxIEYr_kPdwLleD3mPBqyMrU2xlOug_ypW1xT-kztchi3O3KMIB2ZdzlbRER-W1Is68YUU8WVwACNiQDZ1mzQbkWEvZYuxQ7OCZ4okdngDUj2BeCfzG1q4jRDVY-sAcvbA/3w1/jUEwkEcgRZubtF6wd_tV_Q/h1/GiEQBQ23wdox-_wHBTGWNJ4rf3wQUQSdfvV6ln2DuIg) **[Watch LIVE Thursday, May 11, at 9pm ET / 6pm PT](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDLsLJ-Vh_OKSHlTVaFH-TQx4Y-6N365BGtpKGrmd_U4e-Go_d5rOq0phmhFNl_PYQDfjdbuAc6ArCtJ1W6YcIRqH7Am915ha4hWElYh7kILdJ6U0phHe9zQck9J7JXR5S5HUUO4CnGsaOpVu5BgFQkbqa0Wdv6sWYqi1UqIEhK55eV5ZCgIC0uj_rT33rDXr1gntvPZvEzG1mBFJUSsSsXnKFz7QWHGDY1zzbAmoZB2E01RTWot4fZSCzePyADH7zpQq-dNIS1SrWoVH4Vzb8n48zRgMGQbZFRsq2d7mTh8EZhiKtCkEJFq41As14JEbWg/3w1/jUEwkEcgRZubtF6wd_tV_Q/h2/xHOUDToJnAGepIiZc1YgGFtHJMhWbq-8u0N89HUYegY)** Last year, more than forty California community, labor, and political groups launched the California Working Families Party. With the news of Senator Feinstein's retirement, all eyes are on California — and for good reason. It's safe to say that California's progressive future lies in the balance in this Senate race and the priorities raised in this race are likely to shape progressive priorities across the country in 2024. Even if you don't live in California, you can still watch it all go down. Last year, more than forty California community, labor, and political groups launched the California Working Families Party. The party has organized chapters composed of individuals, community organizations, and labor unions in six regions of the state: Central Coast/Valley, Inland Empire, Orange County, San Diego, Los Angeles, and the Bay Area. You absolutely don't want to miss this. In solidarity, Jane Kim California Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families, please .

Folks,

This is urgent: Republicans in the North Carolina state legislature just passed an abortion ban. And because of their procedural schemes, they forced through their extreme bill within 48 hours.

**Make no mistake, this is a calculated attack on reproductive rights, and we must fight back.**

**[Will you rush a split contribution to the North Carolina Senate Democratic Caucus and the IDCCA today to help us fight back against Republican extremism?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63059356/405437389/1190170811?refcode=EM_FR_230509NCDSC_RD_90DO_5_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjZiN2I1NDMtYmNlZS1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IJ8ReoUsHFo86hPXftR1MmDRPql8Lv5WmtWqFekOanc=)**

This bill is extreme, and Republicans know it. They waited until late last Tuesday night to introduce it, and then pushed it through to a vote in less than 24 hours. They’re scheming behind closed doors and rushing through the legislative process because they know North Carolinians won’t stand for their extremist agenda.

North Carolinians believe in freedom – and that includes the freedom to make your own health care decisions. Abortion is essential, life-saving health care that should not be politicized or criminalized. But Republicans will do whatever it takes to push through their extremist agenda, even if it harms the very people they were elected to represent.

We need your help to break the Republican majority so we can continue to advocate for abortion access and defend reproductive health care across the state.

Yep, you read that right: we're asking you to chip in one dollar to support our movement – though if you feel compelled to give more, we won't be mad!

Hey there - It's Sarah.

I'll keep this brief because I know you probably have a bunch of emails.

---
I want to be clear about what I did for our country Peter, because in this day and age, censorship and disinformation pollute our daily lives.

I served America in the war against terrorism. I was a Navy special operations officer that I disarmed terrorist Improvised Explosive Devices (IEDs) in Afghanistan and Iraq before they could harm my brothers and sisters in arms.

Unfortunately, my life in the military seems simple compared to the minefield of political correctness that we’ve all been navigating in what is _supposed_ to be the land of the free. [**That’s why I’m reaching out to you Peter, and asking for your help.**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=2926015756544be99a34462022793b41&_e=UQ5BDpfOo8po0eoPd0nasHZ8NhiDYwwArSU-A0CDa-LOUDwzhoEzdCofm03OQJryQS6vQFDwkCvo0nWNpRwEzSw18-FUqU2wyADfnZEWBPkpva6AvA93x-IbFRluDmL9sM-Qzo3Yp7MtkkHzAc-_jUJXiX1d2d4QKmb_WlNgu-zNFwklz1AcPJ2aSVXoN0TK7Sh6qxiXqLqeLCmLgUKf0nrCan7DC3sjFgMScHC7MoRmDB8w-IblUqOjYv-d3BybO6SlYXn-gSZD3DEr9SJWXlP7j6m2EigweBy3a1NaUgn2KxWzZiSrc6qgRjoZsBv27RQAWkEzRsrKM4_hJ7DuZw%3D%3D)

[**STAND WITH HUNG CAO >> **](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=2926015756544be99a34462022793b41&_e=UQ5BDpfOo8po0eoPd0nasHZ8NhiDYwwArSU-A0CDa-LOUDwzhoEzdCofm03OQJryQS6vQFDwkCvo0nWNpRwEzSw18-FUqU2wyADfnZEWBPkpva6AvA93x-IbFRluDmL9sM-Qzo3Yp7MtkkHzAc-_jUJXiX1d2d4QKmb_WlNgu-zNFwklz1AcPJ2aSVXoN0TKEkaBRxF2Ym1v4lm3Fuiywh7_x7KPWvNTkESUYNR6YYPXh5kgC_DD6CH-DJeagj4xz8adZIZ2MXPE4iMzEzVZ5mZFVvpbEc8yeEs7pTBTXq1bbHm7gzp3sUM9VUm9ZcPm0uapl4eX_RiYHa0kfed9Sw%3D%3D)
---
In this world we live in today, honesty and facts are being met with violence, censorship, or being “canceled” for simply stating things like “America is the greatest country in the world” or questioning the woke radical politics being pushed on us and our children.

**But you know what Peter, I don’t mind being canceled if it means standing up to these unhinged radical politics, because my duty is to God, Country, and Family.

** If you feel the same way I do, then I need your help to dismantle the left-wing politics that they have planted everywhere in our society from schools to courtrooms.
[**Please chip in any support you can, even just $10 or $20 to help me kick the radical liberals out of Congress and elect REAL, so we can end the woke politics and get our nation back on track.**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=2926015756544be99a34462022793b41&_e=UQ5BDpfOo8po0eoPd0nasHZ8NhiDYwwArSU-A0CDa-LOUDwzhoEzdCofm03OQJryQS6vQFDwkCvo0nWNpRwEzSw18-FUqU2wyADfnZEWBPkpva6AvA93x-IbFRluDmL9sM-Qzo3Yp7MtkkHzAc-_jUJXiX1d2d4QKmb_WlNgu-zNFwklz1AcPJ2aSVXoN0TKDRYMnJ74W7BCTyTG8wiesgZkPM4wxirM17uX1h1aJil__5aU2M07exru-pYIHLDtEhT2P6jiGLru6leYoN0SSn_NVoBqvRtVWjXwc8aCyCVAMY_qSMylSUEPw9WnbX1g6ATjp7Fzpt7mWfWOXuJMmg%3D%3D)

[**STAND WITH HUNG CAO >> **](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=2926015756544be99a34462022793b41&_e=UQ5BDpfOo8po0eoPd0nasHZ8NhiDYwwArSU-A0CDa-LOUDwzhoEzdCofm03OQJryQS6vQFDwkCvo0nWNpRwEzSw18-FUqU2wyADfnZEWBPkpva6AvA93x-IbFRluDmL9sM-Qzo3Yp7MtkkHzAc-_jUJXiX1d2d4QKmb_WlNgu-zNFwklz1AcPJ2aSVXoN0TKNkjvoQRGRG2a3bjoIA_rLg2WGfGVyh7gHDIb03G2aehsNY-gBxcyVUuJNMlHIhGTMmNr4EiTj0DbLcEw743AeEYjaF50_WZ1xk68F1R0pNOdLukprSjqns6stwHxS8VWsO7HKWvI9Ka19xMTrPONnw%3D%3D)

We need 100,000 signatures on our URGENT petition to _prove_ that Democrats stand against the GOP’s anti-voting rights agenda. **So please, join Vice President Harris _NOW:_**

name: KatiePorter.com
subject: This is a big deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Did you know?
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=22610%2E3422442%2EpkFu7P)
Derek,
Did you know that, on average, just 19% of the folks who get this email will actually open it?
And out of those 19%, about 2% will click one of our links.
....And out of that 2%, only _half_ of those folks actually donate, finish our survey, or sign our petition.
All of that to say: **You reading this right now, Derek, is a big deal.**
But it’s also a testament to how much you mean to our campaign.
Katie doesn’t accept donations from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists, so we rely on grassroots supporters like yourself—especially those who donate via emails like this one.
**[Can you join the top 1% of Porter Supporters reading this email and make a contribution of $5 today? Every single donation makes a difference in a competitive primary like ours.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230509-2?amount=5&refcode=EMAH09_2_EMA_20230509_V1_F&refcode2=22610_3422442_pkFu7P&akid=22610%2E3422442%2EpkFu7P)**
**[Donate $5 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230509-2?amount=5&refcode=EMAH09_2_EMA_20230509_V1_F&refcode2=22610_3422442_pkFu7P&akid=22610%2E3422442%2EpkFu7P)**
Thank you for opening this email and supporting our campaign.
—Team Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAH09_2_EMA_20230509_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=22610_3422442_pkFu7P&akid=22610%2E3422442%2EpkFu7P)**

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63060078/405440564/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjdlMWU1OS1jMWVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T6ch54WfKoMTGEgoMeZ_6CBBI0ONQOimKGJbc0pA96A=&emci=505df1a2-98ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=2b7e1e59-c1ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=8943725) Peter, **If there’s one thing I know, it's that for too long the deck in Washington has been stacked against workers.** That's why we must take action to protect our unions against corporations that engage in union-busting behavior. It's time to put a stop to corporations claiming anti-union expenses as run-of-the-mill business tax write-offs. That’s why I’m fighting in Congress to end the taxpayer subsidization of anti-union activity. **[If you agree, add your name to my petition right now to show your solidarity with our workers. It’s time we protect our unions and our workers.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63060079/405440565/48463042?source=em20230509-ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjdlMWU1OS1jMWVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T6ch54WfKoMTGEgoMeZ_6CBBI0ONQOimKGJbc0pA96A=&emci=505df1a2-98ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=2b7e1e59-c1ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=8943725)** **[Add Your Name »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63060080/405440566/48463042?source=em20230509-ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjdlMWU1OS1jMWVlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T6ch54WfKoMTGEgoMeZ_6CBBI0ONQOimKGJbc0pA96A=&emci=505df1a2-98ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=2b7e1e59-c1ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=8943725)** For years, I’ve been standing up to big corporations in Washington because our workers deserve not just our support; they deserve action. Unions built this nation — it is a way of life for many workers, especially here in Pennsylvania. That’s why we must show support for workers now more than ever. **[Will you add your name to show your support for workers across the country? | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8Q4JqfYsUxVXLdLyB7iM-fD9uMaW4e0bbiA-4n4EMLcAqlr5jw2GIxK_iNqXo-IccWeQHbgky8TjqMofUqvsDt9rI8vgT4WYbxf2ivMc3zLKVUcXy6EUKvZcFJkqV3P51JMhEBFpcm_oROLuyhrg5cYBf5RL6sbx0HTfp9RsAY2t5BONXTTvT099IQXEcIlEGLgpqbaQjokCFillp6Rbmut6ngqEERgjjawTGYsssDRP7yESfv4rukuAmtFf-WVy5g_RGpP5usyJszUH2Iu7Kh0-q0pO2U3A-Ce6_PhN-INCI90RW8sWdE98NU9WUB5AZKQzLpoLiu59Vjk5Yvc7BIA/3w1/zlHu2E58R_-CK9fABwQH4A/h0/zwkPN9hxci-4GaQxJn5BlABbQLN5reT8QVWwlq_ZujA)
| | Peter,

This has not been an easy year. From the tragic massacres in Nashville, Louisville, and Allen, to the attacks on our Democracy in Tennessee, to the blatant racism that has bled through into our society on a daily basis — it can feel as though all hope is lost.

**I’m here to tell you — it’s not.**

The ongoing struggle for justice and equality demands that we dismantle systemic racism and inequality, protect voting rights and access, and create opportunities for everyone to succeed.

**Look, we believe our government works best when we have elected representatives that reflect and respect the diversity of our communities. That’s why we’re always #BuildingBlackPoliticalPower and working to unseat hate-filled GOP extremists.
**
We’ve helped elect **HUNDREDS** of Black progressive champions at all levels of political office and we’ve got BIG plans to double our efforts for 2024 — _which has already begun!
_
[If you want to see more Black leaders unseating GOP extremists in 2024, please consider donating $25 or even just $10 to help The Collective PAC fight for what matters most → ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wcVmDVfjroFVbol-C41V4cUtwuvifKXz_6VTP12pkXQwX8t2xGtFywEIsGFUtiUuDPHSN-pKo-FFt0X_hwvCzhmF_xPf1q3u1oEUhwsGOxxgqQoKN3oF3qVCOJbK4wrGJVABL5QQZIKhVsbZ35mnYazSy4AROWkZ3oQirHzxvjaFFnHl41ovgAXpb_PITPHIl3zni2vrvvkcsNii5WpLaOi1Y2_GNyLJ6enLO0dkRoNrTFQkglhC6XndPW8MUaIofcee9h9Eqq5wKtip3Tb6RfH02cVqqydNKxqDSHeTgs0bErQSO-DOPowvj4w-y6jMtB8ArH8y8z4_9BrOd0QLA6c1jVMzrR8SDzPIovWxWVv6kAObFlh0dvmsZHnFNphS51Vv9YYPUK5jB9jK604E1A7c6tn1NRwJX9fZP7R7X2npn87EiCAbaAgIGPigzC2fnw_SbCVk85M4zk7YRhKzUA_sKjqMCb-5EWOxrDkHfhY7KVi_K1ZW2pn9DQvnQrJN8/3w1/zlHu2E58R_-CK9fABwQH4A/h1/6oU4UzUlFDn07ON21nndYSpkxbijdi0yKJrURgW3P34) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, This has not been an easy year. From the tragic massacres in Nashville, Louisville, and Allen, to the attacks on our Democracy in Tennessee, to the blatant racism that has bled through into our society on a daily basis — it can feel as though all hope is lost. I’m here to tell you — it’s not. The ongoing struggle for justice and equality demands that we dismantle systemic racism and inequality, protect voting rights and access, and create opportunities for everyone to succeed. Look, we believe our government works best when we have elected representatives that reflect and respect the diversity of our communities. That’s why we’re always #BuildingBlackPoliticalPower and working to unseat hate-filled GOP extremists. We’ve helped elect HUNDREDS of Black progressive champions at all levels of political office and we’ve got BIG plans to double our efforts for 2024 — which has already begun! | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Even in the face of bigotry, we have never and will never hesitate in our mission to create a government that is representative of the people it serves. Thank you for your support of our mission. Quentin James Co-Founder of The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from The Collective PAC, please .

body:
Rural progressives could transform the US.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63060262/405441525/580016960?refcode=EM_FR_230509COBattlegroundrs2_ML_FULL_4_NG_N_LOGO&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2Q1MDIzZi1jM2VlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xYAXM5lrRiisk7vNsU4U_tsza2cWcv1sXAwhmj1TJ2g=)
Team, here at Movement Labs, we’re pioneering the way to a nation that works for everyone.
Through exhaustive research and experimentation, we have found the path to building back long-term Democratic support in rural areas and winning a progressive future.
Our rural county organizing program increased Democratic success in the rural counties we had the resources to invest in by three points in 2022 – **enough to flip battleground states across the country.**
Now, we’re in the process of scaling up our program to do just that by investing in rural progressives throughout six key states: Arizona, Georgia, Michigan, Nevada, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin.
**[We’ve raised over one-third of the $1.5 million we need to do it, and every dollar we’ve been given by thousands of grassroots donors across the nation has helped us get there. Will you donate $10 or more right now to help us close that gap and transform our nation?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63060263/405441526/580016960?refcode=EM_FR_230509COBattlegroundrs2_ML_FULL_4_NG_N_L1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2Q1MDIzZi1jM2VlLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xYAXM5lrRiisk7vNsU4U_tsza2cWcv1sXAwhmj1TJ2g=)**

Our team really counts on your responses to fuel our programs and empower Democratic women to run and win in every state.
**Will you take just two minutes to complete your survey response now? Sandra Bishop

We need your input, Peter.
Now that we're a third of the way through 2023, we're also a third of the way into this year's fight to transform politics – and we need your help.

Here at Emerge, 2022 was _huge_ : Our alums had a 71 percent win rate in elections nationwide, and 95 percent of incumbents who ran for reelection won! But the work continues in 2023: We're taking every opportunity to empower Democratic women who will fight for our communities at every level.
**That’s why we’re asking our top supporters to take the Emerge Community Survey today. ****Right now, we’re still 51 responses short of our goal, and we’re counting on your feedback before our survey closes at midnight. [So please: Will you take just two minutes to share your input now?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63060507/405442195/646914422?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,10,20,100,250&code=jtk1200-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE2Yjc0Njg2LWMzZWUtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7OVKV5gMZB9ssQjoJ0zFVsBiAYqLkbxV6qThqN1jAns=&emci=a6a6c44c-cbed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=a6b74686-c3ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=920818)**
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63060509/405442197/646914422?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,10,20,100,250&code=jtk1200-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE2Yjc0Njg2LWMzZWUtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7OVKV5gMZB9ssQjoJ0zFVsBiAYqLkbxV6qThqN1jAns=&emci=a6a6c44c-cbed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=a6b74686-c3ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=920818)

Listening to real people and real communities – not out-of-touch “experts” – is how Emerge forms our strategies, designs our trainings, and recruits the right candidates for the right races year after year.
**With your insights, we can keep building on our incredible win rate for community-driven candidates and empower more Democratic women who will put real people first.[So please, will you take our Emerge Community Survey now?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63060510/405442198/646914422?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,10,20,100,250&code=jtk1200-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE2Yjc0Njg2LWMzZWUtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7OVKV5gMZB9ssQjoJ0zFVsBiAYqLkbxV6qThqN1jAns=&emci=a6a6c44c-cbed-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=a6b74686-c3ee-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=920818)**
Thank you, Peter. We look forward to reading your responses.
– Team Emerge
| | [SUPPORT EMERGE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63060511/405442200/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1200-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE2Yjc0Njg2LWMzZWUtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7OVKV5gMZB9ssQjoJ0zFVsBiAYqLkbxV6qThqN1jAns=)

Emerge is a national organization working to recruit, train, and get Democratic women elected across the country, and we are so grateful to have you on our team. Our alums are strong voices for Democratic values — and they are running up and down the ballot to fight for working families. They are fighting for critical issues that affect our communities, such as the environment, accessible and affordable health care, social justice, and education equity. We need more alums fighting for us across the country.

You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support — that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our organization depends on thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our communities and across our country by building power through investing in Democratic women. **[If you’d like to donate, click here.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63060513/405442201/-1657939538?amounts=5,10,20,100,250&code=jtk1200-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE2Yjc0Njg2LWMzZWUtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7OVKV5gMZB9ssQjoJ0zFVsBiAYqLkbxV6qThqN1jAns=)**

name: SherrodBrown.com
subject: just $26.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
| | |
---
Friend – you might find this hard to believe when you think about the _tens of millions_ of dollars _ _ that GOP super PACs are set to spend to defeat us, **but the average grassroots donation to our campaign is just $26.**
We're mighty proud of that fact – and of the grassroots movement that we're building together. It's made up of folks like you who believe in our fight and chip in what you can, when you can.
